student_names: Ahmed Mansour Mohamed Saber, Ahmed Mohamed Mohamed Abdelrahman, Aya Abdalla Elsaid Laban, Eslam Esmael Fathy Elsaid, Eslam Mohamed Elsyad, Rania Saeed El-shahaat sherif
abstract: In this project we have designed and implemented a 3D game system for neuromuscular patients and other people. The hardware selected for the project was leap motion controller sensor connected to a standard laptop. The system tracks the 3D motion of the patient's hand within the virtual environment. The system has a GUI for patient information data entry. It also includes the possibility for the doctor to select/set game parameters (range of motion, game speed) according to each specific patient. Finally, there is a quantitative reporting section which includes two parts: a session report with game parameters, scores and outcomes of the hand motion including joint angles.
description: A virtual rehabilitation system that uses a Leap Motion sensor to track hand movements in a 3D game environment. The system is designed to assist neuromuscular patients with physical therapy by making exercises more engaging while providing doctors with quantitative data on patient progress, such as joint angles and range of motion.
problem_statement: Neuromuscular patients suffer from nerve atrophy and limited hand mobility, making it difficult to perform daily tasks. Traditional physiotherapy sessions can be tedious and difficult to schedule, leading to a need for more engaging and accessible rehabilitation methods.
proposed_solution: The development of a 3D interactive game integrated with a Leap Motion sensor that allows patients to perform therapeutic hand exercises in a gamified environment. The system enables doctors to customize game parameters for individual patients and generates detailed reports on performance and physical improvement.
objectives:
1. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
2. Improve system performance and reliability.
3. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
4. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
5. Implement modern technologies and best practices.

abstract: 3D scanning is used in many applications such as entertainment industry, Historical Preservation, Engineering, Production, Interaction and Navigation and many applications. The aim of our project is creating a 3D image from a 3D model in the real world. Our project depends on using low cost tools such as laser that provides more accuracy results than other tools, and a camera (either webcam or digital camera for more accurate results). 3D scanning has many advantages such as Quickly capture all of the physical measurements of any physical object, Save time in design work, Ensure parts will fit together on the first try, Capture engineering optimizations inherent in manufactured parts, Utilize modern manufacturing on parts that were originally manufactured before CAD, Compare "as-designed" model to "as-built" condition of manufactured parts.
description: This project implements a low-cost 3D laser scanning system. It uses a hand-held line laser and a standard webcam to capture the geometry of physical objects. The system processes the video feed in MATLAB to reconstruct a 3D digital model, providing an affordable alternative to expensive industrial 3D scanners.
problem_statement: Existing 3D scanning devices are often extremely high-cost and complex, making them inaccessible for many users who need to create 3D models of physical objects for design, manufacturing, or historical preservation.
proposed_solution: A low-cost 3D laser scanning system that utilizes a standard webcam and a hand-held line laser. The system captures video of an object illuminated by a laser line, processes the data in MATLAB to extract 3D coordinates, and reconstructs a digital 3D model.
objectives:
1. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
2. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
3. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
4. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
5. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
6. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.

project_title: A Smart Automatic System for Criminal Identification
student_names:
Yousef Yacoub Mohammed, Ahmed Mohamed Hassan,
Omar Mahmoud Ali,
Youssef Tarek Ibrahim,
Karim Mostafa Abdelrahman,
Mahmoud Samir Hassan,
Abdelrahman Wael Mohamed
abstract: The increasing use of biometric technologies in high security applications has created the requirement for highly accurate face recognition systems. This project presents a real-time face recognition system using an automated surveillance camera. The system utilizes Haar-classifier for face detection and a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for face recognition. The proposed system achieves an accuracy of 5% on a dataset of 20, 000 images, providing a robust and efficient alternative to traditional identification methods like ID cards.
description: This project develops an automated criminal identification system designed for government institutions and high-security areas like airports. By replacing traditional, easily forged ID cards with biometric facial recognition, the system provides a faster, more secure, and reliable method for verifying identities in real-time using surveillance camera feeds.
problem_statement: Traditional identification methods, such as physical ID cards, driver's licenses, and ATM cards, are prone to forgery, theft, and impersonation, leading to security vulnerabilities in governmental and high-security environments.
proposed_solution: A real-time facial recognition system developed for the Android platform that captures images via camera, detects faces using Haar Cascades, and identifies individuals by comparing extracted facial features against a secure database using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN).
objectives:
1. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
2. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
3. Enhance user experience and usability.
4. Enhance system security and protect sensitive user data.
5. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
6. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.

student_names: Mohamed Nasser Maher, Karim Ashraf Salah Eldien, Fares Ahmed Omran, Ali Shaban Mohamed, Pola Reda Abu Elkher Atya, Omar Mohamed Saber, Kyrillos Safwat Ibrahim
abstract: The Educational Platform for Students and Teachers is an advanced e-learning system designed to streamline online education by providing a structured and interactive learning environment. This platform enables students to purchase and access recorded courses, participate in both free and paid assessments, and track their progress through personalized dashboards. By incorporating a role-based management system, teachers, organizers, and administrators can efficiently oversee course content, manage tests, and handle user interactions. One of the key aspects of the platform is its secure payment integration, allowing students to enroll in paid courses with confidence while ensuring safe and seamless transactions. Additionally, the system features automated notifications for class schedules, assignment deadlines, and platform updates, enhancing user engagement and productivity.
description: ABSTHALK is a comprehensive, role-based e-learning platform designed to bridge the gap between traditional and digital education. It provides a centralized hub for students to access high-quality educational content, while offering educators and administrators robust tools for course management, test creation, and performance tracking. The platform emphasizes security, scalability, and user engagement through features like integrated payment gateways, real-time notifications, and intuitive, responsive user interfaces.
problem_statement: Traditional learning methods often lack accessibility, flexibility, and engagement. Existing e-learning platforms frequently suffer from disorganized content, lack of role-based access control, insecure payment methods, absence of real-time notifications, and scalability issues that lead to poor performance and user experience.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a structured, role-based, and interactive web-based platform built with modern technologies (Laravel, AngularJS, MySQL). It introduces a secure payment integration (Stripe), a custom-built notification engine for real-time updates, and a clean, responsive UI to ensure a seamless and scalable learning experience for all user roles.
objectives:
1. Provide interactive educational tools and resources.
2. Enable real-time monitoring and tracking capabilities.
3. Improve system performance and reliability.
4. Optimize resource allocation and task management.
5. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
6. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.

abstract: Agriculture is the most important field in our country and a significant source of income in Egypt. This project introduces an Agriculture Information System designed to support the agricultural sector by providing comprehensive information about crops, their diseases, and modern technological advancements. The system utilizes Machine Learning and AI to diagnose plant diseases by analyzing images of leaves, helping farmers improve crop quality and productivity.
description: The Agriculture Information System is a comprehensive platform aimed at modernizing agricultural practices in Egypt. It serves as an educational and diagnostic tool that provides farmers and agricultural engineers with insights into crop care, disease prevention, and the integration of modern technologies like AI, Data Mining, and IoT. The system features a disease prediction module that identifies plant health issues from leaf images, alongside a knowledge base for crop management.
problem_statement: Agricultural engineers and farmers struggle to keep up with modern technological advancements and face significant difficulties in accurately diagnosing and predicting plant diseases, which negatively impacts crop quality and national agricultural output.
proposed_solution: A web-based information system that integrates AI and Machine Learning to provide accurate agricultural data and automated plant disease detection. The system offers a diagnostic tool for leaf analysis, guidance on modern farming techniques, and information on climate-resilient agricultural practices.

4. Support future scalability and feature expansion.

student_names: Ahmed Mohammed Saeed Mohammed, Ahmed Mohammed Kassem Mohammed, Ahmed Mahmoud Mohammed Mohammed, Adham Ashraf Ebrahim Elganzoury, Khaled Abdelmohsen Sayed Mohammed, Mona Mohammed Hamdy Gomaa, Manar Hamada Elsayed Mahrous, Menna Allah Hesham Eraky
abstract: The realm of virtual communication is experiencing a revolution with the emergence of sophisticated virtual humans. NexTalk, our groundbreaking AI presenter, stands at the forefront of this transformation. By harnessing the power of advanced text-to-speech technology, NexTalk dynamically generates captivating spoken content from any textual input. NexTalk's magic lies in its masterful fusion of Natural Language Processing (NLP) and cutting-edge speech synthesis. This potent blend allows NexTalk to seamlessly transform written text into expressive and coherent spoken dialogue, imbued with natural cadence, intonation, and a range of emotions. Imagine a virtual presenter delivering your message with the perfect blend of authority, warmth, or excitement – NexTalk makes it possible.
description: NexTalk is an innovative AI-driven platform that transforms written text into dynamic, engaging video presentations featuring lifelike virtual avatars. By integrating advanced text-to-speech (TTS) models with real-time facial animation technology, the system synchronizes audio input with avatar expressions to create a realistic and immersive communication experience. The platform is designed for educators, businesses, and content creators to produce high-quality, personalized presentations that bridge language barriers and enhance audience engagement.
problem_statement: Traditional presentation methods are often static, text-heavy, and lack the emotional expressiveness required to maintain audience engagement. Furthermore, human presenters can be costly, and existing text-to-speech solutions often sound robotic and lack the visual synchronization necessary for a truly immersive experience.
proposed_solution: NexTalk provides a comprehensive AI-powered solution that maps text input to natural-sounding speech and synchronizes it with 3D facial animations. The system allows users to customize avatars, supports multiple languages, and provides a user-friendly web interface for creating, editing, and sharing presentations, effectively replacing the need for physical presence in various scenarios.
objectives:
1. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
2. Enhance user experience and usability.
3. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
4. Improve system performance and reliability.
5. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
6. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
7. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
8. Implement modern technologies and best practices.

abstract: Ransomware has become a significant cybersecurity threat in recent years, causing severe disruptions and financial losses for individuals and organizations. To combat this growing menace, this project focuses on developing an AI-based detection system that can identify and classify ransomware with a high level of accuracy. By leveraging deep learning, machine learning techniques, and advanced feature extraction, the project aims to provide an effective solution to mitigate the risks associated with ransomware attacks.
description: The project is a dual-interface system (GUI and Web) designed to detect ransomware. It utilizes an Ada-boost classifier trained on PE header features to identify malicious files with 99% accuracy. The web interface allows users to register and upload files, which are then hashed and checked against the VirusTotal API to provide detailed threat intelligence, including MITRE ATT&CK data.
problem_statement: The increasing prevalence of ransomware attacks, which encrypt user data and demand payment, poses a severe threat to individuals and organizations, necessitating more effective and automated detection methods.
proposed_solution: An AI-driven detection system that uses machine learning (specifically Ada-boost classifiers) to analyze file characteristics (PE headers) and integrates with the VirusTotal API to provide comprehensive threat analysis and classification for both individual files and folders.
objectives:
1. Train and optimize machine learning algorithms.
2. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
3. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
4. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
5. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
6. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.
7. Improve prediction accuracy using machine learning models.
8. Implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms.

abstract: Due to the rapid spread of technology in our lives, it can be used to eliminate the traditional methods of the attendance system by using AI technology to speed up the process of taking attendance. This system aims to achieve this by using computer vision to identify students at the start of each lecture to minimize time wasted and cheating. We used the Haar Cascade algorithm to detect faces and CNN models to classify them, recording attendance in an Excel sheet. Additionally, the system monitors student concentration levels and analyzes facial expressions to gauge understanding and engagement, providing feedback to both students and educators.
description: The project is an AI-powered educational application designed to modernize classroom management. It replaces manual attendance with automated facial recognition, monitors student concentration during lectures, and analyzes facial expressions to assess student engagement and comprehension levels. By leveraging deep learning and computer vision, the system provides educators with data-driven insights to improve the learning environment.
problem_statement: Traditional attendance methods are time-consuming and prone to cheating. Furthermore, educators struggle to assess student engagement, concentration, and understanding in real-time, leading to a lack of actionable data to improve academic performance and learning outcomes.
proposed_solution: A comprehensive system that utilizes a camera to perform real-time facial recognition for automated attendance tracking. The system also employs deep learning models to analyze student facial expressions and concentration levels, providing educators with feedback on student engagement and understanding throughout the lecture.

1. Improve system performance and reliability.

abstract: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) presents a significant global health challenge, with early detection being crucial for effective intervention and management. In this project, we propose a novel approach leveraging Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for the automated detection of Alzheimer's disease from brain MRI images. The CNN model is trained on a dataset comprising MRI scans of both healthy individuals and patients diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease, enabling it to learn distinctive features indicative of the disease.
description: This project develops an AI-driven system for the automated detection and classification of Alzheimer's disease using brain MRI scans. The system utilizes deep learning models (CNNs) to classify images into four categories: mild demented, moderate demented, non-demented, and very mild demented. Additionally, the project includes a web-based application to assist healthcare professionals and caregivers in monitoring patient progress and managing care.
problem_statement: Healthcare professionals face significant challenges in diagnosing and managing Alzheimer's disease, as current diagnostic processes rely on subjective assessments and cognitive tests that are time-consuming and prone to errors. Furthermore, there is a lack of accessible tools for caregivers to monitor the well-being and daily activities of elderly patients.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a robust Alzheimer's detection system leveraging Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to analyze MRI images with high accuracy. The solution includes a web-based platform that integrates the AI model for diagnosis and provides features for caregivers, such as medication reminders, activity tracking, and educational resources to support elderly patients.
objectives:
1. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
2. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
3. Enhance healthcare efficiency and accessibility.
4. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
5. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
6. Improve system performance and reliability.
7. Enhance user experience and usability.
8. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.

abstract: The main objective of this project is to serve the needy people of remote areas of the country with fast and easy health facilities and reduce death-rate. The specific objectives are to provide ambulances to remote areas, provide support to the staffs of medical centers for fast and emergency treatment of patients, and provide necessary basic medical equipment and first aid materials to health centers in the country.
description: The Ambulance Drone project is an integrated system designed to provide rapid emergency medical assistance to remote or hard-to-reach areas. It utilizes a quadcopter drone equipped with GPS and medical supplies, controlled via an Android application and a web interface. The system aims to bridge the gap in emergency response times, which are critical in life-threatening situations like heart attacks, by delivering aid or guidance before traditional ambulances can arrive.
problem_statement: Emergency medical services often face significant delays in reaching remote areas or navigating through traffic, which can be the difference between life and death, especially in time-sensitive cases like heart attacks where fatalities can occur within minutes.
proposed_solution: A drone-based delivery and communication system that can fly at speeds up to 100 km/h to reach patients quickly. The drone is equipped with GPS for navigation, a camera for live streaming to a control room, and is controlled via an Android app and web interface to provide immediate medical support and deliver first aid materials.
objectives:
1. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
2. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
3. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
4. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
5. Enhance healthcare efficiency and accessibility.

abstract: With the technological development that we have reached at the present time, communication has become easy among the general public, and it was worth doing this to use this communication in learning, so communication between the Teacher, students and parents in order to receive different sciences has become an imperative and this is what we seek to achieve through our project that aims To achieve communication using both websites, and accordingly the idea arose to achieve this for our school.
description: This project is an E-Learning platform designed to facilitate communication and educational resource sharing between teachers, students, and parents. It provides a centralized web-based environment where teachers can upload lessons (videos and documents), create assignments, and track student grades, while students can access materials, submit assignments, and communicate with teachers, and parents can monitor their children's academic progress.
problem_statement: The COVID-19 pandemic forced students to stay at home, highlighting the lack of dedicated platforms for educational material delivery. Teachers were forced to rely on social media for sharing content, which is disorganized and difficult for students to access, leading to challenges in tracking student progress, managing assignments, and maintaining effective communication between stakeholders.
proposed_solution: A dedicated, centralized web-based E-Learning platform that provides a structured environment for teachers to upload educational content, manage assignments, and grade students. The system includes specific interfaces for students to access learning materials and for parents to track their children's performance, ensuring a streamlined and efficient educational process.

2. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.

project_title: An Intelligent System for Assessing Student Participation and Interaction
student_names: Hossam Elsayed Mohamed Fakher, Khaled Emad-El-Din, Abdallah Hesham Abdallah, Zain-Elabdeen Khaled, Alshimaa Mahmoud Abdelghafar, Shimaa Maher Ahmed
abstract: In the modern era, different universities keep track of student attendance using face recognition verification system or manually. Attendance management is a daunting and important task. In this documentation, we focus on proposing a smart attendance management system based on facial recognition and also focuses on the student's participation during the lecture and checks whether the student is wearing a mask or not. We develop a mobile application for it to be used by both the student and the lecturer, where the student uses it to see the percentage of his attendance and participation in the lectures, and the lecturer can see reports on all the students. The system will register students and accept student attendance using this smart ID card, keeping all records for subsequent operations in the backend using the database.
description: This project is a mobile-based intelligent attendance and participation tracking system that utilizes facial recognition technology. It aims to replace traditional, time-consuming manual attendance methods with an automated, secure, and efficient biometric solution that monitors student presence and engagement throughout the duration of a lecture.
problem_statement: Traditional attendance systems are time-consuming, prone to errors, and suffer from the issue of students leaving lectures early after marking their initial attendance, leading to a loss of educational value and inaccurate data.
proposed_solution: A mobile application integrated with a facial recognition backend that tracks student attendance and participation in real-time. The system uses biometric identification to ensure secure check-ins and check-outs, monitors mask compliance, and provides automated reporting for lecturers and attendance tracking for students.
objectives:
1. Enable real-time monitoring and tracking capabilities.
2. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
3. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
4. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
5. Improve system performance and reliability.
6. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
7. Improve workflow and management efficiency.

project_title: Android Based Visual Product Identification For Visually Impaired People
student_names: Abdelaziz Ibrahim Abdelaziz Wahman, Abdelrahman Ahmed Fekry Hussein, Abdelfattah Samy Abdelfattah Mohamed, Abdelrahim Fathy Abdelrahim Gabr, Ahmed Mohamed Abdelhamed Eid, Mahitab Atef Mohamed Osman
abstract: Many of the visually impaired people face many problems while purchasing products such as difficult to distinguish between the products and identifying the product details to be purchased in terms of product name, product price and expiration date and etc. Therefore, Our System is developed to make the life of visually impaired people easy. We have developed an android mobile application system based on mobile camera to scan the barcode behind the image and read the description of the product with the help of Id stored in the barcode, And voice recognition to interact with the system. In general, System can be app on any device with camera as : Mobile, Drones, Robots and Smart Glasses. At present we used the mobile camera to develop our system, All the user needs to do is capture the image on the product in the mobile phone which then resolves the barcode which means it scans the image to find out the Id stored, then it will read the details of product like name, description, price and expiry date. Our system was not limited to knowing the product data, we provided it with many features to help the visually impaired in particular as well such as : Map : Visually Impaired people can locate the nearest supermarket to go and locate their locations if they can not know where they are. Emergency : Visually Impaired people can call the emergency number (It could be the number of a relative or a friend close to him) when they get into trouble. Electronic Payment : When Visually Impaired people decide to buy any product they can pay via electronic wallet. The proposed application can also be implemented in any shopping center, supermarket, bookstores, medical stores, etc.
description: According to the Globe Health Organization, there are around 253 million folks live with vision impairment, 36 million are blind and 217 million have moderate to severe vision impairment. The system facilitates knowledge sharing, allowing users to view, create, save, and edit code snippets while fostering a community-driven environment for mobile application development.

abstract: The Antivirus Project is a comprehensive cybersecurity solution meticulously crafted to ensure users enjoy seamless interaction while being shielded against a multitude of malware threats. Utilizing advanced techniques such as signature-based detection, behavioural analysis, and real-time scanning, the system adeptly identifies and neutralizes potential threats. Beyond traditional scanning of files and URLs, the project boasts sophisticated features like file encryption and decryption, fostering a secure environment for data management. The integration of a user-friendly chatbot elevates the user experience by promptly addressing queries and providing valuable insights. We are committed to prioritizing the implementation of a sexual content blocker and a password manager within the project timeline, with a contingency plan to address them in the future if necessary. This strategic approach fortifies the user's digital defence, encouraging a proactive stance toward online security. In essence, the Antivirus Project not only safeguards user devices but also empowers users with knowledge to enhance their own cybersecurity.
description: BugsBunny is a desktop-based antivirus application designed to provide comprehensive protection against malware. It combines signature-based, behavior-based, and heuristic analysis to detect threats. The application includes a sandbox environment for analyzing suspicious files, file encryption/decryption tools, and an integrated chatbot for user support and security guidance. It is designed with a user-friendly interface, specifically targeting the Arabic-speaking region.
problem_statement: The persistent threat posed by malware to computer systems, networks, and data, which can lead to compromised system integrity, unauthorized access, data breaches, financial losses, and operational downtime.
proposed_solution: A robust, user-friendly desktop antivirus application named 'BugsBunny' that utilizes multi-layered detection (signature, behavior, heuristic), real-time monitoring, sandbox analysis, and additional security features like file encryption and a support chatbot.
objectives:
1. Enhance system security and protect sensitive user data.
2. Enhance user experience and usability.
3. Optimize resource allocation and task management.
4. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
5. Generate accurate analytical insights and visualizations.

abstract: The Popularity of mobile phones devices is growing so fast. These mobile devices represent a new generation of technology tools that provide access to content, and they are used by adults and young children. Due to that growing market of mobile devices it leads to use it in various ways in our daily lives one of these ways in learning filed and there's a very big growth in educational applications that is used in improvement of the educational process and it made a very big impact role in the early days because of the pandemic of the corona virus which leads the students to stay at home and these applications used as a channel for the teachers to communicate with their students and don't stop the learning process. In our application system for distance learning the applications provide an excellent way for students to use it in their educational life with a simpler way to access their study materials and watching educational videos for making their studying very easy and fun with more simpler in understanding their subjects with graphical videos to illustrate the topic in a more helpful way and help the students with difficulty in learning to improve their level, after each video in any topic we provide questions to test the students understanding supported with pictures and there is also questions supported with voice in another way. In our application we give the teachers an easy way for observing and supervising their students learning process, it enables the teachers to creating video rooms with chatting options to give them an easy way for connecting with their students and uploading videos with a brief note to help the students to study their subjects and it helps them a lot in interacting directly with their students without any difficulty.
description: When the student enters the application, he is asked to enter his initial data to create his own account, and then he enters the main page, where he looks at general information about subjects that he wants to learn and practice on them, and then he can watch videos about any subject he wants with an illustrative way and more simpler, and after he finish the videos on some topic he can solve the questions on that lesson to test his knowledge and understanding, after that he can download the study materials of his teacher to revise them at any time he wants, our application gives the teacher a very easy way for interacting with his student and know his educational level and his knowledge, the teacher can support him with videos to help him in his learning difficulties to overcome it.
problem_statement: Traditional educational systems often face limitations regarding accessibility, rigid scheduling, and the inability to provide personalized support for students with diverse learning needs. Furthermore, the rapid evolution of knowledge requires a dynamic platform that allows for continuous updates and effective monitoring of student progress by both teachers and parents.
proposed_solution: The proposed application provides a comprehensive distance learning platform that enables students to access study materials, watch illustrative educational videos, and complete interactive assessments at their own pace. It facilitates seamless communication between teachers and students through video rooms and chat features, while providing tools for teachers to monitor student performance and offer targeted support to overcome specific learning difficulties.

project_title: Aqar Broker: E-Commerce & Decision Support System
student_names: Ahmed Alaa Eldin Hassan, Ahmed Kamal Ahmed, Omar Yasser Hamed, Mashhour Seif Elnasr Abdallah, Michael Maher Fekry, Mostafa Ahmed Mohamed
abstract: The real estate market is one of the strongest economic areas and must keep pace with current technology. We decided to contribute to this sector by facilitating the process of selling, buying, and renting residential units throughout Egypt. Our application provides a convenient and direct environment for both sellers and buyers. Additionally, we aim to introduce an electronic platform to help people navigate the new administrative capital, providing a safe way to make decisions about buying residential units in this emerging city.
description: Aqar Broker is a mobile application designed to streamline the real estate market by connecting buyers, sellers, and renters. Users create accounts to access information about residential units, neighborhoods, and investment opportunities. The system includes a recommendation engine to help users find properties that match their budget and preferences, specifically focusing on the new administrative capital in Egypt.
problem_statement: The current real estate market suffers from a lack of transparency, fraudulent dealings, and bias between buyers and sellers. Furthermore, there is a lack of accessible information regarding new urban developments like the new administrative capital, making it difficult for users to make informed investment or housing decisions.
proposed_solution: A mobile-based E-Commerce and Decision Support System that acts as an intermediary to eliminate the need for human brokers. The platform provides a secure environment for property transactions, offers personalized recommendations based on user budget, and serves as a comprehensive guide for residential units in new cities.
objectives:
1. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
2. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
3. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
4. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
5. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
6. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
7. Enhance user experience and usability.

project_title: Artificial Intelligence Driver Behavior Based on Deep Learning
student_names: Salma Abdallah, Mahmoud Hassan, Salma Nasser, Laila Ibrahim
abstract: Driver behaviours have a lot of effects in many fields. The bad driver has a negative impact on safety for the human soul if this person was another drive or a passer. Also, in the economy. The bad driver damages cars or buses. And he reduces its life span Which means a lot of cost for the Maintece and the replacement. And for the environment, destroyed cars and its parts are a big problem for its recycling or at least Get rid of it. Our idea aims to measure driver behaviour based on artificial intelligence (AI), to provide a fair rating for companies to track drivers' behaviours to save human souls and preserve the life of their cars. This leads to preserving the environment
description: A driver behavior is the set of actions performs to ensure both the safety of people and compliance to the driving regulations obviously, safety and compliance imply speed limits being respected. Driver behavior is one of the most important aspects in the design, development, and application of Advanced Driving Assistance Systems and Intelligent Transportation Systems, and is an aspect you need to monitor as part of risk assessment and in an attempt to cut costs. If you are able to measure the driving style of your staf, there is a lot of actions you can take in order to improve fleet safety, global road safety as well as fuel efficiency and emissions. Driver behavior strongly impacts traffic security and causes the vast majority of motor vehicle accidents. Driver behavior adaptations might increase overall security and lessen vehicle fuel and gas emissions. In this context, driver behavior profiling tries to better understand and potentially improve driver behavior, leveraging a safer and more energy aware driving. Driver monitoring and analysis or driver behavior profiling is the process of automatically collecting driving data (e.g., speed, acceleration, breaking, steering, location) and applying a computational model to them in order to generate a safety score for the driver. Driving data collection may be achieved by several kinds of sensors. Evaluating and following up the driver will reduce the number of accidents and traffic crises
problem_statement: The absence of a dedicated digital system for analyzing driver behavior using artificial intelligence and deep learning limits the ability to monitor driving patterns accurately and efficiently. Traditional methods are often inefficient, time-consuming, and unable to provide real-time insights, making it difficult to track, manage, and analyze driver behavior data effectively.

2. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
3. Implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms.
4. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
5. Enhance system security and protect sensitive user data.
6. Support future scalability and feature expansion.

project_title: Artificial Intelligence Techniques in Brain Stroke Detection Using Medical Images
student_names: Osama Fayez Abdelkhalik, Amany Mohamed Saber, Enas Mohamed Askar, Mohamed Ramadan Abdelhakam, Nadiya Hosny Elsayed, Yasmeen Mohamed Awwad
abstract: Brain stroke, a leading cause of death and disability worldwide, necessitates early detection and timely intervention to improve patient outcomes. This project, "Artificial Intelligence Techniques in Brain Stroke Detection Using Medical Images, " aims to leverage advanced machine learning and deep learning techniques to develop a robust system for the accurate identification of brain strokes from medical scans. The project integrates several key components, including extensive data preprocessing and the implementation of various models such as Decision Tree, Random Forest, KNN, and deep learning architectures like 3D CNN, 2D CNN, and ResNet152, with the latter achieving an accuracy of 22%. The system also incorporates a comprehensive user interface for stakeholders to manage appointments and diagnostic reports, aiming to reduce dependency on manual interpretation by radiologists.
description: The project is a comprehensive medical informatics system designed to automate the detection of brain strokes using AI. It combines deep learning-based image analysis (specifically ResNet152) with a management platform that handles patient appointments, diagnostic reports, and communication between healthcare providers and patients. The goal is to streamline the diagnostic workflow and provide timely care in resource-constrained settings.
problem_statement: In Egypt, the shortage of radiologists and limited availability of specialized diagnostic centers lead to significant delays in diagnosing and treating brain stroke patients, which is a time-critical medical emergency.
proposed_solution: The team developed an integrated system that uses deep learning models (ResNet152) to analyze medical scans for stroke detection, combined with a web-based management platform to facilitate appointment booking, report sharing, and efficient communication between doctors and patients.
objectives:
1. Enhance healthcare efficiency and accessibility.
2. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
3. Provide efficient data analysis and reporting features.
4. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
5. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
6. Improve patient monitoring and healthcare management.
7. Optimize resource allocation and task management.
8. Improve workflow and management efficiency.

abstract: Online Assessment System forms the lifeline of the Educational Institutes to the functioning of the Examination. It is very essential for an Institute to handle the Examinations and their results. It is very useful for an Institute to test its students continuously for their development. This system is helpful for conducting (M.C) Multiple Choice Examinations which can be conducted regularly as well as for surprise tests and provides immediate results saving the precious time of faculties to check the papers and prepare mark sheets. The Online Assessment System will include various Courses (IT, Commerce, Science... etc.) and subjects for conducting examinations. This system helps in conducting examinations quickly and can thus help in saving time and the operations will be carried out efficiently. With the effective use, any Institute can apply the Online Assessment System for conducting quick examinations and getting better results in less time.
description: E-learning offers practical and cost effective ways for higher education institutions as well as academic institutes to manage the delivery of education over the web and manage managerial / administrative aspects of education at the same time. If done right, it can produce great results by decreasing costs and improving performance. Also, unlike a one time classroom session, the e learning course is available for others. This includes the static eLearning course as well as any ongoing conversations in networked communities.
problem_statement: Traditional examination processes are time-consuming for faculty members, requiring significant manual effort to grade papers and prepare mark sheets. Furthermore, conventional classroom-based testing lacks the flexibility to provide immediate feedback and continuous assessment opportunities for students.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an Online Assessment System designed to streamline the examination process for educational institutions. By automating the delivery and grading of multiple-choice examinations, the system saves faculty time, enables continuous student development through regular and surprise testing, and provides immediate results.

project_title: Assistive Tool for Patient Medical Record Management
student_names: Milad Atef Micheal, Mohga Soliman Emam, Mostafa Mahmoud Hassan, Mostafa Morsy Ismail Salama
abstract: This project is an assistive tool designed to simplify medical record management and patient monitoring. By utilizing a smartwatch to collect vital signs such as heart rate, blood pressure, and calories burned, the system transmits data to the cloud. This information is accessible via a mobile application and a website, allowing doctors to monitor patients remotely. The system includes an emergency alert feature that notifies doctors and ambulances in case of sudden health changes or accidents, ensuring timely medical intervention.
description: The project provides a comprehensive platform for tracking patient vitals and health data in real-time. It bridges the gap between patients and doctors by providing a centralized cloud-based database. The system is designed to be cost-effective, requiring only a smartwatch and a free account on the platform to access services, thereby removing financial barriers to quality health monitoring.
problem_statement: A significant percentage of the population suffers from chronic conditions requiring constant monitoring, and many sudden deaths occur due to the inability to reach patients in time during medical emergencies. Existing medical monitoring solutions are often expensive and inaccessible to the general public.
proposed_solution: A low-cost, integrated IoT solution consisting of a smartwatch for continuous vital sign tracking, a cloud-based database for storing medical records, and a web/mobile interface for doctors and relatives to monitor patient health and receive automated emergency alerts.
objectives:
1. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
2. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.
3. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
4. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
5. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
6. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
7. Enhance user experience and usability.
8. Improve tracking accuracy and operational visibility.

student_names: Osama Mahmoud Abdelkhalek, Ahmed Mohamed AbdelTawab, Eslam Elsayed AbdelAleem, Mohamed Sobhy Ayesh, Asmaa Yassin Helmy, Arwa Abdel Azim Mohamed, Hossam Mahmoud AbdelHady, Ahmed Adel Hassan
abstract: This project presents a specialized educational application designed to support children with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) by addressing core challenges in executive functioning and sensory processing. By implementing a structured, customizable, and simplified user interface, the system provides a supportive environment for learning foundational skills, including literacy, vocabulary, and sentence construction. The platform aims to empower children to express themselves effectively through unconventional, technology-driven educational methods.
description: The project is an educational application tailored for children with Autism Spectrum Disorder, focusing on three progressive stages of learning: letter recognition and pronunciation, vocabulary building, and sentence formation. To ensure accessibility, the system incorporates features that mitigate sensory overload, such as adjustable sound and visual settings, and addresses executive functioning challenges through step-by-step task management, visual organizers, and timers. The platform serves as a comprehensive tool to facilitate communication and educational development in a user-friendly, non-overwhelming digital space.
problem_statement: Executive Functioning Challenges: Autistic children may experience difficulties with executive functions, such as planning, organizing, and managing tasks. Complex or overwhelming interfaces, multi-step instructions, or lack of structure may hinder their ability to navigate technology applications effectively. 11 - Sensory Overload: Autistic children may be sensitive to sensory stimuli, such as bright lights, loud sounds, or crowded interfaces. This can cause discomfort or overwhelm them while using technology.
proposed_solution: Solution: Simplify the user interface and provide clear, step-by-step instructions. Break down complex tasks into smaller, manageable steps and provide visual cues or prompts to guide the user through the process. Incorporate visual organizers, checklists, or timers to help with task management and organization within the application. Solution: Provide customization options within the application to allow users to adjust settings according to their sensory preferences. This may include options to reduce visual stimuli, adjust sound levels, or provide a simplified interface. Additionally, consider incorporating features like visual schedules or timers to help manage time and transitions within the application.
objectives:
1. Enhance user experience and usability.
2. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
3. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
4. Provide interactive educational tools and resources.
5. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
6. Improve workflow and management efficiency.

abstract: An automatic attendance management system using biometrics would provide the needed solution . the results showed improved performance over manual attendance management system . Biometric-based techniques have emerged as the most promising option for recognizing individuals in recent years since, instead of authenticating people and granting them access to physical and virtual domains based on passwords, smart cards . Biometric based technologies include identification based on physiological characteristics . Face recognition appears to offer several advantages over other biometric methods.
description: The face is the identity of a person, the methods to exploit this physical feature have seen a great change since the advent of image processing techniques. The attendance is taken in every schools, colleges and library. traditional approach for attendance is professor calls student name & record attendance. student_names: Abeer Abd El-hameed Abd-rabo, Ahmed Magdy Saber, Asmaa Atef Hasaneen, Ayman Mohamed Elbery, Ibrahim Mohamed El-sayed, Mohamed Magdy Abd El-shafy
abstract: The movie industry has long perfected advertising its movies. In order to inform audiences about an upcoming movie and to attract it, short previews are presented in cinema or TV - the "movie trailers". A branch of Hollywood's film industry has specialized in trailer production. This process of creating a trailer has always been determined by manual editing of video and audio. Generating a movie trailer is a complex process and takes a lot of time, so we have used Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques to generate an automatic trailer by extracting the most important scenes in the movie depending on the movie genre. Making an automatic trailer like the people do now is an open issue and a lot of researchers wrote many papers in this field, some of them using image processing techniques, video semantics, audio processing, but we try to take a step in this field using Natural Language Processing (NLP) to do the best.
description: The project aims to automate the creation of movie trailers by analyzing movie subtitles. Instead of relying on manual video editing or complex image/audio processing, the system uses NLP techniques to classify subtitle text and extract unique keywords. These keywords are used to build a text graph based on the TextRank algorithm to identify the most important scenes in a movie, allowing for the automatic generation of a trailer without human interaction.
problem_statement: Building movie trailers similar to those generated by humans is an open issue. Current methods often rely on complex image, video, or audio processing, while neglecting the importance of text, and the full understanding of 'movie grammar' remains limited by current scientific progress.
proposed_solution: The project proposes using Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques to understand subtitles, classify text, and extract unique keywords. By applying the TextRank algorithm to these keywords, the system constructs a text graph to identify and assemble the most important scenes from a movie to produce a trailer automatically.

1. Improve system performance and reliability.

abstract: As cities continue to grow and evolve, the demand for flexible and convenient housing solutions has never been greater. The project aims to meet this demand by offering a range of thoughtfully designed rental properties tailored to the needs of diverse lifestyles and demographics. By leveraging technology to streamline the rental process, the project enhances security and improves overall convenience for residents through online leasing and payment platforms.
description: BEYOUT is a comprehensive rental platform designed to bridge the gap between landlords and tenants. It provides a centralized system for property listings, virtual tours, and secure communication. The platform integrates advanced search filters, robust verification processes to ensure listing legitimacy, and digital tools for lease management and rent collection, creating a transparent and efficient rental experience.
problem_statement: Traditional rental methods are inefficient, time-consuming, and lack transparency. Prospective tenants face challenges in finding legitimate listings, verifying property quality, and comparing options, while landlords struggle with managing tenant inquiries, scheduling viewings, and handling administrative tasks like background checks and lease agreements.
proposed_solution: The BEYOUT platform offers a centralized, user-friendly application that integrates advanced search capabilities, virtual tours, and secure digital lease management. It incorporates robust verification processes to prevent scams and provides landlords with automated tools for tenant communication, background checks, and rent collection, ensuring a secure and streamlined experience for all parties.

abstract: The BFCI Student Portal is designed to provide the latest news and information for stakeholders at the Faculty of Computers and Informatics (BFCI), Benha University, including professors, students, administration, and student affairs. The system addresses the challenges students face in accessing faculty news, schedules, event times, and academic results, which were previously only available via physical boards. By providing a centralized, accessible web portal, the system ensures efficient information flow, saves students time and effort, and serves as a convenient channel for announcements and academic materials.
description: The BFCI Student Portal is a web-based information system developed to bridge the communication gap between the faculty administration, professors, and students. It acts as a centralized hub where administrators can manage users, professors can upload materials and create posts, and student affairs can publish schedules and results. The platform is designed to be accessible anytime and anywhere, providing a modern, digital alternative to traditional physical notice boards.
problem_statement: Students frequently struggle to access critical faculty information such as lecture schedules, exam results, event announcements, and summer training details. The reliance on physical notice boards is inefficient, especially for students living far from the faculty, and often leads to missed opportunities or lack of awareness regarding important academic updates.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a web-based portal that serves as a centralized, digital communication channel. It allows for role-based access for admins, professors, students, and student affairs, enabling the real-time dissemination of news, schedules, and academic materials, thereby streamlining information flow and improving accessibility for all stakeholders.

abstract: The Bilingual project addresses the persistent barrier of language differences in global communication by developing a modern chat application that facilitates seamless interaction between users of different nationalities. By integrating real-time automatic translation, the system enables individuals to communicate in their native languages, thereby fostering cross-cultural connections and information exchange. This project aims to bridge the gap between advanced technological connectivity and the fundamental human need for effective, multilingual communication in the 21st century.
description: Immediate communication between different people of different nationalities and languages has been the center of our concern and the thing that drove us to search and look for real solutions that when applied, can make a real difference in human communication.
problem_statement: It must have happened that you want to talk to a person from another country for some reason but you can't speak the language of that person, you have no idea about that language, barely know a few words or rather no words at all! This is a serious matter especially when we're living in the 21st century where everything is connected, you can find information on any subject, anywhere and in anytime only by going online, you can be where you are now and miraculously witness second by second a live event on the other side of the world! Humans have landed on the Moon and currently exploring Mars, but how can we be at that level of scientific knowledge and technological advance while we are struggling to speak other people's languages? Connect to them? Share information on different aspects of life? Build friendships and/or perhaps relationships?!
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a specialized chat application that incorporates an automatic translation engine to bridge language gaps in real-time. By allowing users to send messages in their native language while the recipient receives them in their own, the application eliminates the need for manual translation or fluency in a foreign language. This approach ensures that users can build friendships, share information, and engage in meaningful dialogue regardless of their linguistic background.

abstract: We all suffer from violations daily, but it's hard for us to report them for several reasons and this causes the repetition of this violation and the increase of negative effects caused by this. Thus, we thought about a solution to limit violations using cell phones and our application was the idea. Blaghaty is an application that allows citizens to report any violation they see at any place and time whatever the violation is whether: Traffic, Environmental ... etc. This is done by: Taking a photo of the violation, writing out it. The location of the violation will be directed to the competent authorities to deal with it after confirming the validity of the violation.
description: Blaghaty is a mobile application designed to empower citizens to report various types of violations, such as traffic or environmental issues, in real-time. By leveraging mobile technology and AI-driven conversational interfaces (Dialogflow), the app streamlines the reporting process, allowing users to submit photos and descriptions of violations, which are then routed to the appropriate authorities for verification and action.
problem_statement: Citizens face significant difficulties in reporting daily violations due to complex or inaccessible reporting channels, leading to the persistence and repetition of these violations and negative societal impacts.
proposed_solution: A user-friendly mobile application (Android/iOS) that enables citizens to easily report violations by capturing photos and providing descriptions, which are then processed and forwarded to relevant authorities for validation and resolution.
objectives:
1. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
2. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
3. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
4. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
5. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
6. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
7. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.

student_names: Ehab Samir Emam Emam, Ayman Khaled Abo Elghiet, Abdulrhman Mohamed Abdeldaiem, Gamal Elsayed Shaban, Ahmed Sabry Elsayed
abstract: This project presents Blood Share, a system designed to assist individuals in need of blood by allowing them to publish their condition and request donations. The system facilitates communication between donors and those in need through an integrated chat feature. The project includes both an Android application and a web portal, providing a comprehensive solution for managing blood requests, donor coordination, and administrative reporting.
description: Blood Share is a dual-platform system consisting of an Android mobile application for users and a web-based management interface for administrators. It streamlines the process of requesting blood, finding donors, and managing medical data. The system ensures data integrity and efficient communication, replacing traditional, paper-based methods of blood donation coordination.
problem_statement: The traditional method of requesting blood is inefficient, relying on manual communication and paper-based records. This leads to difficulties in locating donors, managing blood type requirements, tracking the location of injured persons, and maintaining data integrity, often resulting in critical delays during emergencies.
proposed_solution: The project provides an Android application for users to post and respond to blood requests, and a web-based administrative dashboard to manage users, requests, and generate reports. The system uses a centralized database hosted on Hostinger, connected via web services, to ensure real-time synchronization between the mobile app and the web portal.
objectives:
1. Improve workflow and management efficiency.
2. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
3. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
4. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
5. Enhance user experience and usability.
6. Implement modern technologies and best practices.

project_title: Building DSS with data warehouse for scientific researchers
student_names: Amr Hamdy Abd elwahab El-Kotory, Hassan Ibrahim Mohamed Omran, Mohamed Ahmed Abd Rabo Ahmed, Salah Salem Salem El-Dahshan, Eslam Ayman Mohamed Meselhy
abstract: The scientific researcher is basically based on one of the most highly scientific field of Google Corporation called google scholar which concerns to collect all scientific researches, articles, journals from academic researchers enrolled in different universities all over the world. All of these researches available online with citation for every research and all citation for each researcher there are many organizations depend on google scholar to rank work of all universities that have verified mail on google scholar. Our mission was to find a suitable method using Python language to extract all data of any university from Google Scholar using verified mail of university and build our own huge data warehouse that enable us to rank work of university and faculties that we need, provide reports help decision makers to achieve performance of these faculties that reflect positively on performance of university and obtain strength and weakness points, evolution, expectations and recommendations of the publishing and scientific operation of different universities.
description: This project involves the development of a Decision Support System (DSS) integrated with a data warehouse to analyze and rank academic institutions based on scientific research output. By leveraging web scraping techniques to extract data from Google Scholar, the system aggregates publication and citation metrics to provide actionable insights for university decision-makers regarding research performance and institutional ranking.
problem_statement: Extracting decision support reports at the university or national levels is difficult, as it requires browsing thousands of webpages to gather important data. Current ranking systems often suffer from inaccuracies, such as the 'bubble HEI' phenomenon, where rankings are skewed by a small number of highly-cited researchers, leading to false ratings of Higher Education Institutions.
proposed_solution: The project proposes building a dedicated data warehouse that utilizes Python-based web scraping to collect comprehensive publication and citation data from Google Scholar. This data is then processed to generate objective decision support reports that evaluate university performance, track research evolution, and provide a more accurate ranking mechanism compared to existing webometric indicators.
objectives:
1. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
2. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
3. Enhance user experience and usability.
4. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
5. Implement modern technologies and best practices.

project_title: BUS PLUS: An intelligent Transportation mobile application
student_names: Abdelrahman Alaa Abdelsatar, Abdulhakim Abdulrazak Abdulhakim, Habiba Hesham Elsharkawy, Mazen Shawky Abdelsadek, Nouran Mohamed Saad Eldin, Reem Mohamed Abdelnaby
abstract: Bus Plus application is an intelligent transportation mobile application that cooperates with government buses. It helps passengers in locating them then by selecting the station they are in and the station they will go to, the application starts to give information about (what the bus number that will pass the same direction is). With those abilities the application can facilitate public transportation for people and blind people. When the user chooses that he is one of the blind people, the application starts to read every single line by voice to make the user fill the required information in an easy manner.
description: Bus Plus is a mobile application designed to modernize public transportation by providing real-time bus tracking and route information. It specifically addresses the needs of the general public and visually impaired users by offering a voice-guided interface to help them identify the correct buses and stations, thereby reducing travel delays and navigation errors.
problem_statement: Public buses often lack reliable schedules and clear stop information, leading to delays and uncertainty for passengers. Additionally, existing transportation applications are not optimized for visually impaired users, who struggle to navigate public transit systems independently.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an intelligent mobile application that utilizes GPS technology to track bus locations in real-time. It allows users to input their current station and destination to receive accurate bus arrival information, with a dedicated voice-command and text-to-speech interface to ensure accessibility for blind users.
objectives:
1. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
2. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
3. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
4. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
5. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
6. Improve system performance and reliability.

project_title: Car Security System [Raspberry Pi, PHP, Android]
student_names: Ahmed Raafat Abd El-Zaher, Ahmed Yousry Abd El-Satar, Amany Youssef Hassan, Fawzeya Rashed Abd El-Hamid, Reham Khaled, Sarah Yacoub Fahmy, Zienab Abd El-Naser Mohamed
abstract: The Car Security System is an integrated anti-theft solution designed to enhance vehicle safety through real-time monitoring and remote control. By leveraging the Raspberry Pi platform, the system provides GPS tracking, engine control, and sensor-based alerts, allowing owners to monitor their vehicle's status and location via a mobile interface. This project aims to provide a cost-effective and user-friendly alternative to existing commercial vehicle tracking services.
description: This project is an embedded system designed for vehicle security and tracking. It utilizes a Raspberry Pi as the central processing unit, connected to various sensors (PIR, switches) and a camera to detect unauthorized access. The system communicates with an Android mobile application, allowing users to track the vehicle's location, receive alerts, and remotely control vehicle functions such as engine ignition or door locks.
problem_statement: Vehicle theft is a persistent criminal issue. Existing anti-theft solutions are often expensive or lack comprehensive features, leaving vehicle owners with limited options for effective, real-time monitoring and remote intervention in the event of a theft.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a low-cost, integrated embedded system based on the Raspberry Pi. It combines GPS tracking, mobile connectivity, and sensor integration to provide a comprehensive security suite that allows users to track their vehicle, receive instant notifications, and remotely disable the engine or monitor the interior via a mobile application.
objectives:
1. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
2. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
3. Improve tracking accuracy and operational visibility.
4. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
5. Enhance system security and protect sensitive user data.

project_title: Care System for the small Breeder
student_names: Sherif Farouk Esmail Mohamed, Ahmed Farag Anwar Mohamed, Ahmed Hesham Abdelmaksoud, Ahmed Abdallah Mohamed, Ahmed Yasser Abo Elamaim, Ahmed Mossad Mohamed
abstract: This project addresses the challenges faced by small ruminant breeders in Egypt, such as high feed costs, disease outbreaks, and a lack of expert information. By developing an integrated website and mobile application, the system provides breeders with reliable information on optimal feeding, breeding methods, and care techniques. The project aims to improve the economic viability of small-scale breeding operations and contribute to the broader agricultural and economic reform in Egypt.
description: The Care System for the small Breeder is an integrated information system designed to support small-scale livestock farmers. It provides a platform for managing sheep and goat breeding, offering guidance on feeding, health management, and technical/economic evaluation to help breeders optimize their operations and increase profitability.
problem_statement: Small sheep and goat breeders suffer from high feed costs, frequent disease outbreaks, lack of access to expert information, and insufficient financial resources, which leads to low returns and hinders the development of the livestock sector.
proposed_solution: An integrated information system consisting of a website and a mobile application that provides breeders with expert knowledge, optimal feeding strategies based on animal age and goals, and technical/economic evaluation tools to improve breeding outcomes.

abstract: This project is specially developed to make it easy for traffic officers to catch traffic violation car plate numbers by taking photos of the car, extracting the plate from the natural complex image, and storing the result and the type of traffic violation in a database. The main objective is to design a computer-based system which can automatically detect the plate of the car using OCR and ANN technologies.
description: The project is an Automatic Number Plate Recognition (ANPR) system designed for mobile devices. It utilizes image processing techniques to capture vehicle images, detect the license plate area, segment the characters, and recognize them using Artificial Neural Networks (ANN) and Optical Character Recognition (OCR) to assist traffic authorities in identifying traffic violations.
problem_statement: Manual identification of traffic violations and license plate numbers by traffic officers is inefficient and prone to human error, especially in complex natural environments.
proposed_solution: An automated mobile-based ANPR system that captures vehicle images, processes them to isolate the license plate, and uses OCR and ANN algorithms to accurately extract and store plate information for traffic management.

student_names: Mahmoud Ashraf, Karim Mahmoud
abstract: Recent technological advancements have paved the way for innovative approaches in uroscience and cognitive analysis, particularly in stress detection and mental health assessment. This study proposes a Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) utilizing Electroencephalography (EEG) and machine learning algorithms to classify stress levels in real-time. The research focuses on analyzing EEG signals from the prefrontal cortex (PFC), a key region involved in emotional regulation and cognitive processing. Stress is induced using a controlled experiment based on the Montreal Imaging Stress Task (MIST), incorporating time pressure and negative feedback. EEG data is recorded using the Emotive EpocX headset, capturing key frequency bands (Alpha, Beta, and Theta waves) that indicate stresS responses. This system enables real-time monitoring of cognitive and emotional states, facilitating early detection of stress, which is crucial for individuals experiencing high cognitive loads. Moreover, the integration of AI-driven EEG analysis in stress research opens new avenues for developing personalized mental health solutions, neuroadaptive interfaces, and continuous stress monitoring systems. By leveraging EEG and machine learning, this research contributes to the advancement of neurotechnology applications in mental well- being, workplace productivity, and clinical stress management
description: Cereboscan is an intelligent neurotechnology system designed to monitor and analyze stress levels using Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) technology, Electroencephalography (EEG), and machine learning techniques. The system focuses on capturing and processing brain signals from the prefrontal cortex to identify cognitive and emotional stress responses in real time. By utilizing EEG frequency bands such as Alpha, Beta, and Theta waves, the platform provides accurate stress classification and continuous cognitive state monitoring. The proposed solution aims to support mental health assessment, improve stress management, and enable the development of personalized neuroadaptive systems for healthcare, workplace productivity, and cognitive research applications.
problem_statement: The absence of a dedicated digital system for Cereboscan reduces the efficiency of data processing, analysis, and monitoring operations. abstract: Staying motivated is hard to do alone, so this group challenge application for web users is the first stage. What makes our app unique is that it allows users to create their own challenges with specific goals and invite friends to join. The main problem addressed is the lack of motivation and accountability when working alone. The application enables users to create challenges, track progress, and share moments with friends, fostering a supportive environment to achieve personal and group goals.
description: Challenge Yourself is a comprehensive platform designed to help individuals and groups achieve their goals through social accountability and structured tracking. It provides tools for users to define challenges, invite others, track progress, and maintain motivation through a social network-like interface. The system includes features for real-time communication, progress monitoring, and collaborative goal setting.
problem_statement: Individuals often struggle to stay motivated in their daily lives and fail to complete tasks due to a lack of external participation, accountability, and support from others.
proposed_solution: A web and mobile application that allows users to create challenges, invite friends, track progress, and share achievements. It leverages social interaction and real-time features to keep users engaged and accountable to their goals.

abstract: Chat Wave is a chat application equipped with cutting-edge technology to enhance the security of voice messages. Our app utilizes an AI model specifically designed for voice message detection. This AI model analyzes uploaded voice messages, examining various acoustic attributes and patterns, to determine their authenticity. By leveraging this technology, Chat Wave offers users a reliable means of verifying the realness of voice messages exchanged within the app.
description: Our app, named "Chat Wave" offers a chat service with advanced features focused on ensuring the security and authenticity of voice messages. In addition to standard messaging capabilities, we have integrated an AI model for voice message detection. This AI model analyses uploaded voice messages to determine if they are real or fake, providing an extra layer of security and trust for our users.
problem_statement: The problem addressed by Chat Wave is the lack of security and authenticity in voice messages exchanged through chat services. Voice messages have become a popular means of communication, but they can be easily manipulated or faked, leading to potential issues such as impersonation, misinformation, or privacy breaches. The challenge is to ensure that voice messages exchanged on the platform are genuine and trustworthy. Seamless management and improves overall efficiency
proposed_solution: Chat-Wave provides a secure chat service by integrating an advanced AI model for real-time voice message detection. This model analyzes various acoustic attributes and patterns of uploaded voice messages, including MFCC, Mel Spectrogram, and Chroma features, to determine their authenticity. Utilizing deep learning techniques, specifically Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) implemented with TensorFlow and Keras, the system identifies manipulated or fake audio, thereby ensuring the genuineness and trustworthiness of communications within the application.
