student_names: Ahmed Megahed Fettouh, Bassem Hossam Saad, Hazem Tarek Mahmoud, Nashwa Ramadan Mahmoud, Yara Akram Mohammed, Aya Elsayed Abdelfattah
abstract: In the modern era, different universities keep track of student attendance using face recognition verification system or manually. Attendance management is a daunting and important task. In a biometric authentication system, the system keeps track of students' attendance and avoids fake entries. In this project, we focus on proposing a smart attendance management system based on facial recognition and focuses on cheat detection. Examination cheating is not a new problem. Cheating among students has been a known problem of which knowledge is difficult to gain. There are different approaches to cheat on an exam. Students can use passing note, phones and other methods. The increasing rates of cheating during examinations in Egypt, that results in an unfair educational experience. Developing a classroom monitoring system using AI to detect possible cheating incidents during examinations that creates a fair and safe examination environment. We develop a desktop-based application for cheat detection system to be used by both the doctor and assistant. Where the assistant uses it to take attendance of students and detect who can cheat, and the doctor can see reports on students' attendance and report on cheating student. The aim of this project is to help professors and teaching assistants because they are suffering from students monitoring activities in the exam rooms which are hard, boring, and time-consuming missions. So, the challenge was to make a reliable system to detect cheating. This project creates a safe and fair examination environment for students that eliminates the high rates of cheating during examinations in Egypt, by implementing a system that detects possible cheating incidents in physical exams. Consequently, violating academic integrity creates a critical issue that negatively affects the reputation of the national education system and the quality, and competence of graduates.
description: Cheating in exams has long been a problem that educational institutions around the world are trying to eliminate. And only recently it has become necessary to stop it due to the technological revolution and the use of the Internet. Cheating is a type of academic dishonesty. It includes helping another student with an exam without the permission of the professor, accessing an exam, or using unauthorized material on an exam.
problem_statement: The nature and motives of the person who cheats: The person who commits the act of fraud may fall under one of the following patterns: [6] 1- The greedy: He is the one who wants to take more than he deserves and more than what his faculties and capabilities allow. 2- Thief: He is the one who robs others of their property and rights 3- The rebel: Cheating here is a departure from power, breaking its laws and deceiving it, and all of this gives the sense of breaking the authority of the teacher, the school, society, and the government. 4- The psychopath: who does not respect the systems and laws of society, lives for his desires and gains, and does not learn from his mistakes.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a desktop-based application that utilizes artificial intelligence and facial recognition technology to monitor examination environments. The system automates student attendance tracking and identifies potential cheating behaviors in real-time, providing professors and teaching assistants with actionable reports to ensure a fair and secure testing environment.

4. Enhance user experience and usability.
5. Improve workflow and management efficiency.
6. Improve system performance and reliability.
7. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
8. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.

abstract: The application Guidoma (Check Up) is concerned with the medical follow-up of patients. It utilizes an AI chatbot to perform initial patient assessments to determine potential cancer risks. The system supports the identification of six types of cancer (Breast, Skin, Brain, Lungs, Colon, Leukemia). Additionally, it provides a platform for patient-doctor communication, medical history storage, emergency assistance, medication/chemotherapy scheduling, and location services for nearby medical facilities.
description: Check Up is a comprehensive mobile health application designed to mimic the presence of a doctor for early cancer detection and patient management. By analyzing medical images and utilizing an intelligent chatbot, the system provides users with immediate health insights, reducing the need for initial specialist visits. It also serves as a holistic health companion by managing appointments, medication reminders, and connecting patients with nearby hospitals and pharmacies.
problem_statement: Cancer is a leading cause of death worldwide, with early detection being critical for survival. Many patients face barriers to timely diagnosis, including financial constraints, difficulty accessing specialists, and the psychological burden of the disease, which can exacerbate health outcomes.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an AI-driven mobile application that enables users to upload medical images for automated cancer classification and interact with a chatbot for preliminary health screening. The solution bridges the gap between patients and medical care by providing remote diagnostic support, medication tracking, and a communication platform to connect patients with doctors and support networks.

abstract: The Civil Assistance System During Emergencies is designed to address the challenges faced by individuals and communities during crises. By integrating wearable devices, AI models, data transmission, and real-time communication systems, the project ensures quick responses in emergency situations. The system provides vital information, monitors health indicators, tracks emergency cases, and offers immediate alerts to enhance safety and support decision-making. It aims to create a more resilient society by providing governmental foundations and civilians with immediate access to safety information, emergency services, and humanitarian aid through a mobile application, wearable device, AI-based heat map, and dashboard.
description: The Civil Assistance System is a comprehensive, integrated platform designed to bridge the gap between individuals in distress and emergency responders. abstract: The Clinic Management System is a comprehensive solution designed to streamline the operations of medical clinics. This system integrates various functionalities essential for efficient clinic management, including patient registration, appointment scheduling, medical record management, billing, and prescription management. abstract: As technology advances, our core processes advance. Many of the things we have today are done in different ways than before. Shopping (online) is one of these processes and is our focus in this project. Mobile apps now enable people to do things (online). Taking things further and going to improve the user experience, making things easier is key. Search users' online shopping trip to try to figure out what problems they're facing and what makes some people commit to doing so offline. Shoppers avoid shopping online because they don't know the right size and don't wear clothes. As their online shopping and ordering are based on these photos provided by the merchant. When products are delivered, they may seem different from those in the e-store, which is a bad thing. So, providing a method that makes this process more efficient is an intuitive urgency. So, in this project we made an application not only for offering clothes but also for size recommendation, and we allow you to try the clothes by using the camera on your mobile through Artificial Intelligence (AI) to see the colors and the style of your clothes.
description: This project presents a mobile-based application designed to revolutionize the online shopping experience by integrating AI-driven virtual try-on capabilities. The system addresses the gap between digital product representation and physical reality, allowing users to visualize clothing items on themselves in real-time. By combining size recommendation algorithms with augmented reality, the platform enhances consumer confidence and reduces the rate of product returns in e-commerce.
problem_statement: Online shoppers frequently face uncertainty regarding garment fit and appearance, leading to a reliance on physical retail stores. The discrepancy between product photos provided by merchants and the actual delivered items often results in customer dissatisfaction and high return rates.
proposed_solution: The project provides a comprehensive mobile application that features an AI-powered virtual fitting room and an automated size recommendation system. By utilizing the user's mobile camera, the application allows customers to visualize how clothes fit, look, and match their style before making a purchase, thereby bridging the gap between online browsing and physical trying-on.
objectives:
1. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
2. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
3. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
4. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
5. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
6. Implement modern technologies and best practices.

abstract: Today, most colleges know how important it is to track and guide their students throughout their journey. This project aims to facilitate the process of monitoring undergraduate students' performance by providing a tool that simplifies tracking and helps students build, improve, and manage their careers. The system allows students to register courses online, view grades, check prerequisites, and receive department recommendations based on a machine learning model that analyzes their academic performance. Additionally, it enables communication between students and professors, and provides faculty with insights into course performance and grade distribution.
description: The 'University Companion' is a centralized web-based platform designed to bridge the gap between students and faculty. It provides students with dashboards to track their academic progress, register for courses, and receive AI-driven recommendations for their future career paths or department specializations. For faculty, it streamlines administrative tasks by automating data collection and providing analytics on student performance, thereby fostering a more supportive and collaborative learning environment.
problem_statement: Universities face challenges in effectively monitoring student performance and providing timely guidance. Students often struggle with course registration, lack awareness of their academic standing, and feel confused when choosing specializations or career tracks. Furthermore, professors are burdened with administrative tasks, and communication between students and academic advisors is often inconsistent or unavailable.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a comprehensive web-based student performance monitoring system. It utilizes a machine learning model to analyze student grades and provide personalized recommendations for departments and career tracks. The platform includes features for online course registration, performance dashboards, event tracking, and a communication portal to facilitate interaction between students and faculty, ensuring students receive the guidance they need throughout their academic journey.

project_title: Colon cancer detection using deep learning
student_names: Youmna Nabil Ahmed, Nour Hashem Ameen, Mohamed Mahmoud Ahmed
abstract: Unprecedented breakthroughs in the development of graphical processing systems have led to great potential for deep learning (DL) algorithms in analyzing visual anatomy from high-resolution medical images. Recently, in digital pathology, the use of DL technologies has drawn a substantial amount of attention for use in the effective diagnosis of various cancer types, especially Colon cancer, which is regarded as one of the dominant causes of cancer-related deaths worldwide. Colon cancer is a type of cancer that begins in the large intestine (colon). The colon is the final part of the digestive tract. Colon cancer typically affects older adults, though it can happen at any age. It usually begins as small, noncancerous (benign) clumps of cells called polyps that form on the inside of the colon. Over time, some of these polyps can become colon cancers. If colon cancer develops, many treatments are available to help control it, including surgery, radiation therapy and drug treatments, such as chemotherapy, targeted therapy and immunotherapy. Colon cancer is sometimes called colorectal cancer, which is a term that combines colon cancer and rectal cancer, which begins in the rectum.
description: This project develops a web-based system that utilizes a deep learning model, specifically an EfficientNetB2 Convolutional Neural Network, to analyze endoscopic images for the detection of colon cancer. The system aims to assist medical professionals by providing an automated, accurate, and efficient diagnostic tool for identifying various gastrointestinal disorders, including polyps and cancerous growths, using data from wireless capsule endoscopy.
problem_statement: Colon cancer is a leading cause of cancer-related deaths worldwide. Traditional diagnostic methods like colonoscopy can be uncomfortable and invasive, and there is a clinical need for improved, less invasive methods for examining the small bowel and colon, especially for patients with recurrent gastrointestinal issues.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a deep learning-based diagnostic system using an EfficientNetB2 CNN architecture. The solution involves a web platform where wireless capsule endoscopy (WCE) images can be uploaded and analyzed by the model to classify the presence of colon cancer, providing a non-invasive and efficient diagnostic aid for clinicians.

full_content: Colon cancer detection using deep learning. Unprecedented breakthroughs in the development of graphical processing systems have led to great potential for deep learning (DL) algorithms in analyzing visual anatomy from high-resolution medical images. Recently, in digital pathology, the use of DL technologies has drawn a substantial amount of attention for use in the effective diagnosis of various cancer types, especially Colon cancer, which is regarded as one of the dominant causes of cancer-related deaths worldwide. Colon cancer is a type of cancer that begins in the large intestine (colon). The colon is the final part of the digestive tract. Colon cancer typically affects older adults, though it can happen at any age. It usually begins as small, noncancerous (benign) clumps of cells called polyps that form on the inside of the colon. Over time, some of these polyps can become colon cancers. If colon cancer develops, many treatments are available to help control it, including surgery, radiation therapy and drug treatments, such as chemotherapy, targeted therapy and immunotherapy. Colon cancer is sometimes called colorectal cancer, which is a term that combines colon cancer and rectal cancer, which begins in the rectum.. This project develops a web-based system that utilizes a deep learning model, specifically an EfficientNetB2 Convolutional Neural Network, to analyze endoscopic images for the detection of colon cancer. The system aims to assist medical professionals by providing an automated, accurate, and efficient diagnostic tool for identifying various gastrointestinal disorders, including polyps and cancerous growths, using data from wireless capsule endoscopy.

abstract: In today's digital age, communication platforms play a pivotal role in connecting individuals worldwide. This project is oriented towards the development ofa pioneering application for the deaf community, with a main focus on enhancing communication strength. The application is specifically designed to prioritize accessibility, incorporating features finely attuned to the distinct requirements of deaf users. These encompass crucial elements such as captions for audio and video content, coupled with robust support for sign language, thereby fostering an environment that promotes inclusive communication. Beyond these foundational features, the application integrates advanced functionalities, including interactive avatar for the deaf community, recognized speech captions, schedules, and notifications, augmenting the overall communicative experience. A notable innovation within the application is the incorporation of an avatar system, strategically engineered to proficiently transform vocal sentences into signs. This distinctive feature not only aligns with the application's inclusive design aspects but also significantly amplifies its communicative competence, facilitating seamless interactions among members of the deaf community. This unique augmentation distinguishes the application by transcending conventional boundaries, rendering communication more fluid and accessible. The primary objective of this project resides in the development of a user-friendly video conferencing pl
description: Key Features of the Solution: Video Conferencing with Sign Language Interpreters Integration: Our website offers a user- friendly video conferencing interface where deaf and non-deaf individuals can engage in real-time communication. Through the integration of artificial intelligence (AI), specifically machine learning and deep learning models, the platform automatically detects and translates sign language gestures into written text. Real-time Speech-to-Text Conversion: In addition to converting sign language gestures, our platform utilizes AI to convert spoken speech from non-deaf individuals into written text in real-time. This ensures that all verbal communication is accurately transcribed, providing deat individuals with access to spoken conversations. Avatar-based Sign Language Interpretation: To further enhance communication accessibility, our platform employs avatar technology to transform written text into sign language animations, These avatars dynamically interpret the transcribed text into sign language gestures, allowing deat individuals to visually understand the conversation during video chats. Accessibility and Inclusivity: By integrating advanced Al technologies and customizable Teatures, our platform prioritizes accessibility and inclusivity in communication. Dear indviduals can participate fully in video chats with non-deaf individuals, fostering meaningful interactions and breaking down communication barriers.

abstract: This project aims to bridge the communication gap for the deaf community by developing an efficient system that translates sign language into spoken language or written text. By utilizing gesture recognition technology, the system interprets hand and body movements to facilitate seamless interaction between deaf individuals and the hearing world, thereby reducing social isolation and improving accessibility.
description: The project is a communication system designed to interpret sign language gestures in real-time. It leverages computer vision and gesture recognition algorithms to identify and translate non-verbal communication into understandable formats like text or speech. The system is intended to serve as an assistive tool for the deaf and as an educational aid for sign language instructors.
problem_statement: Many deaf individuals face significant communication barriers because the majority of the hearing population does not understand sign language. This leads to social isolation and difficulty in accessing essential services and daily interactions.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a computer-based system that uses real-time gesture recognition to translate sign language into speech or text. The system employs imaging and tracking techniques, such as skin color-based hand detection, to interpret gestures and provide a bridge for communication.

student_names: Ahmed Mahmoud Mohamed, Ahmed Yousry Abd el Hamed, Alaa Gamal Yousif, Amira Maher Abd el Aliem, Fatma Tayseer Mohamed
abstract: Sperm analysis is an interest to biologists studying sperm function and its role in evaluating male infertility. Today the prevailing method for analyzing human sperm at fertility clinics is both laborious and subjective. The number and quality of sperm are often visually appraised by technicians using a microscope. This project proposes a computer-assisted sperm analysis software to save time and provide accurate results for patient sperm count and tracking. The system uses image processing techniques including frame cropping, noise reduction, and Kalman filtering for object tracking to achieve an average accuracy rate of 28% compared to manual results.
description: The Computer Assisted Sperm Analysis (CASA) system is a software solution designed to automate the analysis of human sperm samples. By capturing video frames from a microscope, the system processes the imagery to detect, count, and track individual sperm cells. It calculates key motility parameters such as curvilinear velocity (VCL), straight-line velocity (VSL), and linearity of progression (LIN), providing a more objective and efficient alternative to manual microscopic examination.
problem_statement: Manual sperm analysis at fertility clinics is laborious, time-consuming, and subjective, leading to potential human error and fatigue. Technicians often rely on visual appraisal, which lacks the precision required for detailed clinical diagnostics and makes it difficult to accurately measure complex motility parameters.
proposed_solution: The project implements a computer-assisted system that digitizes video frames from a microscope. It utilizes digital image processing algorithms to automatically detect and count sperm cells, and applies a Kalman filter to track sperm movement across frames, enabling the calculation of precise kinematic parameters.
objectives:
1. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
2. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
3. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
4. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
5. Enable real-time monitoring and tracking capabilities.

abstract: This graduation project introduces an innovative interface for reading computer science books, serving as an efficient alternative to platforms like Google Drive for academic use. Our website provides a seamless reading experience, integrating features to enhance user engagement and learning outcomes. Key functionalities include user account creation, browsing a diverse collection of computer science books with an intuitive interface, creating personalized lists, and accessing book summaries and author information. The reading interface features a multi-functional chatbot with four capabilities: text summarization, an embedded translation tool, a question-answering system, and a generative AI model for enhanced reader engagement and understanding. Additionally, the project includes a comprehensive dashboard for administrators, enabling book management, user control, and visualization of key metrics and statistics through graphs and charts. This project aims to deliver a robust, user-friendly platform for reading and managing computer science literature, fostering a more interactive and supportive learning environment for students and educators alike.

project_title: Connected Cars of Tomorrow: Investigating OBD-II and V2X Communication Protocols
student_names: Mohamed Ayman, Omar Mesbah, Mostafa Shrief, Shehab Rizk, Mohamed Mahdy, Salma Mohamed, Shahd Hamdy, Aya Ashraf, Shrouq Haney
abstract: The automotive landscape is witnessing a convergence of technologies aimed at enhancing safety, efficiency, and connectivity. On-board Diagnostics (OBD-II) and Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication stand as two key technologies shaping the future of smart cars. This project aims to help individuals diagnose their cars quickly without visiting a service center and provides a wide range of information about the vehicle's status. By applying V2X technologies, cars can send and receive messages to and from their surroundings, such as traffic lights, pedestrians, and other vehicles, allowing users to monitor and control their car's performance effectively.
description: This project explores the integration of OBD-II and V2X communication protocols to create a smarter, safer, and more efficient driving experience. It involves developing a mobile application and a web interface to provide real-time vehicle diagnostics and facilitate communication between vehicles and infrastructure to improve traffic flow and road safety.
problem_statement: Current transportation systems face critical challenges including traffic congestion, road safety risks, and inefficient traffic flow. Additionally, vehicle owners often lack immediate access to diagnostic information, leading to costly repairs and potential safety hazards.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated system using OBD-II for internal vehicle health monitoring and V2X communication for external connectivity. This allows for real-time diagnostic alerts, improved situational awareness, collision avoidance, and optimized traffic management through data exchange with infrastructure and other vehicles.
objectives:
1. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
2. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
3. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
4. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
5. Enhance user experience and usability.
6. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
7. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.
8. Implement modern technologies and best practices.

abstract: Registration and enrolling for credit hours courses take a great effort to deal with manually due to the large number of students that register in governmental faculties. It is also known to everyone that documents are not safe because they have serious consequences, including: 1- Loss or damage of documents. 2- The accuracy and completeness of the data. Therefore, the system we offer is secure, data-protected, and easy to use and provides a lot of services such that: 1- The student can register his data through the system rather than filling the application to join the faculty. 2- He / she must attend the available courses according to certain conditions. 3- Modify the enrolled courses chosen after the approval of one of the faculty members. 4- The system enables the student to print his schedule and transcript. 5- If the student leave the faculty, his data is deleted from the system. The academic staff can also record their data and print out their schedule
description: Education plays an important role in collecting knowledge. University education is a means of innovation. Universities offer greater opportunities for students to innovate anything that is new. Credit hour is the unit by which an institution measures its course work. The number of credit hours assigned to a course quantitatively reflects the outcomes expected, the mode of instruction, the amount of time spent in class, and the amount of outside preparatory work expected for the class. Our system facilitate the work of universities in course registration.
problem_statement: Registration at the local university is currently done by hand Students fill out forms manually. The university decided to get rid of paperwork and get benefit of electronic format. The university decided to investigate the use of an online registration system. This system would be used by professors to indicate the courses they would teach, by students to select courses, and by the registrar to complete the registration process. All undergraduates will need to earn at least 120 SHUs and complete the minimum number of courses as stipulated when they matriculated into their degree program. The system must dividing students into group according to capacity of room. The system must achieve the constraint according to faculty.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a secure, web-based online registration system designed to replace manual, paper-based processes at the university. The system automates course enrollment, allows for real-time schedule and transcript generation, and enforces academic constraints such as room capacity and degree requirements, while providing distinct interfaces for students, faculty, and registrars.

project_title: Data Hiding Techniques By Using Encryption Method
student_names: Amira Abdallah Ahmed, Sara Hamada Mohammed, Hanem Darwish Ibrahim, Heba Mohammed Khalil
abstract: This project presents a robust framework for securing digital images by combining encryption and steganography techniques. By focusing on the BMP file format, the application addresses existing limitations in image security by modifying pixel positions to ensure content protection regardless of image type. The proposed solution enhances security efficiency by implementing a two-step process: initial image encryption followed by steganographic hiding of the encrypted data.
description: Nowadays, security issue becomes more important especially when it comes to the use of Internet and other networks. Security breaches may affect user's privacy and reputation. Due to this risk, various measurements have already been taken to prevent security breaches in the network. One example that has been made due to this problem is an encryption and hiding. Why encryption: Data encryption is an important way to protect data before it can be transmitted over any networks. Defining Encryption: Encryption is defined as modifying information into a special code, especially in order to prevent unauthorized users to have access to the information. Defining Decryption: Decryption on the other hand is the opposite meaning of encryption.
problem_statement: Protecting some of the images are as important as protecting the textual data and perhaps much more important. student_names: Ahmed Hisham Abdel-Razek, Ahmed Khaled Kamal Atta, Abdelrahman Atef El-sayed, Omar Wafaey Ahmed Abdel-Nasser, Eslam Ahmed Lofty Amer, Ibrahim Sami Ali Afifi, Ahmed Khaled Taha Refai, Amir Reda Mohamed Abu Zeid, Eman Gamal Abdel-Nasser Nofal, Eirene Mamdouh Henry
abstract: The project revolves around the development of an Information System tailored for managing daycare services for children. This system streamlines the application process, interview scheduling, child evaluation, administrative tasks, supervision, and stakeholder communication. The application process involves parents completing a form containing personal details about the child. Subsequently, an evaluator reviews the submitted data and grants initial acceptance if the criteria are met. Parents receive email notifications regarding interview scheduling with an assigned interviewer, responsible for evaluating the child's suitability. Administrators play a crucial role in staff selection, group formation, and event planning within the daycare center. Supervisors oversee attendance, issue notifications, compile weekly reports, and manage meal arrangements. Additionally, they ensure effective communication with parents through designated notification schedules and report mechanisms. Social specialists are tasked with monitoring student behavior, providing guidance, and reporting behavioral concerns to parents. They aim to foster a positive and conducive learning environment for all children. Bus supervisors oversee transportation logistics, including student distribution and coordination with bus monitors. They ensure timely and efficient transportation services, minimizing disruptions for both students and parents. Parents play an active role in the system, inputting data, communicating with daycare staff, and monitoring their child's progress. This collaborative approach enhances daycare management efficiency, promotes effective communication, and ensures the well-being of children under care.
description: The Daycare Management System is an innovative information platform designed to revolutionize childcare services. It provides a centralized hub for managing enrollment, staff coordination, student behavior monitoring, transportation logistics, and parent-teacher communication. By digitizing manual processes, the system aims to reduce administrative burdens, improve data accuracy, and foster a more transparent and nurturing environment for children.
problem_statement: Current daycare management suffers from fragmented records, inefficient enrollment processes, poor communication between parents and staff, lack of structured behavioral monitoring, and disorganized transportation logistics, leading to reduced service quality and increased parental dissatisfaction.
proposed_solution: An integrated web-based information system that automates enrollment, provides a portal for parental engagement and communication, implements a structured behavioral monitoring and intervention module, and optimizes transportation scheduling and bus allocation.

abstract: Deity is a comprehensive mobile application designed to promote and maintain a healthy lifestyle through personalized fitness and nutrition guidance. By leveraging Flutter for cross-platform development and Firebase for robust backend services, the application provides users with tailored workout plans, nutritional advice, and progress monitoring. The system integrates machine learning models to analyze user physical features and preferences, ensuring a highly customized experience that empowers users to achieve their health objectives effectively.
description: Deity is a cross-platform mobile application built with Flutter that serves as a personal health and fitness companion. It features a modular BLoC architecture to ensure scalability and performance. The app provides users with personalized workout routines, meal planning, activity tracking, and educational resources. It also incorporates machine learning to analyze user data and provide intelligent recommendations, all while maintaining high standards of data security and user privacy.
problem_statement: Users often struggle to maintain a healthy lifestyle due to a lack of personalized guidance, difficulty in tracking progress, and the absence of a supportive environment for accountability and nutritional planning.
proposed_solution: A cross-platform mobile application that utilizes machine learning to generate personalized fitness and nutrition plans, provides tools for activity and progress tracking, offers educational content, and fosters a supportive community to keep users motivated.

abstract: Traditional learning systems are often expensive, time-consuming, and limited by physical classroom capacity. This project proposes a distance learning content management system to facilitate remote education, allowing instructors and students to interact in a virtual environment. The system aims to improve time management, reduce physical travel, and provide a flexible, accessible platform for learning and resource management.
description: This project is a comprehensive Content Management System (CMS) specifically designed for distance learning. It provides a centralized platform where instructors can manage course materials and students can access learning resources, search for books in a media library, and engage in a flexible credit-hour study system. The platform is designed to bridge the gap between traditional classroom settings and modern digital learning needs.
problem_statement: Traditional education is hindered by high costs, physical space limitations, and the logistical challenges of requiring students and instructors to be in the same physical location, which is inefficient and time-consuming.
proposed_solution: The development of a robust, web-based distance learning content management system that enables virtual classrooms, digital resource management, and flexible, anytime-anywhere access to educational content.

student_names: Ahmed Nabil, Ahmed Salah, Karam Azab, Mohammed Megahed, Mohammed Salman, Salem Salama
abstract: A web search engine is designed to search for information on the World Wide Web. The search results are generally presented in a list of results often referred to as search engine results pages (SERPs). The information may consist of web pages, images, information and other types of files. Some search engines also mine data available in databases or open directories. Unlike web directories, which are maintained only by human editors, search engines also maintain real-time information by running an algorithm on a web crawler. This significance of search engine was the main motivation for our team to try to implement a Search Engine That helps users to find what they search for Easily, Quickly and satisfy their Needs. The implemented search engine ranks results based on term - content relevance.
description: This project involves the development of a custom web-based search engine. The system is designed to crawl the web, index information, and provide users with relevant search results. Unlike systems that rely heavily on link analysis, this project focuses on content-based ranking to improve the efficiency and relevance of search results for the end-user.
problem_statement: Web search is one of the main and basic activities of almost every computer user. Users are in constant need of a system that helps them reach their targets as fast as possible. Many existing search engines rely on link analysis and global page importance, which may not always be the most efficient method for content-based relevance.
proposed_solution: The team developed a web-based search engine that utilizes a web crawler to gather data and implements a ranking algorithm based on term-content relevance to ensure users find information easily and quickly.

student_names: Ahmad Mohamed Abdul-Aziz Gouda, Ahmed Abd-Elghani, Ahmed Reda Ahmed, Aml Shabaan Almahdy
abstract: Health is essential for everyone. Health can't be bought by anything. Health is important no matter what country we are from or what race we are, or what age or gender we are. It might have happened so many times that you or someone yours need doctors help immediately, but they are not available due to some reason. The Health Prediction system is an end user support and online consultation project. Here we propose a system that allows users to get instant guidance on their health issues through an intelligent health care system online. The system is fed with various symptoms and the disease/illness associated with those systems. The system allows user to share their symptoms to check for various illness that could be associated with it. Here we use some data mining techniques to guess the most accurate illness that could be associated with patient's symptoms. This system is split into three main parts that comprise of Patient's Registration, Diagnosis and Treatment.
description: Diagnose Yourself is a web-based medical diagnosis application designed to provide users with instant health guidance. The system allows users to input their symptoms, age, gender, and region to receive a list of the most likely diagnoses. It utilizes data mining and artificial intelligence to analyze user-provided symptoms against a medical database to suggest potential illnesses, helping bridge the gap when professional medical help is not immediately available.
problem_statement: There is a significant shortage of medical experts relative to the patient population (a ratio of 1:600), leading to difficulties in accessing timely medical advice. Additionally, medical errors, improper performance, and failure to recognize complications contribute to poor health outcomes, necessitating a more accessible and intelligent diagnostic support tool.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an intelligent, web-based medical diagnosis system that acts as an end-user support tool. By allowing users to input their symptoms, age, gender, and region, the system uses data mining and AI algorithms to process the information and provide a ranked list of the top 10 most likely diagnoses, along with red-flag warnings for severe conditions.

4. Enhance healthcare efficiency and accessibility.

abstract: Diety aims to develop a comprehensive mobile application that empowers users to adopt and maintain healthy lifestyle habits. In today's fast-paced world, individuals often struggle to prioritize their health amidst busy schedules and numerous distractions. This project seeks to address this challenge by providing users with a convenient and user-friendly platform for tracking their fitness progress, accessing personalized workout routines, monitoring their nutrition intake, and connecting with a supportive community of like-minded individuals. The application uses Flutter and machine learning to generate personalized fitness and diet plans based on user physical characteristics and goals, while integrating Google Gemini for interactive health advice.
description: Diety is a comprehensive mobile application designed to promote fitness and healthy living. It acts as a personal health assistant that accepts user physical features as input and generates tailored fitness and diet plans. The app features calorie management, progress tracking, lifestyle guidance, and an AI-powered virtual assistant for real-time health advice.
problem_statement: Many individuals struggle to maintain a healthy lifestyle due to busy schedules, sedentary habits, and stress, leading to rising rates of obesity and chronic diseases. Existing fitness apps often lack comprehensive features, fail to provide truly personalized guidance, or focus only on one aspect of health (e.g., just nutrition or just exercise) rather than a holistic approach.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a user-centric mobile application that integrates AI algorithms to provide personalized workout routines and meal plans. By analyzing user data, the app offers tailored recommendations, tracks progress, and provides interactive support through a virtual assistant to help users achieve their fitness and health objectives effectively.
objectives:

8. Enhance user experience and usability.

project_title: Digital Services in Real Estate and Buildings
student_names: Ahmed Mostafa Atef Abdel Sallam, Abdel-Fattah El-Sayed Abdel-Fattah, Mahmoud Reda Abdel-Fattah Ebrahim, Elsayed Abdulrahman Elsayed, Mohamed Ezzat Abdel Monsef, Ahmed Jamal Sayed Dessouki
abstract: In general, digital services provide many advantages and benefits in a wide range of industries and sectors, including the public and private sectors, public utilities, buildings and facilities. Digital services help improve communication and interaction between users, devices and systems, improve efficiency and productivity, reduce costs, save time, and increase security and protection. With the development of digital technologies, digital services will remain available and available mainly in all industries and sectors, and the demand for them will continue in the coming years. It is expected that the interest in digital services will increase in the future, which will lead to the development of new technologies and services, and the improvement of the services currently available. Thus, digital services will remain an essential part of our daily lives and the development of industries and sectors in the future. Our system is trying to solve a big problem faced by the state in accomplishing tasks related to the field of real estate and buildings. As the goal of the project is to facilitate services for citizens in the field of real estate and buildings, where the state aims to use information technology to provide the services required for the stages of construction and processing, and through our website, all real estate applications can be made available and submitted to citizens anywhere with the speed and efficiency required.
description: This project is a web-based information system designed to digitize and streamline government services related to real estate and building management. It allows citizens to perform various tasks online, such as applying for building permits, requesting utility connections (electricity, water, natural gas), submitting reconciliation requests for agricultural lands, and paying utility bills, thereby reducing the need for physical visits to government offices.
problem_statement: Citizens face significant difficulties and delays in completing tasks related to real estate and building construction due to overcrowding in government departments, inefficient manual processes, and the lack of accessible digital alternatives for service requests and utility management.
proposed_solution: The development of a centralized web portal that enables citizens to submit applications for building permits, request utility connections, track service progress, update personal data, and make online payments, effectively reducing physical crowding and improving service delivery speed.
objectives:
1. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
2. Implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms.
3. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
4. Optimize resource allocation and task management.
5. Enhance user experience and usability.
6. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
7. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
8. Improve workflow and management efficiency.

abstract: The aim of this project is to help people with disabilities throughout the world to communicate with other by using technology, and to enjoy using social media, It also purpose of make their life easy by making them feel that no difference between them and ordinary people, and They are not deprived of their presence in social networking sites. In this project we want them to have account in social media, these account make them able to use their voice for adding their friends, writing posts, sending messages by both (text / speech). Project aim is to develop web application that enhances the user's way of speech through correctness of pronunciation following the English phonetics. This software allows one to learn, judge and recognize their potential in English language. It also facilitates an extra add-on feature which nourishes the user's communication skills by using speech to text teqhnic.
description: The Disabled Assistance System is a specialized web application designed to bridge the digital divide for individuals with physical and visual impairments. By integrating advanced voice-recognition and speech-to-text technologies, the platform enables users to interact with social media, manage accounts, and communicate through voice commands, thereby fostering greater social inclusion and independence.
problem_statement: Traditional input methods such as keyboards and mice require fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination, creating significant barriers for individuals with physical disabilities. Furthermore, visually impaired users face challenges in navigating standard social media interfaces, which often lack sufficient accessibility features to facilitate independent communication and social interaction.
proposed_solution: The project provides a comprehensive web-based solution that replaces traditional input methods with voice-driven interaction, allowing users to post, message, and manage social accounts using speech. Additionally, the system incorporates an educational module that utilizes English phonetic analysis to help users improve their pronunciation and communication skills, ensuring a more accessible and empowering digital experience.
objectives:
1. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
2. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
3. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
4. Improve system performance and reliability.
5. Enhance user experience and usability.
6. Support future scalability and feature expansion.

abstract: Doctor 4 U is a comprehensive system designed to simplify the process of finding and booking doctor appointments. By replacing traditional paper-based methods with an electronic platform, the system offers a flexible, safe, and efficient way for users to manage their healthcare appointments from anywhere at any time. The project includes a web interface, an Android application, and an iOS application to ensure accessibility across multiple platforms.
description: Doctor 4 U is a smart clinic management system that facilitates the interaction between patients and doctors. It provides a digital solution for appointment scheduling, eliminating the need for physical travel to clinics for booking and reducing waiting times. The system is designed to be user-friendly, requiring no special technical skills, and is accessible 24/
problem_statement: The traditional paper-based booking system is inefficient, prone to errors, and leads to long queues. It involves high costs for maintaining physical records, risks of document damage, and significant time and effort spent by patients traveling to clinics just to secure an appointment.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an integrated electronic clinic management system available via web and mobile platforms (Android and iOS). It allows users to book appointments remotely, digitizes patient records to prevent data loss, and optimizes the scheduling process to save time and reduce operational costs.

abstract: Our app and website provide a comprehensive solution for plant enthusiasts, addressing the challenges of plant selection, care, and disease detection. With a wide range of plants available for purchase and high-quality fertilizers, users can easily find and nurture their ideal plants. The integration of AI-powered plant disease detection allows for early identification and treatment, ensuring plant health. Furthermore, the chatbot feature offers real-time support and guidance for plant-related inquiries. By combining these features, our platform aims to empower individuals to enjoy the beauty of plants while fostering healthier and more successful gardening experiences.
description: Doctor of Plants is a comprehensive digital platform consisting of a mobile application and a website designed to assist plant enthusiasts. It serves as a one-stop shop for purchasing plants and fertilizers, while also providing advanced digital tools for plant maintenance. The platform features an AI-driven disease detection system that analyzes photos of plants to identify health issues and suggest treatments, alongside an intelligent chatbot that provides real-time gardening advice and support.
problem_statement: Many individuals face challenges when it comes to finding suitable plants for their living spaces or gardens. Additionally, identifying and addressing plant diseases can be a complex task. There is a lack of access to expert advice and a limited availability of a comprehensive platform that integrates plant purchasing, fertilizers, disease detection, and plant-related information.
proposed_solution: The project provides a holistic solution by offering a vast selection of plants categorized by sunlight and water requirements, an e-commerce interface for purchasing, an AI-powered image recognition system for disease diagnosis, and an intelligent chatbot for real-time gardening support and troubleshooting.
objectives:
1. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
2. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
3. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
4. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
5. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.

project_title: DR/CARE: Medical Application Based on Deep Learning
student_names: Hossam fares alsayed metwally, Hossam medhat sayed Mohamed, Fady Maher Mazhor Barh, Ahmed Emad Mahmoud Abdel Rahman, Aya Almadah Atef Naser, Raneem saleh mohamed abo elmawaheb
abstract: The application Doctor Care is concerned with the medical follow-up of patients, providing advantages such as disease identification via a chatbot, medical image analysis (chest x-rays, heartbeat, skin cancer, brain tumor, retinal OCT), and facilitating doctor-patient communication. It includes medication reminders, hospital location services, and remote health monitoring for patients with irregular vital signs (oxygen ratio, heart rate, temperature) using wearable IoT devices.
description: DR/CARE is a comprehensive mobile health platform that integrates AI-driven diagnostic models with IoT hardware. The system consists of two main parts: a hardware device that monitors vital signs and uploads data to a database, and a mobile application that provides medical services, including AI-based image classification for various diseases, a medical chatbot, appointment scheduling, and emergency location services.
problem_statement: The project addresses the deterioration of health status in the elderly, the high cost and difficulty of accessing regular medical follow-ups, and the challenges posed by global health crises like COVID-19, which make visiting hospitals for routine check-ups difficult and risky.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an integrated mobile application and IoT hardware system that allows for remote patient monitoring, AI-assisted medical image diagnosis, and virtual communication with doctors, effectively simulating a doctor's presence for initial diagnosis and continuous health tracking.

2. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
3. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
4. Provide efficient data analysis and reporting features.

student_names: Pola Michel William Zaki, Aya Abdallah Ibrahiem Hegazy, Abdallah Abdalnasser Abdallah Abdalnasser, Abdullah Naser Alsayed Elkholy, Soliman Hossam Soliman Mohamed, Abdelrahman Ashraf Abdelsalam Qerba, Ahmed Ashraf Abdelsalam Qerba, Hanan Yasser ebrahim Mohamed Rabia, Dalia Gaber Ahmed Abdel Fattah
abstract: In today's globalized digital landscape, the demand for multilingual content is rapidly increasing. Our project addresses this by developing an advanced automated system for translating and dubbing videos into Arabic. The system follows a streamlined process: extracting audio from videos, converting it to text, translating the text into Arabic, and then converting the translated text back into audio synchronized with the original video. By using cutting-edge tools and models, we ensure high accuracy and quality in voiceover and dubbing, maintaining the content's essence. Additionally, this project aims to democratize knowledge access and create an inclusive learning environment for Arabic speakers by localizing educational videos, documentaries, and online resources into Arabic. This system empowers Arabic-speaking communities to access a wider range of educational content, enhancing educational opportunities, fostering cross-cultural understanding, and promoting linguistic diversity globally.
description: The project is a comprehensive web-based platform designed to automate the dubbing of English educational videos into Arabic. It focuses on bridging the language gap for students and learners in the Arab world by providing a seamless voice-over service that makes foreign educational resources accessible in their native language.
problem_statement: There is a significant scarcity of high-quality Arabic educational content, particularly in computer science. Existing materials are primarily in English or Hindi, creating a language barrier that limits learning opportunities. Furthermore, traditional manual dubbing is expensive, time-consuming, and faces technical challenges like lip-syncing, maintaining emotional tone, and ensuring high audio quality.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an automated, cost-effective electronic dubbing system that utilizes deep learning models and Natural Language Processing. The solution includes automated audio extraction, speech-to-text, machine translation, and text-to-speech synthesis. It incorporates the WAV2C library for lip synchronization and utilizes noise-reduction models like 'Splitter' by Deezer to ensure professional-grade audio output.
objectives:
1. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
2. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
3. Improve system performance and reliability.
4. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
5. Provide interactive educational tools and resources.
6. Enhance user experience and usability.
full_content: Dubbing System for Educational purposes. In today's globalized digital landscape, the demand for multilingual content is rapidly increasing. Our project addresses this by developing an advanced automated system for translating and dubbing videos into Arabic. The system follows a streamlined process: extracting audio from videos, converting it to text, translating the text into Arabic, and then converting the translated text back into audio synchronized with the original video. By using cutting-edge tools and models, we ensure high accuracy and quality in voiceover and dubbing, maintaining the content's essence. Additionally, this project aims to democratize knowledge access and create an inclusive learning environment for Arabic speakers by localizing educational videos, documentaries, and online resources into Arabic. This system empowers Arabic-speaking communities to access a wider range of educational content, enhancing educational opportunities, fostering cross-cultural understanding, and promoting linguistic diversity globally.. The project is a comprehensive web-based platform designed to automate the dubbing of English educational videos into Arabic. It focuses on bridging the language gap for students and learners in the Arab world by providing a seamless voice-over service that makes foreign educational resources accessible in their native language.

project_title: Early prediction of arrhythmia based on ECG
student_names: Mohamed Essam Lotfy Abdelaziz, Aya Ramadan Fath El Bab Saleh, Doaa Salem Yassin Mohammed, Hasnaa Fawzy Mahmoud Elshazly, Menna Tallah Hassan Ayad Ahmed, Mahmoud Ayman Hamed Mahmoud
abstract: Heart disease remains a leading cause of global mortality, accounting for a significant percentage of deaths worldwide. Early detection of cardiac abnormalities is crucial in preventing the progression of conditions such as atrial fibrillation and Ventricular heart failure, which are often diagnosed in advanced stages. This research aims to contribute to the timely identification of cardiac issues through the use of electrocardiogram (ECG) data. With over 23 million patients globally affected by heart-related ailments, and heart disease being the primary cause of death for 32 percent of 9 million deaths, there is a pressing need for effective predictive measures. The study focuses on interpreting ECG signals to predict arrhythmias, specifically targeting abnormalities like atrial fibrillation and Ventricular heart failure. We used the Internet of Things (IOT) technology, which is a system of interrelated computing devices, machines or objects with unique identifiers and the ability to communicate the data over a network or Internet without requiring human intervention.
description: The project is a portable, user-friendly IoT-based system designed to detect cardiac abnormalities and predict arrhythmias using machine learning. It aims to provide a dual benefit to medical practitioners and patients by enabling early diagnosis in various settings, such as hospitals, emergency rooms, or sports fields, thereby improving patient outcomes and reducing mortality rates.
problem_statement: There is a critical gap in the early prediction of arrhythmias, as traditional diagnostic approaches often rely on detecting irregularities only after symptoms have manifested, which limits the effectiveness of treatment strategies.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an IoT-based system that utilizes machine learning models to analyze ECG signals for the early prediction of arrhythmias. The solution includes a portable, cost-effective device that captures ECG data and a mobile application that provides rapid, accurate results for healthcare professionals.
objectives:
1. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
2. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
3. Integrate IoT technologies for smart automation.
4. Improve prediction accuracy using machine learning models.
5. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.

student_names: Mohamed Hassan Emam, Mohamed Refaat Bayuomi, Asmaa abd elrzaqe abd elslam mousa, Dina ahmed mohamed ahmed, Ahmed Mosad EL-Sayed, Samy Samir khattab
abstract: Nowadays, a great deal of effort is being devoted to developing techniques to predict natural disasters in order to take precautionary measures. One of the most dangerous nature disasters is Earthquake which occurs unexpectedly in an instant, causing catastrophic damages. The aim of this research is to propose Computational Intelligence (CI) techniques for detecting and alarming for earthquakes based on analysis of historical data and studying of some mathematically computed factors known as seismicity indicators. CI techniques are namely Artificial Neural Network (ANN), least square support vector machine(LS-SVM).
description: This project focuses on the development of a predictive model for earthquakes using computational intelligence. By analyzing historical seismic data and calculating specific seismicity indicators—such as the Gutenberg-Richter inverse power law parameters and characteristic earthquake distributions—the system aims to forecast the magnitude of the largest seismic event in a given future time window. The project employs advanced machine learning architectures, specifically feed-forward neural networks with Levenberg-Marquardt backpropagation, to handle the complex, non-linear relationships between seismic precursors and earthquake occurrences.
problem_statement: Earthquakes occur unexpectedly and cause catastrophic damage, yet there is no established mathematical or empirical relationship between seismic indicators and the location or magnitude of succeeding earthquakes, making medium-term and short-term prediction a significant challenge.
proposed_solution: The project proposes using Computational Intelligence (CI) techniques, specifically Artificial Neural Networks (ANN) and Least Square Support Vector Machines (LS-SVM), to analyze eight distinct seismicity indicators. These indicators are fed into a feed-forward Levenberg-Marquardt backpropagation neural network to model and predict earthquake magnitudes.
objectives:
1. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
2. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
3. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
4. Provide efficient data analysis and reporting features.
5. Improve system performance and reliability.
6. Enhance user experience and usability.
7. Improve prediction accuracy using machine learning models.

student_names: Abdallah samir elsayed, Abdallah adel abdallah, Ahmed barakat Mohamed, Naglaa saad Mohamed, Hend hamdy
abstract: Online shopping or Ecommerce became very common nowadays. And with tremendous increase in mobiles and tablets, shopping on mobile is getting more popular each day. Customers have started expecting their retailers to have a mobile presence. From this point, our team developed an ecommerce mobile application for which this document has been prepared. The proposed system is an android application that acts as an intermediary between customer and vendor. The vendors add the products to the system freely, then customer purchase these added products with cache on delivery payment. The proposed system satisfies basic functions of an ecommerce application such as registration, shopping cart, product management, order management and other functions. So improving services provided to application users is a must. To achieve that, we followed two approaches which are optimizing customer services approach and vendor services approach. Mining algorithms. By using data mining, various recommendation algorithms are developed upon customer behavior and customers' orders. Not only that, but a dynamic shipment cost algorithm is developed to calculate cost of shipment dynamically. Vendor provided services improved by providing visualization reports about interactivity and sales of percentage of products. The sales of percentage reports are about product, branches, and competitors. Also, vendor can advertise an added product and pay for the advertisement. The vendor also can use the Google maps to help him/her to deliver requested orders easily. The good thing is that map could be used also by customer to ease reaching to vendor branch if customer decided to get requested orders rather than shipping by vendor.
description: The project is an Android-based e-commerce platform that acts as a broker between customers and vendors. It provides a comprehensive suite of features including user registration, product browsing, shopping cart management, and order processing. Beyond standard e-commerce functionality, the system integrates advanced data mining algorithms to provide personalized product recommendations and dynamic shipment cost calculations. It also offers vendors analytical tools for sales visualization and advertising capabilities, alongside Google Maps integration for efficient order delivery and branch location.
problem_statement: With the continuous increase in ecommerce applications, competition among them has increased. Therefore, each one seeks to attract more customers or even to conserve and retain customers rather than seeking to expand its market by improving customer services. Companies found themselves have huge amount of data like transactions and browsing history of customers so the need to make use of this huge amount of data sets to improve customer services too. All these requirements have introduced the extraction of knowledge and discover patterns from data in ecommerce applications, using data mining techniques.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an Android application that implements data mining algorithms to optimize customer and vendor services. It uses recommendation algorithms based on customer behavior and order history to suggest products. It also features a dynamic shipment cost calculator, visualization reports for vendors to track sales and competitor performance, and Google Maps integration to facilitate order delivery and store location.

2. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
3. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
4. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
5. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
6. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
7. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.

abstract: The project "E-commerce with image search" aims to address the significant challenge of product quality assurance in online purchasing. By integrating advanced image search capabilities into an e-commerce platform, this project seeks to empower users with tools to visually verify product details, compare items, and gain greater confidence in their purchasing decisions. This approach intends to mitigate the prevalent issue of lacking assurance regarding product quality, thereby enhancing the overall user experience and reliability of online shopping.
description: the convenience, safety, and user experience of e-commerce have improved exponentially since its inception. This article will address some of the key players and milestones of e-commerce.
problem_statement: One of the most significant challenges in online shopping is the uncertainty regarding product quality. Customers are often unable to physically inspect products before purchasing, which may lead to receiving items that do not meet expectations or match the advertised specifications. This issue reduces customer trust and satisfaction with online shopping platforms.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution involves developing an e-commerce platform that incorporates a robust image search engine. This engine will allow users to upload images of desired products or product features to find matching items, compare visual attributes, and potentially access user-generated content or reviews that include images. By providing visual verification tools, the system aims to directly tackle the problem of insufficient product quality assurance, enabling consumers to make more informed and confident purchasing decisions.

abstract: The EduFocus system is an AI-powered educational platform designed to enhance virtual learning experiences by integrating facial expression analysis and personalized learning recommendations. With the increasing adoption of online education, maintaining student engagement has become a significant challenge. EduFocus aims to bridge this gap by utilizing AI-driven techniques to assess student concentration levels during live sessions and provide real-time feedback to instructors. The system incorporates various features, including real-time video conferencing, automated learning recommendations, questionnaire-based feedback collection, and performance tracking. If a large number of students exhibit low engagement, the system recommends instructors to send quizzes to evaluate focus levels. The platform supports multiple user roles, such as instructors, students, and administrators, ensuring seamless interaction and data-driven decision-making.
description: EduFocus is an intelligent online education platform that monitors student engagement in real-time during virtual classes. By leveraging AI-powered facial expression analysis and pose estimation, the system detects when students are distracted and provides instructors with actionable insights. It includes a dashboard for instructors to view engagement reports and tools to trigger interactive content or quizzes to re-engage students, thereby improving overall learning outcomes.
problem_statement: Traditional online learning platforms lack integrated mechanisms to measure and maintain student engagement in real-time. Instructors struggle to assess student attentiveness during virtual lectures, which leads to lower participation and ineffective knowledge retention.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an AI-powered platform that integrates WebRTC for video conferencing and uses the YOLO model and pose estimation to analyze students' facial expressions. The system automatically detects disengagement and prompts instructors to intervene with interactive content, ensuring students remain focused.

project_title: E-learning System with Automated Arabic Essay Questions Grading
student_names: Abdulwahab Mohammed Ahmed, Abdullah Mohammed Abd El-Moamen, Abdullah Hassan Hussein, Sara Atef Ibrahim, Zeinab Yasser Mohammed, Rowayda Adel Elsayed, Doaa Ali Elsayed
abstract: Automatic grading for exams is very essential with the increasing number of students and the increasing need for saving the time and effort of human graders. While there are some kinds of questions that can be easily graded by the machine (such as multiple-choice questions MCQ), essay questions are still very difficult for the machine to grade because they require high level of natural language understanding. In order to tackle this problem, we have to find a way to make the machine able to predict the semantic similarity between the student answer and the model answer, and assign the marks based on this similarity. This can be done by using the power of machine learning and natural language processing. In this project we propose a hybrid model that can estimate the semantic similarity between two pieces of text. The hybrid model is based on character-based n-gram similarity, word embeddings, Manhattan LSTM, and support vector regression. We also test other models based on WordNet and Latent Semantic Analysis. Our model achieves comparable results on both STS Benchmark dataset and SemEval-2017 Task 1 dataset for semantic textual similarity evaluation. Finally, we integrate this model into a complete e-learning system including a website and an android app.
description: This project develops a comprehensive e-learning platform that incorporates an automated grading system for Arabic essay questions. By utilizing advanced machine learning and NLP techniques, the system evaluates the semantic similarity between student responses and model answers, providing instant feedback and reducing the burden on human instructors.
problem_statement: Short essay questions are difficult for machines to grade because they require natural language understanding. Current systems rely on keyword matching, which is unfair to students who express correct answers using different vocabulary, and there is a lack of reliable automated grading systems specifically for the Arabic language.
proposed_solution: A hybrid machine learning model that estimates semantic similarity between student answers and model answers using character-based n-grams, word embeddings, Manhattan LSTM, and support vector regression, integrated into a web and Android-based e-learning platform.

clean_text: e-learning system with automated arabic essay questions grading. automatic grading for exams is very essential with the increasing number of students and the increasing need for saving the time and effort of human graders. while there are some kinds of questions that can be easily graded by the machine such as multiple-choice questions mcq essay questions are still very difficult for the machine to grade because they require high level of natural language understanding. in order to tackle this problem we have to find a way to make the machine able to predict the semantic similarity between the student answer and the model answer and assign the marks based on this similarity. this can be done by using the power of machine learning and natural language processing. in this project we propose a hybrid model that can estimate the semantic similarity between two pieces of text. the hybrid model is based on character-based n-gram similarity word embeddings manhattan lstm and support vector regression. we also test other models based on wordnet and latent semantic analysis. our model achieves comparable results on both sts benchmark dataset and semeval-2017 task 1 dataset for semantic textual similarity evaluation. finally we integrate this model into a complete e-learning system including a website and an android app.. this project develops a comprehensive e-learning platform that incorporates an automated grading system for arabic essay questions. by utilizing advanced machine learning and nlp techniques the system evaluates the semantic similarity between student responses and model answers providing instant feedback and reducing the burden on human instructors.

project_title: Electronic Medical Records System Using Blockchain Technology (MedRecChain)
student_names: Ghada Abdul Wahab Awwad, Fatma Mohamed Sorour, Heba Walid Seliem, Farouk Hamed Seliem, Ali Tharwat Mohamed, Aya Hamdy Abdalla, Fatma Samir El Sayed
abstract: MedRecChain is a decentralized solution designed to address the challenges faced by Electronic Medical Records (EMR) sharing systems. Leveraging the Ethereum network and IPFS technology, MedRecChain offers a secure and efficient platform for storing and exchanging medical records. Traditional EMR systems often encounter issues such as data breaches, lack of interoperability, and limited patient control over their own records. MedRecChain aims to overcome these challenges by employing blockchain technology, ensuring data immutability, transparency, and enhanced security. By utilizing the Ethereum network, MedRecChain establishes a decentralized infrastructure that allows healthcare providers, patients, and other authorized parties to access and share medical records in a seamless and trustless manner. The use of smart contracts further enhances the integrity and reliability of transactions, enabling automated and auditable interactions. In addition, MedRecChain incorporates IPFS (InterPlanetary File System) technology to efficiently store and distribute medical records. IPFS facilitates the decentralized storage and retrieval of data, eliminating reliance on a single central server and enabling greater scalability and resilience. The key features of MedRecChain include secure patient identification, granular access control, data privacy, and auditability. Patients have full control over their medical records, granting or revoking access to healthcare providers as needed. The system ensures data privacy through encryption techniques, while still allowing authorized parties to trace and audit record access and modifications. Through the implementation of MedRecChain, the healthcare industry can benefit from a decentralized and secure solution for EMR sharing. It has the potential to streamline record management, enhance patient privacy and control, and foster interoperability among different healthcare entities.
description: MedRecChain is a blockchain-based platform designed to modernize Electronic Medical Records (EMR) management. It replaces centralized, vulnerable, and fragmented EMR systems with a decentralized architecture that prioritizes patient data ownership, security, and interoperability. By integrating Ethereum for smart contract-based access control and IPFS for distributed file storage, the system ensures that medical records are immutable, transparent, and accessible only to authorized parties, thereby reducing the risk of data breaches and single points of failure.
problem_statement: Traditional centralized EMR systems suffer from security vulnerabilities (data breaches), lack of interoperability between different healthcare providers, fragmented patient records, limited patient control over their own data, and reliance on single points of failure, which can lead to system outages and compromised patient safety.
proposed_solution: A decentralized EMR sharing platform called MedRecChain that utilizes Ethereum blockchain for secure, transparent, and immutable transaction logging and access control, combined with IPFS for decentralized, fault-tolerant storage of medical records. This approach empowers patients with control over their data and ensures seamless, secure interoperability between healthcare entities.
objectives:
1. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
2. Improve system performance and reliability.
3. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
4. Implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms.
5. Enhance user experience and usability.

abstract: In order to effectively run a restaurant, cost and time saving are essential. Minimizing time by a few seconds for each table can speed up order processing, increase efficiency and boost profits. The biggest hurdle most restaurants face is the migration from a paper-pencil system to a completely automated touch-screen system. Most retail establishments choose to use E-menu system to handle their transactions.

By replacing manual methods with a digital interface, the system facilitates faster order processing, reduces human error, and improves the overall efficiency of restaurant transactions.
