abstract: Human history is observing a very strange time fighting an invisible enemy; the novel COVID-19 or coronavirus. Initially observed in the Wuhan province of China, now spreading too fast around the world, taking our loved ones, causing many losses, and forcing us to stay at home. But with the emergence of new technologies such as the internet, it is now possible to work, learn, and do lots of stuff while we are at home. And as we know, Learning is an essential process to keep acquiring new understanding, knowledge, behaviors, skills, values, attitudes, and preferences. We define electronic learning as courses that are specifically delivered via the internet to somewhere other than the classroom where the professor is teaching. Between multiple options, it is very crucial to select the best learning resource that forwards the learning process and provides you with the essential and best tools to learn fast and easily, so in this documentation, you will find a new E-learning system (Electronic School) that we have developed for students and teachers all over the world in general and students and teachers in Arab countries particularly. The system's objective briefly are to introduce a new user-friendly online learning platform that increases student's interaction and makes their learning experience more fun and helps teachers create courses easily and provides courses from authorized and verified teachers and educational institutions, also providing a wide range of quizzes, tests and assignment questions. In this Electronic School in order to be built we have to specify its requirements and what user needs and what the systems themselves need and we used different methods in order to make the system analysis, design, and implementation like UML (unified modeling language) diagrams and in order to make the web application coding we used different front and back end programming languages like (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) and MySQL databases.

project_title: Endpoint Security: Effective Protection Against Cyber Threats
student_names: Ahmed Osama Ahmed, Abdelhamid Ahmed Abdelhamid, Islam Essam Saeed, Esraa Essam Abdullatif, Mariam Mohamed Abdullah, Mohamed Mohamed Abdelkader, Marina Ramzy Shabib
abstract: Endpoint Security project presents a comprehensive Cybersecurity platform for managing Endpoints Security through three interconnected components: client-side protection, centralized management, and threat intelligence integration. The client component includes Host-based Intrusion Detection Systems (HIDS) and Malware Detection tools, which provide robust security measures directly on the endpoints. These systems monitor and analyze activities to detect suspicious behaviour and potential malware infections in real-time. The CenterPoint component functions as an API that manages all endpoints. It serves as the core of the system, overseeing and coordinating security policies, rules, and updates across the network. This centralized management ensures consistent security measures and facilitates streamlined control over multiple endpoints. The threat intelligence component focuses on fetching Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) from OTX AlienVault. This integration allows the system to stay updated with the latest threat intelligence, including IP addresses, URLs, file hashes, and YARA rules, enhancing its ability to detect and respond to emerging threats.
description: This project is a comprehensive web-based cybersecurity platform designed to secure network endpoints. It integrates real-time monitoring, centralized policy management, and automated threat intelligence to protect devices from malware, ransomware, and unauthorized network activities.
problem_statement: Organizations are highly vulnerable to cyber-attacks, such as spear phishing and malware, which can bypass human awareness and cause significant financial and data loss. Relying solely on manual security or employee education is insufficient, necessitating an automated, robust endpoint security solution.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a three-tiered security architecture: a client-side agent for HIDS and malware detection, a centralized API (CenterPoint) for policy management, and a threat intelligence module that integrates with OTX AlienVault to provide real-time updates on emerging threats using IOCs and YARA rules.
objectives:
1. Optimize resource allocation and task management.
2. Enhance user experience and usability.
3. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.
4. Enhance system security and protect sensitive user data.
5. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
6. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
7. Implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms.

abstract: This project focuses on creating a modern e-commerce platform tailored for the home decor industry, offering an enhanced and interactive shopping experience. Inspired by top brands like Home Zmart and IKEA, the platform includes a user-friendly interface where customers can browse products, view high-quality images, compare items, save favorites, and manage wish lists and carts easily. A key feature is the integration of advanced 3D Design and visualization tools, allowing users to preview decor items in their own spaces, making the shopping process more informed and personalized. Real-time order tracking and delivery updates add transparency and build customer trust. Vendors benefit from a subscription-based model, gaining access to intuitive tools for managing product listings, updating inventory, adjusting pricing, and tracking performance. An admin dashboard provides full control over users, vendors, and orders, alongside analytics for monitoring platform efficiency. Additionally, a built-in chatbot offers real-time assistance and recommendations, supporting both users and vendors with inquiries, updates, and troubleshooting. Secure payment methods ensure financial data is protected, while multiple checkout options offer flexibility. Overall, the platform delivers a seamless, efficient, and secure experience, combining innovative features with robust management tools to serve the needs of customers, vendors, and administrators alike.
description: Esaltare Dekör is an innovative e-commerce platform designed specifically for the home decor market. It bridges the gap between traditional shopping and modern technology by providing a user-centric interface, 3D visualization tools for space planning, and an AI-powered chatbot for personalized recommendations and support. The platform also includes a comprehensive vendor portal and an administrative dashboard for efficient management and data-driven decision-making.
problem_statement: Consumers face a fragmented shopping experience with limited personalization and an inability to visualize how decor items will look in their own homes. Simultaneously, vendors struggle to reach broader audiences and manage product listings effectively, while administrators lack the necessary tools to oversee platform operations and performance.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated e-commerce platform featuring 3D design visualization, an AI-driven chatbot for personalized assistance, a robust vendor management system with subscription tiers, and an administrative dashboard for analytics and order processing to streamline the entire home decor shopping journey.
objectives:
1. Enable real-time monitoring and tracking capabilities.
2. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
3. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
4. Improve system performance and reliability.
5. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
6. Optimize resource allocation and task management.

student_names: Ahmed Mamdoh Fadl, Emary Aymen Mohamed, Mohamed Abdalgafar Salem, Mohamed Adel Mahmoud Ghobara, Mahmoud Abdelwahid Elsayed Elkolaly, Mahmoud Mohamed Wafik Kharboush
abstract: The current advancements in information technology and communications have brought about significant changes in the business world. These developments have created an opportunity for the widespread acceptance of mobile payments. To understand the potential of this trend, we conducted a statistical survey to gauge the number of people using electronic payment methods and making purchases online. During our research, we discovered a couple of factors that hindered the adoption of electronic payment methods. First, small shops often faced challenges in providing electronic payment options due to various reasons such as cost, technical infrastructure, or lack of knowledge. Second, individuals expressed concerns about the security of their personal data, particularly when it came to their bank and visa information. These fears surrounding data theft or privacy breaches acted as a barrier to the adoption of electronic payment methods. To address these challenges and promote the usage of mobile payments, we developed a mobile application. This app serves as a platform for users to easily transfer money between each other. It is available for both Android and iOS devices, ensuring compatibility with the majority of smartphones. The primary purpose of this mobile app is to facilitate payment transactions in various scenarios. It can be used in commercial settings, allowing businesses to accept payments conveniently. Additionally, it provides a means for family members to transfer funds to each other, supports individuals in need, and enables easy donations. One of the key features of the app is the 'Just Scan to Pay' functionality. Users can make payments by scanning QR codes, using payment links, providing an order ID, or specifying a user ID. This ensures a seamless and secure transaction experience by offering these capabilities, the mobile app caters to a wide range of users, including online merchants, market sellers, shops, family members, workers, and freelancers. It addresses the needs of both individuals and businesses, making it a versatile and valuable tool in the evolving landscape of mobile payments.
description: The E-Wallet project is a mobile application designed to facilitate secure and convenient financial transactions for individuals and small businesses. It supports various payment methods, including QR code scanning, payment links, and user IDs, aiming to bridge the gap between traditional cash-based transactions and modern digital payment systems.
problem_statement: Small businesses face high costs and infrastructure barriers to accepting digital payments, while individuals have concerns regarding the security of their financial data and the lack of trust in online transactions. Additionally, there is a need for a more efficient way to handle daily expenses and transfers without relying solely on physical cash or bank cards.
proposed_solution: A cross-platform mobile application (Android and iOS) that provides a 'Just Scan to Pay' feature. The app integrates with payment gateways to support bank cards and mobile wallets, allowing for secure, on-the-spot transactions via QR codes, links, or IDs, thereby eliminating the need for expensive point-of-sale hardware.
objectives:
1. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
2. Enhance system security and protect sensitive user data.
3. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
4. Improve system performance and reliability.
5. Enhance user experience and usability.

project_title: Expert System for identifying and diagnosing Plants
student_names: Ahmed Hatem Abd Elsamie, Ahmed Reda Mousa, Ahmed Mohamed Ahmed Abd ElMoaty, Aml Salah Hussine, Samar Mohamed Mahmoud Sallam, Mostafa Ashraf Fathy Elbayomi
abstract: The main objective of this project is to create a robust and user-friendly platform that assists botanists, researchers, and enthusiasts in their endeavors to identify various plant species and diagnose diseases affecting plants. The proposed system incorporates a vast knowledge base of plant taxonomy and pathology, ensuring accurate and reliable results. To achieve the project's goals, an extensive dataset of plant images and associated metadata will be collected from diverse botanical sources and databases. The dataset will undergo meticulous preprocessing, including image augmentation and feature extraction, to extract meaningful and discriminative features that represent the unique characteristics of different plant species. The implementation of the Expert System will involve the utilization of state-of-the-art machine learning algorithms, such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs), to train a model capable of classifying plants based on their visual attributes.
description: This project develops an expert system designed to identify plant species and diagnose plant diseases. By leveraging machine learning techniques, specifically Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), the system allows users to upload images of plants to receive identification and health status information. It serves as a valuable tool for hobby gardeners, professional landscapers, and researchers by providing automated, accurate, and accessible botanical analysis.
problem_statement: Users often struggle to identify plant species or diagnose plant diseases accurately. Existing methods require manual research or expert consultation, which can be time-consuming and inaccessible to the general public or amateur gardeners.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an automated expert system that uses computer vision and deep learning (CNNs) to identify plants and detect diseases from user-uploaded images. The system provides detailed information about plant species, cultivation conditions, and disease treatment options.
objectives:
1. Generate accurate analytical insights and visualizations.
2. Provide efficient data analysis and reporting features.
3. Improve patient monitoring and healthcare management.
4. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
5. Train and optimize machine learning algorithms.
6. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
7. Enhance healthcare efficiency and accessibility.
8. Improve prediction accuracy using machine learning models.

project_title: Explore Egypt: An Intelligent Mobile Tour Guide Application
student_names:
Zeyad Ahmed Hassan,

abstract: The Egyptian government has made a lot of efforts to develop tourism and spread awareness of Egyptian civilization in the world by building projects like renovating museums and building new museums, such as the Grand Egyptian Museum. During the past five years, the General Administration of Recovered Antiquities has been able to recover 29 thousand artifacts. We have decided to participate in these efforts and to help spread awareness of the Egyptian identity in the world in an advanced way that keeps pace with the technological progress that the world is witnessing by linking the ancient Egyptian civilization with technology and also to keep up with the requirements of the times and the trends, especially with the spread of the phenomenon of travel bloggers and the presence of many people who like to rely on themselves and travel alone.
description: Explore Egypt is a mobile application designed to act as an intelligent, self-service tour guide for tourists visiting Egypt. The application leverages image recognition technology to allow users to scan statues, artifacts, or historical sites to receive detailed historical information. It also includes a chatbot feature to answer tourist questions and provides practical information such as local product pricing to prevent tourist exploitation.
problem_statement: Tourists in Egypt often face misconceptions about the country's history and identity, harassment, and fraud due to a lack of reliable information. Additionally, relying on human tour guides can sometimes be expensive, intrusive, or lead to exploitation regarding pricing and information accuracy.
proposed_solution: A mobile application that serves as an electronic tour guide. It features an image scanning function that identifies historical items and provides accurate historical context, a chatbot for real-time assistance, and a database of information to help tourists navigate Egypt independently, safely, and affordably.
objectives:
1. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
2. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
3. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
4. Enhance user experience and usability.
5. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
6. Improve system performance and reliability.

project_title: Eye and Mouth Movement Controlled Robot Arm: Enabling Independence and Accessibility for Individuals with Disabilities.
student_names: Rana Adel Kamal Jonamy Nassar, Abdelrahman Elsayed Mohamed, Yasmin Adel Soliman, Nada Ahmed Abdelsamiea, Salma Magdy Salah, Manar Abdelmonem Helmy, Eman Adel Tourky, Alaa Mohammed Hafez, Omar Sadiq Fathy
abstract: This research presents an innovative assistive robotic system designed to aid individuals with upper limb amputations or paralysis by harnessing the power of multimodal human-robot interaction. The system integrates eye-tracking technology to enable precise control of a robotic arm through intuitive eye movements, catering to the specific needs of users facing upper limb mobility challenges. Additionally, the gripping functionality of the robotic hand is seamlessly regulated through mouth gestures, providing a hands-free approach for users with limited or no arm functionality. The primary objective of this research is to enhance the independence and daily living capabilities of individuals with upper limb impairments by offering an intuitive and efficient control mechanism. By focusing on the unique needs of this user group, the project aims to contribute to the development of assistive technologies that empower users to perform a variety of tasks with greater ease and autonomy. The evaluation of the proposed multimodal assistive robotic system will involve user trials and assessments, with a particular emphasis on user satisfaction, system responsiveness, and the practicality of the designed interface for individuals facing upper limb mobility challenges. The research aspires to make significant strides in the field of assistive robotics, offering a promising avenue for improved human-robot interaction tailored to the specific needs of users with upper limb amputations or paralysis.
description: Innovations in robotics and assistive technology have opened new avenues for improving the lives of individuals with physical disabilities, particularly those facing upper limb amputations or paralysis. Despite significant advancements, challenges persist in providing intuitive and efficient solutions that cater to the diverse needs of this user group. Addressing these challenges requires a multifaceted approach that combines cutting-edge technology with user-centric design principles. This introduction sets the stage for a groundbreaking project focused on developing a multimodal assistive robotic system tailored to the unique requirements of individuals with upper limb impairments. By harnessing the power of eye-tracking technology and mouth gesture recognition, the project aims to create an intuitive and empowering interface that enhances users' independence and functionality in their daily lives. The following sections will delve into the motivations behind this project, the background context informing its development, the specific objectives guiding its implementation, and the anticipated outcomes that hold the promise of transforming the landscape of assistive technology for individuals facing upper limb mobility challenges. Through a holistic approach encompassing research, design, implementation, and evaluation, this project endeavors to make a meaningful and lasting impact on the lives of its intended beneficiaries.
problem_statement: Individuals with upper limb amputations or paralysis face significant challenges in performing daily tasks, limiting their independence and overall quality of life. Traditional assistive technologies often fall short in providing intuitive. There exists a pressing need for a sophisticated and user-friendly solution that not only addresses the limitations of existing technologies but also empowers users to regain control and autonomy in their daily activities. Current assistive devices often lack the precision and versatility required for intricate tasks, and hindering the user experience. Moreover . As a result, there is a critical gap in the availability of assistive technologies that seamlessly integrate with the user's natural abilities and enhance their capacity to interact with the environment. The proposed research seeks to address these challenges by developing a state-of-the-art multimodal assistive robotic system. By incorporating eye-tracking technology for precise control of a robotic arm and implementing mouth gesture-based gripping, the system aims to provide an intuitive and hands-free solution for users with upper limb amputations or paralysis. The research endeavors to bridge the existing gap in assistive technologies, offering a tailored and efficient solution that significantly improves the daily lives of individuals facing upper limb mobility challenges. Through a comprehensive exploration of user needs, technology integration, and rigorous evaluation, this research aims to contribute to the advancement of assistive robotics, ultimately empowering individuals with upper limb impairments to regain control,

The system leverages multimodal human-robot interaction, integrating eye-tracking technology for precise control of a robotic arm via intuitive eye movements. Additionally, the robotic hand's gripping functionality is seamlessly regulated through mouth gestures.

student_names: Taher Mostafa Abdel Hamid Elsheikh, Abdallah Adel Ibrahim Elsebaey, Ezzat Yasser Ezzat Afifi, Reem Adel Abdallah Abdelazim, Nada Ibrahim Mohamed Mostafa, Shaimaa Ibrahim Salama
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has necessitated the use of face masks in public areas to reduce virus transmission. This project develops an IoT-enabled smart door system that utilizes computer vision and deep learning to detect whether individuals are wearing face masks and to monitor their body temperature. Using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with the MobileNetV2 architecture, the system achieves high accuracy in real-time mask detection. If a person is not wearing a mask or has an abnormal body temperature, the system alerts authorities and controls door access, providing a cost-effective and reliable solution for public safety in locations such as hospitals, schools, and airports.
description: This project is a smart entry system designed to mitigate the spread of COVID-It integrates AI-based face mask detection with IoT hardware to monitor individuals at building entrances. The system uses a camera to capture video streams, processes them through a trained CNN model to classify mask usage, and employs a non-contact sensor to check body temperature. Based on these inputs, the system triggers alerts via email or mobile notifications and controls a physical gate or door mechanism to ensure only compliant individuals enter.

abstract: The Fair Electricity Distribution (FED) system addresses the chronic issues of electricity outages and inefficient meter reading in Egypt. By implementing a system that records consumption in real-time and transmits data to an online server, the project enables both the electricity company and the consumer to monitor usage, manage balances, and reduce consumption, thereby improving grid stability and billing accuracy.
description: The Fair Electricity Distribution (FED) project is an integrated smart grid solution designed to modernize electricity management. It features an Android application that allows users to track their daily electricity consumption, receive alerts about usage, control home power remotely, and pay bills digitally. For utility companies, it provides automated remote meter reading, eliminating the need for manual site visits and reducing billing disputes.
problem_statement: Electricity companies face significant challenges including frequent power outages due to high loads, difficulty in reading meters in remote areas, lack of consumer awareness regarding their actual energy usage, and inefficiencies in the billing and collection process.
proposed_solution: The FED system proposes an automated smart metering infrastructure that sends consumption data to a central server. This allows for real-time monitoring, remote power control, automated billing, and consumer-facing mobile tools to help users manage their energy consumption and costs effectively.

student_names: Eslam Ashraf Gaber Hassan, Eslam Mohamed Mohamed Abd-Alghany, Abdulrahman Ibrahim Mohamady Ibrahim, Mohamed Osama Ibrahim Mohamed, Mohamed Atef Ibrahim Ahmed
abstract: With rapid progress in recent years, the techniques that generate and manipulate multimedia content can now provide a very advanced level of realism. The line between real and synthetic media has become very thin. This project presents an analysis of methods for verifying the integrity of visual media, specifically focusing on the detection of manipulated images and videos. We propose an automated benchmark for facial manipulation detection based on DeepFakes, Face2Face, FaceSwap, and NeuralTextures. Our research demonstrates that using domain-specific knowledge and deep learning models improves forgery detection with high accuracy, outperforming human observers.
description: FakeFinder is a web-based application designed to detect manipulated facial images. By leveraging advanced deep learning techniques, specifically Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), the system analyzes uploaded images to determine their authenticity. The project aims to combat the spread of misinformation, identity theft, and extortion crimes by providing a reliable tool for users to verify if a facial image has been tampered with.
problem_statement: The rise of social media and advanced AI-powered tools has made it increasingly easy to create realistic fake images and videos. This manipulation poses significant security threats, including identity theft, fraud, defamation, and the spread of misinformation, making it difficult for ordinary users to distinguish between real and synthetic content.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a machine learning and deep learning-based web application that utilizes CNN models trained on large datasets of manipulated and genuine facial images. The system provides an automated, user-friendly interface that allows individuals to verify the authenticity of images, thereby protecting users from potential extortion and deception.

student_names: Abd Elrahman Ashraf Gharib, Maha Fathy Mahrous, Mai Elsayed Salem, Mostafa Ahmed Mahmoud, Mahasen Safwat Elsayed, Mohamed Abbas Mohamed
abstract: Hospitals and nursing homes are experiencing a simultaneous increase in injuries due to falls and a decrease in qualified staff hires. More than 16000 elderly patients die because of injuries sustained from falls each year and the severity of the issue is exacerbated by the staff-to patient ratio. Solving the problem involves implementing preventative measures that will minimize incidents leading to injury without necessitating a larger staff. The project used in conjunction with a current product that aims to prevent falls from ever occurring, like the sleep safe bed, can help decrease many of the problems. During hours when there is a smaller on-call staff, such as at night, the patient and the personnel have the option of activating the system to detect falls. Camera is strategically placed, depending on the patient's privacy concerns and desired level of safety, to record movement. A feed of the video is continuously transmitted to the local computer on the network. Where the data is analyzed and processed to determine if a fall has occurred and whether it medical assistance should be sent. The computer can differentiate between different types of movements by looking at certain conditions and if the analyzed activity fulfills the criteria. If help is necessary, an alarm is sent to nurse's station in order to alert staff.
description: This project is a computer vision-based monitoring system designed to detect falls among elderly patients in hospitals or nursing homes. By analyzing video feeds in real-time, the system identifies abnormal movements or sudden changes in orientation that indicate a fall, subsequently triggering an automated alarm to notify medical staff for rapid intervention.
problem_statement: Elderly patients frequently suffer from falls in healthcare settings, leading to severe injuries or death, a situation worsened by high patient-to-staff ratios and limited monitoring capabilities during off-peak hours.
proposed_solution: A computer vision system that continuously monitors patient movement via strategically placed cameras, processes the video data to distinguish between normal activity and falls, and automatically alerts nursing staff when a fall is detected.

student_names: Ahmed Mostafa Abdallah, Fathy Tarek Ali, Mohamed Ahmed Abdel-Mohsen, Mohamed Belal Abdel-Majeed, Mahmoud Ahmed Yaseen, Mahmoud Ashraf Ali
abstract: Fall detection of the elderly is a major public health problem. This project is a survey of systems, algorithms, and sensors for the automatic early detection of the fall of elderly persons. It points out the difficulty to compare the performances of the different systems due to the lack of a common framework. In this paper, we develop a low-cost fall detection system through a Raspberry Pi module to exactly detect an event when an accidental fall occurs. The system uses acceleration and pose estimation to detect early fall events. If a fall is detected, the system sends an alert message along with location information to the responsible person.
description: This project presents a low-cost, vision-based fall detection system designed for the elderly. By utilizing a Raspberry Pi and a camera, the system monitors individuals in a static environment without requiring them to wear any devices. It employs pose estimation and machine learning (SVM) to distinguish between accidental falls and normal activities, triggering an automated alert to caregivers via a mobile application integrated with Firebase.
problem_statement: Existing wearable and non-wearable fall detectors are often unreliable, prone to false alarms, require maintenance, or are uncomfortable for elderly users. Current vision-based systems are often expensive, lack portability, and struggle to differentiate between accidental falls and normal activities like lying down or sleeping, leading to high false-positive rates.
proposed_solution: A low-cost, vision-based system using a Raspberry Pi 3 and a camera module. The solution implements pose estimation to track body landmarks and uses a Support Vector Machine (SVM) algorithm to classify movement patterns. When a fall is detected, the system sends a real-time notification to a caregiver's mobile application via Firebase.

student_names: Alaa Karem Mahmoud Ibraheem, Mohamed Bahgat Nabawy, Nada Mohamed Mohamed Abo-ElFetooh, Mostafa Mahmoud Ahmed
abstract: Fetal death is one of the major problems facing medicine in the current era for understandable and incomprehensible reasons. One of the most common causes that cause the death of the fetus in the first months is problems that occur in the heart of the fetus, and as we know that the heart of the fetus begins to form in the third week of pregnancy; It begins to palpitate in the fifth week of pregnancy; Its growth is completed in the seventh week of pregnancy; Then some heart problems begin to appear in some fetuses, such as congenital heart defects, which, if not discovered quickly, may cause complications and lead to the death of the fetus. In this project, we aim to detect heart diseases that the fetus may be exposed to and that can threaten its life early, diagnose it and take the appropriate solution to treat it as soon as possible, so this project describes a system consisting of a website for doctors and the mother of the fetus linked to a database and models based on machine learning and deep learning To discover the symptoms that appear on the child early. By searching on international sites about the most common problems facing the heart of fetuses, we were able to reach the most common problems that threaten the life of the fetus and search for how to save the fetus in any possible way during the nine stages of pregnancy. using sonar of different types or ultrasound waves; It is one of the most important means of modern diagnosis in the world of medicine due to its accuracy, speed of conduct, and ease of examination, and through periodic follow-up of the mother with the specialist doctor and conducting sonar on a regular basis, this helps the treating doctor to make an accurate treatment decision and prevent any complications from occurring, and thus we can be able to From preserving the life of the fetus during the various stages of pregnancy, finally we have integrated our data set with a website to facilitate the examination, and the accuracy of our models reaches 99%. The pregnancy period is considered one of the most sensitive and terrifying periods, due to the many problems that the pregnant woman is exposed to during this stage, and the death of the fetus in the womb is one of the most dangerous and harmful problems. The occurrence of this matter is rare, as it affects 1% of all pregnant women, and there are many reasons behind The occurrence of fetal death in the womb, as it may be a result of a defect in the lining of the uterus, or as a result of infection with some diseases such as diabetes and blood pressure, which can be prevented through periodic follow-up of the safety of pregnancy and the health of the fetus, and this can be detected through the use of ultrasound devices.

project_title: Find Missing people using Face Recognition
student_names: Ahmed Hamdy Khater Arafa, Eslam Ahmed Mohamed Elabady, Khaled Ayman Abd Elhaleem Soliman, Mohamed Ali Soliman Ali, Mostafa Ali Soliman Ali, Salem Gamal Salem Mohamed
abstract: Our project "Find Missing People Using Face Recognition" is an Android application that aims to help users find missing individuals by utilizing advanced facial recognition technology. With this application, users can upload an image of the missing person, along with other relevant details, such as their name, age, and last known location. The uploaded image will then be compared with the images in the system's database using state-of-the-art facial recognition algorithms, which will allow the application to identify and match the missing person's face with a high level of accuracy.
description: The project is a mobile-based platform designed to assist in the search for missing persons. It leverages facial recognition technology to match uploaded photos of missing individuals against a centralized database. The system aims to provide a faster, more accurate, and accessible alternative to traditional, manual, and time-consuming search methods like door-to-door searches or unorganized social media posts.
problem_statement: The current process for finding missing persons is inefficient, relying on manual reporting, police records, and unorganized social media posts. There is no centralized, easily accessible platform to match missing persons using biometric data, leading to delays and increased emotional and financial burdens on families.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an Android mobile application that uses advanced facial recognition technology to identify missing persons. By allowing users to upload photos and details, the system automates the matching process against a database, significantly reducing the time required to locate missing individuals from months to minutes.
objectives:
1. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
2. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
3. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
4. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
5. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
6. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.

abstract: This project presents a robust fingerprint recognition system designed for both verification and identification purposes. By leveraging FPGA technology, the system provides a high-performance, reconfigurable hardware solution for capturing, processing, and matching unique fingerprint patterns to ensure secure authentication.
description: The project implements a biometric security system that utilizes fingerprint scanning to verify or identify individuals. It operates in two primary modes: Verification, which performs a one-to-one comparison to confirm a claimed identity, and Identification, which performs a one-to-many comparison to determine an unknown user's identity against a stored database. The system is built on FPGA architecture to allow for efficient, hardware-level processing of biometric data.
problem_statement: Traditional security methods like passwords or ID cards can be lost, stolen, or forgotten. There is a need for a more reliable, unique, and non-transferable method of identity verification that is robust against unauthorized access.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a hardware-accelerated fingerprint recognition system implemented on an FPGA. This approach ensures high-speed feature extraction and matching, providing a secure and reliable biometric authentication mechanism that is difficult to circumvent.

student_names: Omar Mohammed Ibrahim, Mohammed Saad Hassan, Mohammed Elsayed Fathy, Mohammed Abdel Aziz Mohammed, Mohammed Abdelhalim Mohammed, Aya Essam Ali, Mohammed Atef Abdelrahman, Mohammed Ashraf Ezzat
abstract: This project presents the design and development of a smart service marketplace platform that connects customers in need of on-demand services with qualified technicians through a secure, structured, and intelligent workflow. The system aims to address common challenges in traditional service markets, such as lack of trust, inefficient technician selection, payment disputes, and service quality assurance. The proposed platform supports two primary user roles: customers and technicians. Customers can register, create detailed service requests, receive price offers, select suitable technicians, and securely complete payments through an escrow-based payment mechanism. Technicians can register, define their service category, update their location, view nearby service requests, submit fixed-price offers, and receive payments only after service completion is confirmed. An administrative role is included to manage account verification, resolve disputes, monitor system activity, and ensure platform integrity. A key feature of the system is a rule-based technician recommendation module that ranks technicians based on multiple factors, including historical ratings, geographic proximity, service completion history, responsiveness, and reliability metrics. Additionally, the platform integrates artificial intelligence models for rating calculation and anomaly detection to enhance fairness, prevent feedback manipulation, and maintain trust within the marketplace. The system incorporates a comprehensive booking and payment flow, where customer payments are securely held in escrow and released to technicians only after successful service completion or administrative confirmation. Dispute handling mechanisms are implemented to protect both parties and ensure transparent resolution processes. Overall, this project delivers a scalable, secure, and intelligent service management solution that improves service quality, enhances user trust, and optimizes technician selection through data-driven decision-making.
description: With the rapid advancement of information technology and the widespread use of smart devices, digital platforms have become essential tools for delivering services efficiently and reliably. Many everyday services such as maintenance, repairs, and technical support still rely on traditional methods that suffer from poor organization, lack of transparency, unreliable pricing, and limited trust between customers and service providers. These issues often result in wasted time, inconsistent service quality, and unresolved disputes. This graduation project addresses these challenges by designing and implementing an intelligent service marketplace system that connects customers with qualified technicians through a secure and structured digital platform. The proposed system enables customers to submit service requests, receive offers from nearby technicians, compare options, and complete payments in a safe and transparent manner. At the same time, technicians are provided with a platform to showcase their skills, respond to relevant service requests, and receive fair compensation after successful service completion. The system is designed with multiple user roles, including customers, technicians, and administrators, each with clearly defined responsibilities and access permissions. To enhance trust and service quality, the platform integrates a rating and feedback mechanism, an escrow-based payment process, and administrative dispute management. In addition, the system employs data-driven techniques to support technician recommendation and performance evaluation based on factors such as ratings, proximity, responsiveness, and service history. This project emphasizes system design, analysis, and implementation, following a structured software engineering methodology. Functional and non-functional requirements are carefully analyzed to ensure scalability, security, usability, and reliability. The proposed solution aims to improve the overall service experience, reduce operational inefficiencies, and establish a trustworthy digital environment for both customers and technicians.
problem_statement: Despite the widespread use of digital platforms, many service-based markets such as maintenance, repair, and technical services still suffer from inefficiency, lack of transparency, and poor trust management. Customers often struggle to find reliable technicians, while technicians face difficulties accessing suitable job opportunities in a fair and organized manner., Difficulty in Finding Reliable Service Providers: Customers frequently rely on informal recommendations or unverified sources when searching for technicians. This approach often results in uncertainty regarding service quality, pricing, and reliability, leading to dissatisfaction and repeated service failures., Inefficient Service Request and Communication Process: Traditional service booking methods lack structured workflows for submitting requests, comparing offers, and tracking service progress. Poor communication between customers and technicians can cause delays, misunderstandings, and incomplete service delivery., Lack of Trust and Secure Payment Handling: One of the major challenges in service marketplaces is the absence of secure payment mechanisms. Customers fear paying before service completion, while technicians risk not receiving payment after delivering the service. The lack of escrow systems and dispute management increases financial risk for both parties., Absence of Intelligent Technician Evaluation and Selection: Existing solutions rarely provide intelligent mechanisms for ranking or recommending technicians based on performance, ratings, proximity, and reliability. This makes it difficult for customers to choose the most suitable technician and limits fair competition among service providers., Limited Administrative Control and Dispute Resolution: Many platforms lack effective administrative oversight to manage user verification, resolve disputes, and monitor system integrity. This reduces platform credibility and affects long-term sustainability. This project addresses these challenges by proposing an intelligent, secure, and scalable service marketplace system that streamlines service requests, enhances trust through escrow-based payments, supports data-driven technician recommendation, and provides administrative control to ensure fairness and reliability.
proposed_solution: This project is an innovative initiative aimed at improving the efficiency, reliability, and transparency of service-based marketplaces by leveraging modern software technologies. The proposed system provides a digital platform that connects customers with qualified technicians, enabling seamless service requests, intelligent technician selection, and secure service execution. The system utilizes structured workflows and data-driven mechanisms to streamline the service lifecycle, starting from request submission and offer comparison to service completion and payment processing. By incorporating intelligent recommendation techniques, the platform assists customers in selecting the most suitable technicians based on multiple factors such as ratings, service history, proximity, and responsiveness. To enhance trust and reliability, the system implements a secure escrow-based payment model that ensures fair transactions for both customers and technicians. Administrative controls are included to manage user verification, monitor system activity, and resolve disputes effectively. The proposed platform is designed to support both professional technicians and service seekers, fostering a transparent and efficient environment for service delivery.
objectives:
1. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
2. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
3. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
4. Enhance system security and protect sensitive user data.
5. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
6. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
7. Implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms.
8. Improve workflow and management efficiency.

abstract: Computers are being used in every aspect of our daily life. Beginning from scientific computation and research, computers are assisting us business, banking, e-commerce, publishing, word processing, database management, communication, traffic control etc... Everyday new applications are being developed benefit the human beings. New area of technology is being developed to overcome the limitation of traditional input, output devices of the computer. One of the major trends in the computer communication is to develop applications using virtual environment where direct interaction to the computers through tradio nal 2D keyboard, pen, or mouse-oriented graphical user interfaces are not suitable. Rather devices that sense body (e.g. hand) position and orientation, direction of gaze, speech and sound, facial expression, galvanic skin response, and other aspects of human behavior or state can be used to model communication between a human and the environment. Significant research efforts are underway to capture human behavior or gesture and develop system for communicating to the medically disabled people, machine controlling, robot controlling, videoconferencing, traffic controlling, etc... Nowadays the majority of the human-computer interaction (HCI) is based on mechanical devices such as keyboards, mouse, joysticks or game pads.
description: In recent years there has been a growing interest in a class of methods based on computer vision due to its ability to recognize human gestures in a natural way. These methods used as input the images acquired from a camera or from a stereo pair of cameras. That use of only basic input such as mouse and keyboard is limiting the creativity and capabilities of the user. In this project we developed a machine-user interface which implements Free hand mouse using simple computer vision techniques. Interface allows the user to use their hands to control the mouse as well as easily move and open windows that are open on their screen. This interface is simple enough to be run using an ordinary webcam and requires little training. Human-computer interaction (HCI) expanding the ways that people are able to interact with their computers through using simple gesture.

abstract: The project is a full-fledged e-commerce platform equipped with a powerful recommendation system. The primary goal of the platform is to provide an engaging and personalized shopping experience to customers while maximizing sales for the business. The platform is built using modern web development technologies and frameworks, ensuring a high level of performance, scalability, and security. The recommendation system is the core feature of the platform, designed to provide personalized product recommendations to each customer based on their browsing and purchase history. The system employs advanced machine learning algorithms and data analysis techniques to understand each customer's preferences and behavior, thus offering highly relevant and accurate recommendations.
description: This project is a comprehensive e-commerce platform that integrates a sophisticated recommendation engine. It aims to solve the problem of information overload for users by providing tailored product suggestions, thereby improving user engagement, increasing customer loyalty, and driving higher sales for businesses.
problem_statement: E-commerce users often feel overwhelmed by the vast number of products available, making it difficult to find the right items. This lack of personalization leads to decreased user interest and lower conversion rates for businesses.
proposed_solution: The development of an e-commerce platform that utilizes machine learning-based recommendation algorithms to analyze user behavior and purchase history, providing personalized product suggestions that simplify the shopping process and increase customer satisfaction.

student_names: Mostafa Reda Abo El-ghait, Mostafa Hassan Maher, Mahmoud Mohamed Hamed, Mona Samy Sobhy, Mona Abd Ellatef Sayed
abstract: The project demonstrates the concept of gesture controls for robotic applications. By utilizing a 6DOF robotic arm controlled by an Arduino board, the system enables users to manipulate robots using human hand gestures, eliminating the need for traditional remotes or expensive sensors. The system detects and tracks hand movements using OpenCV and Haar Cascade Classifiers, transmitting control information to the robotic arm via a Bluetooth connection.
description: This project presents a cost-effective, intuitive method for controlling robotic systems through natural human hand gestures. It integrates computer vision techniques to interpret hand movements in real-time and translates these movements into actionable commands for a 6-degree-of-freedom (6DOF) robotic arm. The system is designed to be modular, allowing the gesture-control interface to be adapted for various other robotic or software applications.
problem_statement: Traditional methods of controlling robots often require complex remote controllers or expensive, specialized sensors, which can be cumbersome and inaccessible for general users.
proposed_solution: A gesture-based control system that uses a standard camera to capture hand movements, processes the video feed using OpenCV and Haar Cascade machine learning classifiers to identify gestures, and sends the resulting coordinates to an Arduino-controlled robotic arm via Bluetooth.
objectives:
1. Enhance user experience and usability.
2. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
3. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
4. Improve system performance and reliability.
5. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.

7. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
8. Support future scalability and feature expansion.

project_title: Government Procurement and Warehouse Management System
student_names: Ahmed Mohamed Shaaban Mohamed Ramadan, Aml Sabry Ahmed Al-Khudari Nassar, Ziad Adel Abdullah Eid, Sohaila Amr Mahmoud Khairy, Safwa Mohamed Ahmed Mohamed, Mahmoud Al-Sayed Abdel Aziz Mahmoud, Mohamed Agami Fikry Qutb, Yasmine Abdel Rahman Mahmoud Sayed
abstract: Our project Government Procurement and Warehouse Management talks about the digital transformation the two sub systems: Government Procurement Management and Warehouse Management in accordance with the Egyptian Auctions and Tenders Regulation Law No. 89 of 1998 where all processes that were carried out manually will be converted to electronic using a web-based information system to improve efficiency and accuracy and reduce costs and developed to facilitate material management and delivery and improve planning and inventory tracking. The tool will provide an easy-to-use interface for users and provide detailed reports for data analysis and strategic decision making. It is expected that this project will contribute to improving the university's governmental and educational operations and better achieving the institution's goals
description: The government procurement and warehouse system are considered one of the vital systems in organizing and managing government operations. However, these systems may encounter some manual issues that can affect their efficiency and effectiveness. Below are some common problems in government procurement and warehouse system.
problem_statement: The government procurement and warehouse system are considered one of the vital systems in organizing and managing government operations. However, these systems may encounter some manual issues that can affect their efficiency and effectiveness. Below are some common problems in government procurement and warehouse system. Manual system problems: 1- Lack of organization of operations, purchasing management and warehouse management 2- Difficulty communicating with Decision Maker 3- Wasting time and effort due to manual work 4- The possibility of human errors leading to increased chances of administrative errors or manual data entry 5- Difficulty in creating reports 6- Security challenges: You may face challenges related to data security from abroad. 7- Difficulty tracking information. Controlling information manually can be difficult and lead to data loss. 8- Difficulty in creating comprehensive and accurate reports due to manual processes. 9- Difficulty organizing the inventory and ensuring the accuracy of the information. 10- Labor costs may be higher due to the need for additional employees to manage operations. 11- Difficulty in complying with quality and regulatory requirements manually. 12- The difficulty of performing a comprehensive graphical analysis is due to the system's reliance on manual data. 13- Difficulty updating the system manually to keep pace with technological developments and industrial requirements. 14- Difficulty in quality control due to manual processes. Warehouse system problems in previous systems 1- Purchasing warehouse management systems can be expensive, especially for small businesses. 2- The risks of use in some electronics require extensive training for users, which may lead to problems in their adoption. 3- Limited integration, which may include some integration with other systems in the company. 4- The possibility of poor performance in some cases, especially as the volume of data increases. 5- Reliance on an Internet connection in the case of a cloud system, reliance may be on dealing with an Internet connection. 6- Automatic updates may include some problems if they are not fully provided. 7- Security challenges: You may face challenges related to data security from abroad. 8- Difficulty in customizing the solutions: Some solutions may be less customizable to meet the unique needs of the company. 9- Hardware Requirements Some systems may require higher hardware specifications, which causes additional cost.
proposed_solution: Our project aimed solve this problem by transform the Government warehouse and purchasing system based on paper and manual work into an integrated digital system. This project will include the development of a custom software that collects and analyzes data related to inventory and purchases, and provides an easy-to-use interface for employees to manage various operations.
objectives:

3. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
4. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
5. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.

7. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.

student_names: Ahmed Adel Mohyeldin Ahmed, Youssef Samir Mohamed Ali, Khaled Ahmed Salah Elbadawy, Elsayed Rady Elsayed Abdelhamid, Youssef Selim Noshi Mohammed, Mai Mossad Ragab Mohamed, Manar Hussein Ahmed Hussein, Aia Abdelrahman Ali Abdelrahman, Hagar Abdelfatah Mohamed
abstract: The proposed supermarket system with integrated recycling capabilities aims to create a sustainable and environmentally friendly shopping experience. The system incorporates innovative features that encourage and facilitate recycling practices among customers while streamlining the supermarket operations. The primary goal of the system is to promote recycling by incentivizing and rewarding customers for their eco-conscious behaviours. It achieves this through the implementation of smart recycling stations strategically placed throughout the supermarket. This application is equipped with computer vision mechanisms that can identify and categorize different recyclable materials such as plastic bottles, cans, and paper. Customers are encouraged to deposit their recyclables at the market, and in return, they receive rewards or recycling points that can be redeemed within the supermarket. The recycling system utilizes a user-friendly interface, guiding customers on the proper disposal of items and providing real-time feedback on the environmental impact of their recycling efforts.
description: Green Market (RE Earth) is a comprehensive supermarket recycling rewards mobile application designed to combat waste mismanagement. By leveraging advanced machine learning and computer vision, the app allows users to scan recyclable items (plastic bottles, cans, paper) via their smartphone camera. The system automatically identifies these items and awards points to the user, which can be redeemed for discounts or purchases within the supermarket, thereby fostering a culture of environmental responsibility and sustainable shopping.
problem_statement: The project addresses the substantial environmental challenge of widespread littering and improper waste disposal of items like plastic bottles, cans, and paper. This mismanagement poses significant threats to public health, marine and terrestrial ecosystems, and contributes to visual pollution, while also representing a missed economic opportunity for resource recovery.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a mobile application that integrates real-time object detection technology to identify and classify recyclable items. The system incentivizes users to recycle by providing a points-based reward mechanism, where points earned through recycling can be redeemed for discounts at the supermarket, thus creating a circular economy model that benefits both the environment and the consumer.
objectives:
1. Train and optimize machine learning algorithms.
2. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
3. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
4. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
5. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
6. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.

abstract: The purpose of this project is to design and implement an interactive single-player first-person shooter game using the Android platform. The game utilizes Augmented Reality (AR) technology to immerse the player within the game world by fixing the game camera to the player's perspective. This document details the development process, system analysis, and the technical challenges overcome during the creation of the application.
description: Gun War is an interactive mobile game that integrates Augmented Reality to provide an immersive first-person shooter experience. The application leverages smartphone hardware, including cameras and MEMS sensors (accelerometer, GPS, compass), to overlay virtual game elements onto the real-world environment, allowing for dynamic interaction and navigation.
problem_statement: Traditional mobile games often lack physical immersion and spatial awareness. The project addresses the challenge of determining the camera's pose relative to virtual objects in real-time, which is a fundamental requirement for creating a convincing Augmented Reality experience.
proposed_solution: The team developed an Android-based AR game that uses marker-based tracking and natural feature detection to anchor virtual objects in the physical environment. By utilizing the device's built-in sensors and camera, the game provides a seamless transition between the real world and the virtual game space.

6. Provide efficient data analysis and reporting features.

abstract: The main goal of our project is to make an android application to help pilgrims to perform Hajj more easy and comfortable. Pilgrim (Hajj) is one of the main pillars of Islam and the journey of a lifetime, which every adult Muslim man and woman desires to perform. Every year about three million pilgrims from all around the world visit Mecca. These people move between different religious sites during the annual pilgrimage, some of them did not know what they are. The aim of the project is to help the user (Pilgrim) to find interesting places surrounding the current whereabouts to help him at easily knowing the places surrounding him by using GPS. Also help reduce or avoid the congestion found in some places of pilgrimage, which does not know anything about the pilgrim's arrivals. It also helps to connect each other pilgrims, I avoid the loss of people in the middle of the crowds of pilgrims. It also allows the user (Pilgrim) to know the rituals of Haj and performed true way to know and not need to carry the books in order to help him to know and to do bored reading process. In addition to other services that help pilgrim such as emergency calls, embassies (their phone numbers and addresses) and Prayer Time. The mobile application is designed for normal users to help users to avoid crowded places and include a step-by-step mini guide to the Hajj rituals, so that you know what steps you should do each day, and what rite to perform. project_title: Health care and heart disease prediction using wearable device
student_names: Ahmed Ali Abdullah, Yoseff Ashraf Karim, Hazem Ahmed Heshmat, Zyad Ahmed Saad, Mohamed Salah Yoseff
abstract: In order to adapt to the development of the mobile internet, intelligent, small mobile terminal will be the future of development . this paper describes the implementation of data communication between android operating system and pc . besides, this paper also presents some solution of key issues including the event processing of command button and mouse movement involved pc server, etc. to meet the needs of universities and schools in the next generation of learning operation development and education institutions . using this pp (Android based pc controller ), we can control on in pc using an android application, we can send mouse event to control the mouse of computer, we can send character as a keyboard, we can control all media working plus to the PowerPoint and pdf, we can also send the Qr code reader after reading it with other helping application, finally this app can send the sound waves to make the sound appear on the receiver which is the computer or any pc that installed and working the server . finally, an android wireless mouse, keyboard, media, PowerPoint and pdf software based on android operating system on mobile app and java on pc using the wireless. we are hoping to replace similar electronic pointer and achieve long rang wireless control such as joystick .
description: This project presents a dual-purpose system that integrates health monitoring with remote PC control functionality. It utilizes wearable technology to track heart rate data for disease prediction while simultaneously providing a robust Android-based interface to remotely control computer peripherals, media playback, and presentation software.
problem_statement: There is a lack of integrated systems that combine personal health monitoring with versatile, long-range remote control capabilities for educational and professional environments. Users often require separate devices for health tracking and managing computer-based presentations or media, leading to inefficiency and hardware clutter.
proposed_solution: The project implements a comprehensive Android application that communicates with a Java-based PC server to enable remote mouse, keyboard, and media control. Additionally, it incorporates a wearable device module designed to collect heart rate data, which is processed to provide insights into potential heart disease risks.
objectives:
1. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
2. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
3. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
4. Enhance healthcare efficiency and accessibility.
5. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
6. Provide interactive educational tools and resources.
7. Improve patient monitoring and healthcare management.

abstract: The medical community is one of the most important parts in our daily life. Nowadays, the medical community is being computerized. We are aiming to make the whole process much easier starting from the patient booking his appointment to doctors, till attending the appointment. In addition, we aim to help the doctors to write their prescriptions online and upload them to the patients. The best part is to help doctors with their diagnoses by using some Machine Learning Models to detect some disease based on the patient analysis.
description: NABDAHA is an organized Hospital Management website programmed to deal with day-to-day processes and activities. student_names: Aya Mahmoud, Hassan Adel, Menna Kamel, Mostafa Ashraf, Aya Saad
abstract: The health care scene is witnessing continuous development, with a focus on improving accessibility and increasing comfort for patients. Our innovative project stands out by offering a comprehensive platform that revolutionizes healthcare experiences. We provide a variety of services that override the traditional offline-healthcare process. Our platform facilitates access to vital medical facilities such as online pharmacy, and medical laboratories, and includes an Al-powered chatbot to identify several diseases as an initial diagnosis. In conclusion, our project highlights the potentials of technology to facilitate the healthcare journey, representing its role in revolutionizing the medical field for the better. The project consists of three parts: A website featuring functionalities for patients, medical lab operators, and pharmacy as a service; the mobile application serving patients, and nurses; and the chatbot that works on diagnosing a certain number of diseases and provides necessary analyses for the initial disease diagnosis, with patients being able to interact with it via the website and the mobile application.
description: This project aims to develop a user-friendly online platform that facilitates convenient access to medical services and medications. It caters to both users seeking personal healthcare solutions and medical professionals managing laboratories, system pharmacy, and medical consultation. 4 Objectives Below are the project objectives that solve the limitations of the current system. For Patients: Simplify access to medical services: Enable users to browse available laboratories, view their services and details, and request appointments online, also to buy medicine online. Enhance privacy and security: Provide a secure platform for users to register, store personal information, and receive medical test results privately. Improve convenience: Allow users to schedule appointments, pay for services online, saving time and effort. Empower informed decision-making: Equip users with search functions, medication availability checks, and chatbot consultations to make informed healthcare choices. For Medical Laboratories: Expand reach and attract new clients: Offer services online to a wider audience and increase visibility. Streamline appointment management: Efficiently manage service requests, and assign tasks to nurses. appointments, Improve service delivery: Facilitate home visits, receive feedback, and ensure patient satisfaction. Enhance communication and privacy: Upload test results directly to the platform and privately share them with users. For Pharmacy: Increase online pres

Traditional manual approaches are often slow, inefficient, and prone to errors, making it difficult to track patient records, manage healthcare operations, and access important medical information in a timely and organized manner.

student_names: Aalaa Ahmed Elsayed, Aya Essam EL-Dien Abd Allah, Omnia Alaa Elsayed, Atef Gamal Atef, Mostafa Borham, Taha Hussien
abstract: The world today isn't the one which it was yesterday. With the continuing evolution in technology and technological applications on medical field, innovative products and services have been emerging every day. Wearable gadgets have risen up as revolution in the medical field for patient care. A number of tech giants are pouring into this segment; wearables have already shown an impact on various fields such as communication and navigation; but perhaps the greatest potential lies in healthcare. Since our society is rapidly aging, there exists an urgent need to shift from passive medical care to preventive medicine and health management, to improve individuals' quality of life and reduce medical expenses. At the same time, rapid advances in micro-machine and LSI technologies with revolutionary advances in wireless information and communication technology have enabled development of wearable sensing systems for healthcare monitoring in daily life. We have been developing our project on the basis of wearable sensors for services to counter lifestyle diseases.
description: In this system, a patient carries hardware equipped with sensors to monitor body temperature and heart rate. This data is transmitted via Bluetooth to an Android smartphone application, which then sends the information to a cloud server. The system includes an automated detection mechanism for heart attack symptoms; if abnormalities are detected, the application sends an SMS alert containing the patient's status and GPS location to their doctor and relatives.
problem_statement: The healthcare environment is increasingly technology-oriented, yet patients still face the risk of unexpected death due to heart attacks, often caused by a lack of timely medical intervention and the difficulty of maintaining regular doctor checkups.
proposed_solution: A wearable health monitoring system that uses sensors to track vital signs in real-time, transmits data to a smartphone and cloud server, and provides automated emergency alerts to medical professionals and family members when critical health abnormalities are detected.
objectives:
1. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
2. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
3. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
4. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
5. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
6. Optimize resource allocation and task management.
7. Improve system performance and reliability.
8. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.

project_title: Heart Diseases detector using Deep Learning
student_names: Ahmed Abd El-Salam Gameel Abd El-Salam, Fady Girgis Aziz Girgis, Hamdi Mahmoud Fawzy Ellithy, Hamada Mohamed Abd El-Naby Ali, Hassan Mohamed Hassan Gaafer, Khaled Ahmed Mohamed Ahmed
abstract: Heart disease is one of the most serious diseases spread. Methods such as x-rays, CT scans and magnetic resonance imaging are available to detect heart disease and to help surgeons provide better visibility. Moreover, many researchers have found that people die because of the inaccurate discovery of the affected part of the heart. It is necessary to find the exact part of the affected area in the heart. Medical image analysis is the most difficult field these days. This project describes the method of discovery and extraction of heart disease from MRI images to the patient through CNN deep learning algorithm. This work will help to identify the type of disease that saves valuable time for doctors and pathologists to diagnose the disease automatically in a short period of time.
description: This project focuses on automating the detection and classification of heart diseases using medical imaging (MRI). By leveraging Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), the system processes 2D and 3D medical images to identify abnormalities, aiming to reduce diagnostic time and improve accuracy for cardiologists and pathologists. The system includes a user-friendly GUI developed in Java that connects to a WAMP server to manage patient history and diagnostic data.
problem_statement: Manual analysis of medical images for heart disease is time-consuming, prone to human error, and subject to operator fatigue, which can lead to inaccurate diagnoses and delayed treatment for patients.
proposed_solution: An automated deep learning-based system using CNNs to process and classify MRI images. The solution includes image preprocessing (equalization and layer rounding), a robust classification model, and a Java-based GUI integrated with a WAMP server for efficient patient data management.
objectives:
1. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
2. Enhance user experience and usability.
3. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
4. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
5. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
6. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
7. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
