project_title: Helping Autistics using web and mobile application
student_names: Mohamed Adel Zaki Elbaal, Eslam Tarek Elgeyoshi, Ahmed Farouk Atallah, Mahmoud Alaa eldin Abd-Elmaged, Mohamed Elnady Mohamed, Mohamed Elsayed Okasha
abstract: At present, some people still don't know what Autism is and how much it affects Children. It is difficult to identify autism spectrum disorders in a child before reaching the age of 12 months, but they can be diagnosed in general at the age of two years, and the distinctive features of the onset of the disease have a delay or temporary decline in the development of language and social skills, and the repetition of stereotypes in his behavior. Autism also called autism spectrum disorder (ASD) is a complicated condition that includes problems with communication and behavior. It can involve a wide range of symptoms and skills. ASD can be a minor problem or a disability that needs full-time care in a special facility. People with ASD have trouble with communication. They have trouble understanding what other people think and feel. This makes it hard for them to express themselves, either with words or through gestures, facial expressions, and touch. In this project we are building a system to help autistics express their feelings and increase their social life and skills, help the parents how to discover the disease earlier and how to deal with it by using website and mobile application with an easy use interface, and well-organized methods help the autistics to learn new words and hear voices and increase their motivation. Children with autism also suffer almost certainly from difficulties in three basic developmental areas, namely: mutual social relations, language and behavior. Parents play an essential role in providing the necessary support for the child, and they can help ensure access to health and education services for the child, and provide nurturing and stimulating environments as he develops. And it has recently been shown that parents can also help provide their child with psychological and behavioral treatments. Our system is useful for children where they can make interactions and chat with another children or their therapist.
description: This project is a comprehensive platform consisting of a web and mobile application designed to support children with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) and their parents. The system provides interactive tasks to help children improve their sensory skills, vocabulary, and social interaction. It includes features like voice recognition for pronunciation practice, color identification tasks, and a chat interface for communication with peers or therapists.
problem_statement: Many children with autism struggle with communication, social interaction, and sensory processing. Parents often face challenges in identifying the disorder early and lack accessible, well-organized tools to help their children develop essential life skills, language, and social behaviors.
proposed_solution: A dual-platform system (web and mobile) that provides structured learning modules, including voice-based pronunciation tasks, visual color identification, and interactive communication tools. The platform aims to improve the child's social skills, speech, and sensory perception while providing parents with resources to better understand and support their child's development.
objectives:
1. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
2. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
3. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
4. Provide interactive educational tools and resources.
5. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
full_content: Helping Autistics using web and mobile application. At present, some people still don't know what Autism is and how much it affects Children. It is difficult to identify autism spectrum disorders in a child before reaching the age of 12 months, but they can be diagnosed in general at the age of two years, and the distinctive features of the onset of the disease have a delay or temporary decline in the development of language and social skills, and the repetition of stereotypes in his behavior. Autism also called autism spectrum disorder (ASD) is a complicated condition that includes problems with communication and behavior. It can involve a wide range of symptoms and skills. ASD can be a minor problem or a disability that needs full-time care in a special facility. People with ASD have trouble with communication. They have trouble understanding what other people think and feel. This makes it hard for them to express themselves, either with words or through gestures, facial expressions, and touch. In this project we are building a system to help autistics express their feelings and increase their social life and skills, help the parents how to discover the disease earlier and how to deal with it by using website and mobile application with an easy use interface, and well-organized methods help the autistics to learn new words and hear voices and increase their motivation. Children with autism also suffer almost certainly from difficulties in three basic developmental areas, namely: mutual social relations, language and behavior. Parents play an essential role in providing the necessary support for the child, and they can help ensure access to health and education services for the child, and provide nurturing and stimulating environments as he develops. And it has recently been shown that parents can also help provide their child with psychological and behavioral treatments. Our system is useful for children where they can make interactions and chat with another children or their therapist.. This project is a comprehensive platform consisting of a web and mobile application designed to support children with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) and their parents. The system provides interactive tasks to help children improve their sensory skills, vocabulary, and social interaction. It includes features like voice recognition for pronunciation practice, color identification tasks, and a chat interface for communication with peers or therapists.

student_names: Laila Kamel, Mohamed Hassan
abstract: The recruitment process is often hindered by inefficiencies, high costs, and biases, leading to difficulties for employers in identifying qualified candidates and a lack of feedback for applicants. This graduation project introduces Hireverse, an AI-powered recruitment platform designed to automate and streamline the hiring process. By leveraging artificial intelligence for tasks such as CV screening, interview management, and feedback generation, Hireverse aims to create a more efficient, transparent, and inclusive recruitment system, benefiting both companies and job seekers.
description: The recruitment process plays a key role in the success of any organization, but it is often hindered by inefficiencies, high costs, and biases. Employers face difficulties in identifying the right candidates from a large pool, while applicants are often left without feedback, leading to uncertainty and missed opportunities for improvement. Hireverse was developed to address these challenges by automating the hiring process using artificial intelligence. This platform simplifies essential recruitment tasks, such as job posting, CV screening, and interview management, saving both time and money. It also removes biases, ensuring fairer and more accurate selection of candidates. For applicants, Hireverse provides valuable feedback on why they were rejected and offers suggestions on how to improve for future opportunities. Through this approach, Hireverse aims to create a more efficient, transparent, and inclusive recruitment system that benefits both companies and job seekers.
problem_statement: The traditional recruitment process is slow, inefficient, and prone to biases, resulting in high costs for companies and frustration for applicants. Companies often struggle to identify the most qualified candidates from large pools of applicants, leading to suboptimal hires. Applicants are often left without feedback, creating a lack of transparency and missed opportunities for improvement. This leaves both employers and applicants dissatisfied. The overall inefficiency in recruitment can lead to poor experience for both employers and job seekers, causing delays in hiring and growth. This project seeks to solve these issues through automation and AI.
proposed_solution: The scope of this project covers the development of an AI-powered recruitment platform, Hireverse, which automates key stages of the hiring process, including job posting, candidate application, CV filtering, interview scheduling and conducting to evaluate Technical and soft skills, and feedback generation for rejected candidates and reports to the employer including results of the process. The platform aims to serve employers by providing a faster, bias-free, and efficient way to hire qualified candidates, reducing the time spent on manual tasks. For applicants, it offers personalized job recommendations based on skills and experience, as well as valuable feedback after the hiring process, helping them improve for future opportunities.
objectives:
1. Improve workflow and management efficiency.
2. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
3. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
4. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
5. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
6. Optimize resource allocation and task management.

abstract: This project presents a comprehensive home automation system designed to provide users with remote monitoring and control capabilities for various household appliances. By leveraging the cost-effectiveness and versatility of the Raspberry Pi platform, the system addresses key challenges in the smart home market, including financial accessibility, ease of use, and security. The implementation covers a wide range of functionalities, from lighting and climate control to security features like fire detection and door management, offering a scalable solution for modern residential environments.
description: The Home Automation project is an IoT-based solution developed to enhance residential management through remote access and control. Utilizing Raspberry Pi as the central processing unit, the system integrates various sensors and actuators to manage home appliances, lighting, HVAC systems, and security protocols. The architecture is designed to be user-friendly, scalable, and cost-efficient, ensuring that even inexperienced users can effectively monitor and secure their homes from external locations via network technologies.
problem_statement: In these days, we face a problem to monitor our home in outside such as turn on or off lights, electrical devices as TV, air condition and etc., and opening or closing doors and windows. The choice for a particular smart-home system is dependent on several factors:, Financial cost., Ease of use., Security
proposed_solution: Our project solve many problems that we face in current days .we make a system to solve these problems and provide user with the instant monitoring and controlling of home appliances. There are several devices for such monitoring and controlling. We are focused on monitoring and controlling the home appliances with Raspberry Pi. As these devices are cheaper and simpler to use and handle, they are used in co-operation to widen the work and service functionality and comparatively.

abstract: Hospital management system is a computerized system designed to deal with day-to-day hospital operations. The program manages inpatients, outpatients, records, database treatments, status, and pharmacy billings. It aims to replace manual, error-prone paper-based processes with a user-friendly, fast, and cost-effective software solution for front-office management and patient information tracking.
description: The Hospital Management System is a comprehensive software solution developed to digitize and streamline hospital administration. It handles patient registration, doctor scheduling, pharmacy management, and billing. The system provides a secure, centralized database that allows authorized personnel to quickly retrieve patient history, diagnosis details, and staff availability, significantly improving operational efficiency and data accuracy.
problem_statement: The current manual system suffers from difficult information retrieval, inefficient paper-based record keeping, lack of prompt updates, error-prone manual calculations for billing, and difficulty in generating accurate reports, leading to wasted time and resources.
proposed_solution: A centralized, computerized Hospital Management System that automates patient registration, billing, and record-keeping. The solution provides a secure, user-friendly interface for administrators and receptionists to manage data efficiently, ensuring data consistency, quick retrieval, and improved decision-making support.

project_title: I SEE: Smart Glasses for Blind
student_names: Ahmed Taha Mansour, Ahmed Ibrahim Abdelhafeez, Mahmoud El Sayed Shalaby, Esraa Basher Abdelgawad, Gehan Harby El Sayed, Salma Mohamed Fawzy
abstract: The I SEE project aims to empower visually impaired individuals by providing a wearable smart glasses solution that enhances independence. The system integrates multiple computer vision and AI technologies to perform real-time tasks, including face recognition using MTCNN and VGG-16, object detection using the YOLO algorithm, and text reading via Tesseract OCR combined with NLP for text refinement. By converting visual information into auditory feedback, the device helps users navigate their environment, identify people, and read text, effectively acting as a digital guide to the world.
description: I SEE is an assistive technology project designed as a pair of smart glasses for the blind. It utilizes advanced AI models to interpret the user's surroundings. The system captures visual data and processes it to identify faces, detect common objects in daily life, and extract text from signs or documents. The processed information is then translated into audio, allowing the user to interact with their environment more confidently and independently.
problem_statement: Visually impaired individuals face significant challenges in daily life, including difficulties in recognizing people, navigating streets, identifying objects, and reading text, which often leads to a loss of independence and social interaction barriers.
proposed_solution: A wearable smart glasses system that leverages computer vision and deep learning to provide real-time environmental awareness. The solution uses face recognition to identify people, object detection to locate obstacles and items, and OCR to read text, all of which are communicated to the user through audio.
objectives:
1. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
2. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
3. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
4. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
5. Implement modern technologies and best practices.

Booking, purchasing, asking, chatting and everything became online which provides continence and saves time and effort. This document has been prepared by a group of Computer Science Students, College of Computers and informatics Benha University to help medical corporations. description: I-CARE is a comprehensive digital health platform designed to bridge the gap between patients and medical institutions through an integrated Android mobile application and a web-based management system. The platform aims to digitize medical records, streamline hospital administrative workflows, and provide secure, reliable access to health information, thereby reducing the inefficiencies and data loss common in traditional healthcare settings.
problem_statement: A fact must be recognized that the medical care in our society isn't as good and charged as it should be, people don't recognize the importance of their health unless they lose it or feel bad in some way, bad services at hospital, people are treated with non-concern, waiting for hours before being helped, no nurses or doctors are available to help or examine you. It's so disappointing that people lose their health documentations and they're have to prepare them from the point they lost it which in return costs a lot of money, time and effort. Some have a lot of questions about their health and they search for their answers on the internet where it's not true and not secure so unfortunately in most cases the state became worse.
proposed_solution: The project provides a dual-interface solution consisting of an Android mobile application for patients and a web-based system for medical staff. This system centralizes patient health histories, automates appointment booking and service facilitation, and ensures that medical data is stored securely to prevent loss, while also providing a reliable channel for patient-doctor communication.

It facilitates communication between ambulances, hospitals, and citizens. The system includes an Android application for patients and medics, and a web interface for hospital receptionists to manage patient transfers, bed availability, and emergency services. It integrates GPS tracking and sensor data to provide real-time health monitoring and location-based services.
problem_statement: The current healthcare system lacks efficient connectivity between hospitals and ambulance services, leading to delays in patient transfers and emergency care. There is a lack of real-time information regarding hospital bed availability, specifically for intensive care and incubators, which results in preventable loss of life.
proposed_solution: An integrated IoT platform that automates hospital management and emergency response. The solution uses an Android app for medics and citizens to locate the nearest hospital with available resources via GPS, and a web-based system for hospital staff to manage department status and patient reservations, ensuring faster coordination and resource allocation.

project_title: Improving Learning Outcomes Using EEG and AI
student_names: Yara Ahmed Mohmed, Ola Eid Abu Elwafa Eid, Somia Ashraf Soliman, Sohila Gamal Ibrahim, Manar Wageh Disoky, Sondos Abdelhamid Ahmed, Shahd Ahmed Shookri
abstract: This project explores the integration of Electroencephalography (EEG) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) to revolutionize the educational experience. By monitoring students' cognitive states, attention levels, and mental workloads in real-time, the system provides personalized learning content and pacing. The project aims to enhance learning outcomes, facilitate early detection of learning disabilities, and provide educators with actionable insights through an intuitive dashboard, ultimately fostering a more inclusive and effective learning environment.
description: The project is an AI-driven educational platform that utilizes EEG brain-computer interfaces to analyze student cognitive states. It aims to bridge the gap in traditional education by providing real-time feedback on attention and engagement, allowing for adaptive learning paths, early identification of learning challenges, and reduced educator workload through automated insights and personalized interventions.
problem_statement: Traditional education often fails to cater to individual learning styles and challenges, leading to disparities in student outcomes. Educators lack real-time insights into students' mental states, such as confusion or fatigue, and interventions for learning disabilities are often reactive rather than proactive.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an EEG-AI integrated system that monitors brain activity to provide real-time analysis of attention and engagement. This data powers a personalization engine that adapts learning content and difficulty to individual needs, while an educator dashboard provides predictive analytics to support timely interventions and personalized teaching strategies.
objectives:
1. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
2. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
3. Provide interactive educational tools and resources.
4. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
5. Improve system performance and reliability.
6. Support future scalability and feature expansion.

project_title: Information System for Breeding and caring the Arabian Horses
student_names: Ahmed Mohamed Kamal Fadlalla, Mostafa Mohamed Sadek, Mustafa Mahmoud Mohamed, Youssef Nader EL-Sherief, Eman Ahmed Mohamed, Fatma-Elzahraa Mahmoud Abdelghfar
abstract: In light of the state's interest in purebred Arabian horses, their breeding, the preservation of rare breeds, and the provision of full care to them, as at El- Zahra station in Ain Shams and other and private studs as well, Also, the Arabian horses have a great Arab heritage, where the Arabs kept their horse lineage from mixing with the hybrid horses, so we went to create an application that provides the following: (1) A special profile for each horse that includes everything related to it, such as its pedigree certificate, its appearance, colour, name, the name of the mother and father, date of birth, ancestry, microchip, and age, To convert the paper system to the digital system, following the efforts of the state to make everything digital for its ease and to ensure that it is preserved from damage and loss. (2) Selling and buying horse supplies and communicating with their owners easily. (3) Easy ways to care for the horse, follow it, and organize vaccinations and treatments through the veterinarian. (4) Follow up on the condition of the horse and its nutrition by choosing the doctor for the appropriate diet for each horse, providing full care for the horse in each of its periods and following it up in periods Childbirth, pregnancy, and diseases. (5) Part of a special space for all those interested in horses to communicate between them and add publications (to provide some other services such as: requesting mobile clinics, ease of communication with physical therapy doctors for horse treatment, horse trips, horse transport vehicles, and knowing the dates of festivals) and knowing all the news related to horses with The ability to modify each user of his page. (6) There is a place for chatting between all users of the application. (7) A part to provide the shelter service and present it to the users to choose the most suitable place to house the horse. (8) A section that includes horses in the Qur'an and Sunnah, and knowledge of hadiths and verses mentioned in the Qur'an.
description: Purebred Arabian horses have great importance in Egypt and the Arab world and their prices are high, but breeders face some problems in horse breeding, organization, medical and health care, nutrition, scheduling of treatments and vaccines, and providing the appropriate feed for them. During different periods of his life, these problems affect the horse, as he suffers from some diseases that may lead to death. Therefore, we moved to create an application that solves part of these problems that educators face.
problem_statement: So far, some studs for horses are facing some different problems, including: - Storing and dealing with the data of the horses they have on paper so far, costs a lot of time and effort, as well as damage or loss of this data may occur when this paper is lost. - One of the important problems that any stud may encounter is that their horses do not receive adequate medical care properly, which may lead to the loss of any horse they have due to a medical error or lack of good follow-up, and the loss of this horse may cost the stud huge sums, there are horses Its price could reach millions of pounds, which is a great loss. - The problem of a horse getting proper or correct nutrition during the various stages of its life, starting from its birth. Wrong feeding may lead to the loss of horses' lives. - Having difficulty communicating with the owners of different stalls or veterinarians, as there may be someone who needs to communicate with a veterinarian to present a health problem facing his horse urgently.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a comprehensive digital platform that replaces traditional paper-based record-keeping with a centralized database for tracking horse pedigrees, health history, and nutritional needs. The application integrates a communication module for connecting breeders with veterinarians and service providers, alongside a marketplace for horse supplies and a social space for community engagement, ensuring efficient management and improved survival rates for high-value horses.
objectives:
1. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
2. Improve system performance and reliability.
3. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
4. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
5. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
6. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.

student_names: Mohammad Gamal Mahmoud Arabie, Mahmoud Mohamed Kamel Mohamed, Yousef Hesham Abdel-Wahed, Mahmoud Mohamed Mahmoud Kussper, Yousef Nasser Emam, Yousef Tarek El-Desoukey, Mahmoud Mostafa Ahmed Ahmed, Adel Ayman Abdel-Hafez Salim, Abdelrahman Amgad Abdellatief
abstract: In recent years, the rapid growth of urban populations and infrastructure in Egypt has highlighted the urgent need for more efficient, transparent, and scalable systems for monitoring and resolving public infrastructure issues. Traditional reporting mechanisms—such as phone hotlines, municipal visits, or informal complaints on social media—often suffer from fragmentation, delays, and a lack of accountability, which directly impact both citizen satisfaction and governmental efficiency. In response to these challenges, this project introduces CivicEye, a comprehensive, multi-platform infrastructure monitoring and civic engagement system designed specifically for the Egyptian public sector. CivicEye bridges the communication gap between citizens, municipal employees, and administrative authorities at various levels (city, governorate, and national) through an integrated digital platform. The system comprises three main interfaces: a citizen mobile application, an employee mobile application, and a web-based administrative dashboard. Each of these components is tailored to meet the distinct needs of its user base while ensuring synchronized, real-time interaction through WebSocket technology and structured workflows.
description: CivicEye is an intelligent, multi-layered infrastructure monitoring platform designed to modernize civic engagement in Egypt. It provides a unified ecosystem where citizens can report infrastructure issues (like potholes or broken lights) via a mobile app, field employees can manage and resolve these reports, and administrators can monitor performance and trends through a centralized web dashboard. The system leverages AI for automated report titling and identity verification, and uses real-time data synchronization to ensure transparency and accountability across all levels of government.
problem_statement: Current infrastructure reporting methods in Egypt are largely manual, fragmented, and bureaucratic. Citizens lack a unified, transparent channel to report issues, leading to delayed responses and lack of feedback. Simultaneously, government entities lack centralized tools for tracking patterns, analyzing complaints, or evaluating employee performance based on real-time operational data.
proposed_solution: The project proposes CivicEye, a comprehensive platform featuring a citizen mobile app for reporting, an employee mobile app for field management, and an administrative web dashboard for oversight. The solution incorporates AI-assisted features (OCR for ID verification, automated titling), real-time WebSocket communication for status updates, and a hierarchical administrative model (City, Governorate, National) to align with Egypt's existing governmental structure.
objectives:
1. Enhance user experience and usability.
2. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
3. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
4. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
5. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
6. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
7. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
8. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.

project_title: Integrated Intelligent System for City Services (Citi Linked)
student_names: Magdy Mohamed Diab, Eslam Kamel Metwally, Mohamed Helmy Ibrahim, Mohamed Mohamed BERAKA, Mohand Mohamed Mounir, Mohamed Roshdy El-halawany
abstract: A smart city is an urban development vision to integrate information and communication technology (ICT) and Internet of things (IOT) technology in a secure fashion to manage a city's assets. These assets include local departments' information systems, schools, libraries, transportation systems, hospitals, power plants, water supply networks, waste management, law enforcement, and other community services. ICT allows city officials to interact directly with the community and the city infrastructure and to monitor what is happening in the city, how the city is evolving, and how to enable a better quality of life. Through the use of sensors integrated with real-time monitoring systems, data are collected from citizens and devices - then processed and analyzed. The information and knowledge gathered are keys to tackling inefficiency.
description: The project, titled 'Citi Linked', is an integrated intelligent system designed to improve urban management and citizen services. It focuses on two primary services: AS3FNY, an emergency response system that uses GPS and user input to dispatch the nearest ambulance to accident locations, and a Reporting Service that allows citizens to document and report urban issues like pollution or crime via social media and mobile uploads, facilitating better decision-making for city authorities.
problem_statement: Cities face significant inefficiencies in managing urban assets, responding to medical emergencies, and addressing public grievances like pollution and crime. Existing systems are often fragmented, slow, and lack real-time interaction between citizens and government authorities.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated ICT and IoT-based platform that connects citizens directly to city services. It implements a real-time emergency dispatch system (AS3FNY) that identifies the nearest hospital and ambulance, and a crowdsourced reporting platform that enables citizens to participate in urban maintenance and crime prevention.
objectives:
1. Enhance user experience and usability.
2. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
3. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
4. Enable real-time monitoring using connected devices.
5. Improve system performance and reliability.

description: The project is an intelligent traffic system that utilizes Raspberry Pi and computer vision (OpenCV) to monitor road conditions, detect traffic jams, accidents, and weather patterns. It integrates big data analytics and cloud computing (Azure) to process information and provide real-time updates to drivers via digital signage and mobile applications, while also automating emergency responses by notifying police and ambulance services.
problem_statement: Increasing population and traffic congestion lead to frequent accidents and significant delays. Emergency services often struggle to reach accident scenes quickly due to lack of real-time information, and authorities often cannot identify the perpetrators of accidents or the root causes of traffic congestion.
proposed_solution: A comprehensive intelligent traffic system that uses cameras and Raspberry Pi for real-time monitoring. The system detects accidents and traffic jams, automatically alerts emergency services with location and video data, identifies vehicles involved in accidents, and provides real-time traffic status to drivers to help them avoid congested routes.

project_title: Interactive Sign Language Interpretation System: From sign language gestures to audible speech
student_names: Mahmoud Fahmy Omar, Omar Zakaria Salah, Abbas Saleem Hennidi, Mahmoud Kassem Mahmoud, Mahmoud El-Sayyad
abstract: The aim of this project is to implement an accessible, easy to use, inexpensive, and most importantly accurate sign language interpretation system that could be used by deaf/mute people to communicate with people who are not familiar with sign language, by converting the sign language gesture streams into either live text, or audible synthesized speech in real time. The project utilizes the state-of-the-art YOLO object detection algorithm, in combination with Google's MobileNetV1 to solve the two hardest challenges: hand detection/tracking and sign language recognition.
description: This project is an accessibility software solution designed to bridge the communication gap between deaf/mute individuals and the general public. By leveraging deep learning models, the system captures real-time video input of sign language gestures, processes them to identify specific hand postures, and translates them into readable text or synthesized speech, thereby facilitating seamless interaction in various environments like hospitals, schools, and public institutions.
problem_statement: Sign language relies on complex visual-manual articulations and specific hand postures that are difficult for automated systems to interpret accurately. Existing solutions often struggle with the challenges of real-time hand detection, tracking, and the high degree of similarity between different manual alphabet signs, which hinders effective communication for the deaf/mute community.
proposed_solution: The team proposed a deep learning-based approach using the YOLO algorithm for robust hand detection and tracking, combined with Google's MobileNetV1 for accurate sign language gesture recognition. The system uses custom-trained datasets and data augmentation techniques to ensure high accuracy in identifying various hand poses and translating them into text or speech.
objectives:
1. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
2. Improve system performance and reliability.
3. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
4. Improve tracking accuracy and operational visibility.
5. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
6. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.

student_names: Ahmed Elsayed Sabra, Ahmed Rafat AbdelWahab, Ahmed Awny Ahmed, Abdel Rahman Hemdan Abdel Rahman, Marwa Ashraf Elshahat, Marwa Mohamed Galal
abstract: There are many paralysis patients who suffer from the difficulty of using the chair for the traditional wheelchair, in addition to the fact that many of them also suffer from loneliness and the absence of anyone to care for them, based on that the idea of our project came. This project helps people with paralysis who have no one to look after them either. The wheelchair is moved via a joystick or an Android app that the patient uses to give four way movement commands (left, right, forward, or backward). The patient can also move the chair by voice commands using the same Android app. The wheelchair is equipped with an ultrasound sensor, If the chair falls in any direction, a message will be sent via the sensor to the hospital to obtain a rescue. The Global Positioning System (GPS) is used to send the exact location of an infected patient so that the hospital sends someone to rescue him. The wheelchair also has a sensor to sense the patient's body temperature. All patient data read by the sensors is sent to the hospital in order to send patient rescue when needed.
description: The project is a smart wheelchair designed for people with special needs or paralysis who lack constant supervision. It integrates IoT technology to allow the patient to control movement via a joystick, voice commands, or an Android mobile application. The chair is equipped with safety features including fall detection, GPS location tracking, and body temperature monitoring, all of which transmit data to a hospital or care agency to ensure immediate assistance in emergencies.
problem_statement: Traditional wheelchairs require significant physical effort from the patient and do not provide safety mechanisms for those who are alone. Patients are at risk of falling or experiencing medical emergencies without the ability to alert caregivers or provide their location for rescue.
proposed_solution: An IoT-enabled smart wheelchair that provides motorized movement controlled by the patient, combined with a suite of sensors (ultrasound for fall detection, temperature sensors, and GPS) that automatically communicate with a hospital or emergency service to provide real-time health and location data.
objectives:
1. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
2. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
3. Enhance user experience and usability.
4. Enable real-time monitoring and tracking capabilities.
5. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
6. Enable real-time monitoring using connected devices.
7. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
8. Improve tracking accuracy and operational visibility.
full_content: IOT Smart Wheelchair. There are many paralysis patients who suffer from the difficulty of using the chair for the traditional wheelchair, in addition to the fact that many of them also suffer from loneliness and the absence of anyone to care for them, based on that the idea of our project came. This project helps people with paralysis who have no one to look after them either. The wheelchair is moved via a joystick or an Android app that the patient uses to give four way movement commands (left, right, forward, or backward). The patient can also move the chair by voice commands using the same Android app. The wheelchair is equipped with an ultrasound sensor, If the chair falls in any direction, a message will be sent via the sensor to the hospital to obtain a rescue. The Global Positioning System (GPS) is used to send the exact location of an infected patient so that the hospital sends someone to rescue him. The wheelchair also has a sensor to sense the patient's body temperature. All patient data read by the sensors is sent to the hospital in order to send patient rescue when needed.. project_title: IS for Quality Assessment Process on Benha University
student_names: Eslam Adel Hassan, Eslam Elsayed Farahat, Mohamed Sabry Ahmed, Mohamed Mansour Abdelaziz, Ahmed Ibrahim Elbatawy
abstract: The quality management and control process in the faculties is a complex and interrelated process that requires an electronic system to save time and cost in managing and documenting the quality process in each department. In accordance with the National Commission for Academic Evaluation and Accreditation, it facilitates the processing, Extraction and storage of statistics, information and documents of the university, colleges and Programs to support the processes and procedures of quality management, facilitate access to Final reports and compare performance on the different levels of the program, colleges and University to create a picture of the level of quality. The system applies the principle of 'Quality is the responsibility of all' where the system distributes roles and tasks to all parties in the educational process of students, faculty members, academic leaders and employees. The System provides a page for all parties with the tasks, tasks entrusted to him by the quality. This gives the High Staff of the faculty the ability to perform their tasks and functions over the Internet away from the Department of paper administration that wastes time and effort. We are now in the era of technology and most of our tasks must be transferred to this trend.
description: This project proposes an integrated Information System (IS) designed to digitize and streamline the quality management and accreditation processes at Benha University. By transitioning from traditional paper-based administration to a centralized electronic platform, the system enables efficient documentation, real-time data processing, and transparent task distribution among faculty, staff, and academic leadership. The platform ensures institutional compliance with the standards set by the National Authority for Academic Evaluation and Accreditation.
problem_statement: The process of quality management and control in the faculties is a complex and interrelated process that requires an electronic system to save time and cost in managing and documenting the quality process in each department and thus the ease and speed of reporting. The system aims to facilitate the programs that manage the annual operations in the field of Quality assurance to ensure that the quality management systems are compatible with Requirements of the National Authority for Academic Evaluation and Accreditation. So this project will solve: The difficulty of introducing, processing, extracting and storing statistics, information and documents for the university and colleges. The difficulty of obtaining final reports and comparing performance at the level of programs, colleges and university to create a picture of the quality level. The difficulty of distributing roles and tasks to all parties in the educational process. Lack of knowledge in management. Lack of well-defined task and procedure.
proposed_solution: The project provides a centralized web-based platform that automates the collection, storage, and analysis of academic quality data. It replaces manual, time-consuming administrative tasks with a structured digital workflow that assigns specific roles to stakeholders, facilitates the generation of performance reports, and ensures that all quality-related procedures align with national accreditation requirements.
objectives:
1. Enhance user experience and usability.
2. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
3. Improve learning experience and educational accessibility.
4. Improve workflow and management efficiency.
5. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
6. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
7. Improve system performance and reliability.
8. Provide interactive educational tools and resources.

abstract: Nowadays, and with the technological revolution we live in, there are a lot of Muslims who aren't aware of the importance of the inheritance laws and Islam so, the Mirath calculator project aims to develop a mobile application to calculate the portion and value of Mirath based on laws that came in Qur'an and Sunnah. The project will be a mobile application that aims to facilitate the understanding and calculation of inheritance in Islam. It provides an innovative technical and educational solution for individuals who wish to understand the legal inheritance rules and regulations. Thanks to this application, users can calculate the inheritance in an accurate and fair manner, which contributes to avoiding potential disputes and disagreements between family members. The AI chat built into the app is a powerful and useful addition. Where users can ask questions and inquiries related to inheritance in Islam and get fast and reliable answers from artificial intelligence. Answers are provided based on reliable legal information and sources in Islam.
description: The Islamic Arabic Mirath Application is a mobile-based platform designed to simplify the complex process of calculating Islamic inheritance (Mirath). It combines a precise calculation engine based on Sharia law with an AI-powered chatbot to provide users with reliable answers to legal inquiries, aiming to foster family harmony and prevent disputes over wealth distribution.
problem_statement: Family discord has risen due to a lack of awareness about inheritance laws and the proper distribution of wealth according to Islamic Sharia. Many individuals struggle to calculate inheritance shares accurately, leading to potential conflicts and disagreements among family members.
proposed_solution: A mobile application that provides an intuitive, user-friendly interface for calculating inheritance shares accurately based on Islamic law. The system incorporates an AI chatbot to answer user questions regarding inheritance and includes features to generate and save reports as PDFs.

4. Improve mobile application usability and performance.

abstract: An application to detect Jaundice disease in infants, it's one of the most common diseases in newborns. Neonatal jaundice is a common condition that occurs in newborn infants in the first week of life. So, we need to classify between the children with jaundice and the normal children. Some of the available solutions are specialized children's hospitals, where parents of children with jaundice resort to these hospitals to examine the children and to make sure if they need medical analysis to ensure their safety and the extent of the effect of jaundice on them. The solution that we offer is an application that works on pictures of children that the user enters to discover whether the children have jaundice or not. They are infected with jaundice and follow-up on them periodically, which reduces the serious impact that the disease may cause if it worsens and increases with time.
description: This project is a web-based application that utilizes Artificial Intelligence and Computer Vision to assist parents and medical professionals in the early detection of neonatal jaundice. By analyzing images of infants, the system classifies whether the infant shows signs of jaundice, providing a non-invasive, accessible screening tool to prevent serious complications like brain damage.
problem_statement: Neonatal jaundice is a common condition that requires timely detection to prevent severe health complications. Current diagnostic methods often rely on invasive blood tests or specialized clinical equipment, which may not be immediately accessible or convenient for parents, leading to potential delays in diagnosis.
proposed_solution: A web-based application powered by a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model that analyzes images of infants to detect signs of jaundice. This non-invasive approach allows for early screening and periodic monitoring, helping parents identify the need for professional medical intervention.
objectives:
1. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.
2. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
3. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
4. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
5. Improve system performance and reliability.
6. Enhance user experience and usability.
7. Implement modern technologies and best practices.

student_names: Ali Mohamed Abdelaziz Mohamed, Saif Mahmoud Mohamed Shakran, Ahmed Said Abdelkader Abdelwahab, Ahmed Sherif Yahia Mostafa, Taghreed Abdelrazed Hamed Ahmed, Rana Youssef Abdelhaleem mohamed, Sohila Ehab Abdelraouf Aboelazm, Ahmed Yousef Gbreel Abdelrady, Mohamed HossamEldeen Adel Ahmed
abstract: JeeLMS is an educational platform designed to simplify classroom management and enhance learning experiences through virtual spaces. At its core, the system introduces a concept of digital "spaces" that serve as contained environments where educational activities take place. These spaces allow educators to manage classes, create assessments, and interact with students through a unified interface. The platform addresses common educational workflow challenges by providing integrated tools for attendance tracking, assignment management, quiz administration, and resource sharing. Built with both web and mobile interfaces, JEELMS ensures consistent access across different devices, accommodating the varied needs of users in educational settings. Our system architecture emphasizes modularity and scalability, implementing secure user authentication, role-based access control, and real-time data synchronization. The platform features a straightforward user interface that reduces technical barriers, making digital education tools accessible to users with varying levels of technical expertise. By consolidating essential educational functions into a single platform, JEELMS aims to streamline administrative tasks and enhance communication between educators and students.
description: JeeLMS is a comprehensive Learning Management System designed to streamline educational workflows. It provides a centralized digital environment for classroom management, including features for attendance, assignments, quizzes, and resource sharing. The project also incorporates advanced multimedia localization features, specifically focusing on video dubbing from English to Arabic to improve accessibility and cultural relevance for students.
problem_statement: Educational institutions face challenges in managing classroom workflows, tracking student progress, and providing accessible, culturally relevant learning materials. Existing systems often lack integrated tools for seamless communication and multimedia localization, creating barriers for students who require content in their native language.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a modular and scalable web-based Learning Management System (JeeLMS) that integrates administrative tools with advanced video dubbing capabilities. By providing a unified interface for educators and students, the system facilitates efficient classroom management while using deep learning and dubbing technologies to translate educational content, thereby improving accessibility and language comprehension.
objectives:
1. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
2. Improve system performance and reliability.
3. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
4. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
5. Optimize resource allocation and task management.
6. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
7. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.

student_names: Yousef Mahmoud Yousef, Hossam Hamdy Tawffiq, Ahmed Mahmoud Gouda, Toqa Gamal Mohamed, Habiba Elsayed Gouda
abstract: This project focuses on creating an application that will facilitate communication between deaf people. The application will be designed to enable users to communicate through text, video, and audio. It will also provide a platform for users to share documents, photos, and videos. The application will be designed with accessibility features for the deaf community in mind, such as captioning of audio/video content and support for sign language. Additionally, the application will include features such as group chat rooms, reminders and notifications, and the ability to search for other deaf people in the area. This project aims to create an accessible platform that can help bridge the communication gap between deaf people. The application will also provide a platform for users to connect with each other, share resources, and access relevant information about the deaf community. The goal of this project is to create an easy-to-use meeting application that can help bridge the communication gap between deaf and hearing individuals. By providing an accessible platform for communication, the application can help improve the quality of life of deaf individuals by allowing them to participate in meaningful conversations and exchanges with others. This graduation project seeks to create an accessible and inclusive solution for deaf people so that they can participate in meetings with ease and confidence.
description: The ability to communicate effectively is a fundamental aspect of human interaction, allowing individuals to convey their thoughts, emotions, and ideas. However, for individuals who are deaf or hard of hearing, traditional methods of communication can present significant challenges. Recognizing this issue, our graduation project aims to address the communication barriers faced by the deaf community by developing a video call application specifically designed to facilitate seamless and accessible communication. The project also emphasizes the importance of user experience and usability. We have designed the application to be intuitive and user-friendly, ensuring that both deaf and hearing users can navigate the platform effortlessly. Additionally, we have incorporated features such as adjustable camera angles and customizable display options to accommodate various communication preferences and optimize the user experience. In the following sections and chapters, we will delve into the technical aspects, implementation details, and evaluation of our video call application. We will discuss the underlying technologies employed, the challenges encountered during development, and the future possibilities for expanding and improving our solution.
problem_statement: Deaf individuals face communication challenges when interacting with people who do not understand sign language. Current communication methods, such as written notes or interpreters, are often cumbersome and limit spontaneous conversations. This leads to social isolation and restricted participation in various aspects of life. To address this, our graduation project focuses on developing a video call application that translates sign language into text in real-time. By using the application's camera, deaf users can express themselves through sign language, which is then instantly converted to text for the recipient to understand. This application aims to bridge the communication gap and enable seamless communication between deaf and hearing individuals.
proposed_solution: The project, titled 'Kaleem', is a specialized video conferencing platform designed to bridge the communication gap between deaf and hearing individuals. It integrates advanced assistive technologies, including real-time sign language-to-text translation and voice-to-text conversion, to facilitate seamless interaction. The application features an intuitive, accessible user interface with customizable display options and camera settings to ensure that users can participate in meetings and social exchanges with ease and confidence.

1. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
2. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
3. Improve system performance and reliability.
4. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
5. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
6. Enhance user experience and usability.

project_title: KIDS ZONE: Where Learning Meets Innovation
student_names: Aya Mahmoud Saber, Abdallah Ahmed Hussien, Ahmed Nabil Elsayed, Andrawes Aisr Adolf, Eman Ibrahim Abdelhalim, Khaled Ahmed Hamed, Said Reda Mohamed, Ranim Samir Atef
abstract: The KidsZone project leverages artificial intelligence and computer vision technologies to create an interactive and engaging educational platform for children, particularly benefiting those with carpal tunnel syndrome. This innovative project is accessible via both website and mobile application, providing a variety of services designed to enhance learning and entertainment. Key features include air writing recognition, which allows children to write letters and numbers in the air that are accurately captured and displayed on a screen. This feature helps children practice handwriting in a fun, less physically demanding manner, making it ideal for those with carpal tunnel syndrome. The word recognition and image display feature enables kids to write words, with the system recognizing these and displaying corresponding images, enhancing their vocabulary and comprehension skills. A curated selection of video stories offers both educational and entertaining content, fostering a love for reading and learning while providing a screen-time option that is both enjoyable and beneficial. Additionally, children can draw pictures on the platform, which uses AI to predict and identify the images, encouraging creativity and artistic expression while providing instant feedback and helping to develop their drawing skills.
description: KidsZone is a comprehensive educational and entertainment platform designed to support children's development, with a specific focus on inclusivity for children suffering from carpal tunnel syndrome. By utilizing computer vision and AI, the platform allows children to interact with digital content through air writing, drawing, and voice commands, bypassing the physical strain of traditional input methods. It provides a personalized learning journey with adjustable text sizes and customizable content tailored to individual interests, aiming to foster creativity, skill development, and cognitive growth in an enjoyable environment.
problem_statement: The prevalence of electronic devices has led to a surge in health issues among children, such as carpal tunnel syndrome, which impacts their ability to engage in traditional writing and drawing activities, thereby hindering their physical well-being and learning development.

full_content: KIDS ZONE: Where Learning Meets Innovation. The KidsZone project leverages artificial intelligence and computer vision technologies to create an interactive and engaging educational platform for children, particularly benefiting those with carpal tunnel syndrome. This innovative project is accessible via both website and mobile application, providing a variety of services designed to enhance learning and entertainment. Key features include air writing recognition, which allows children to write letters and numbers in the air that are accurately captured and displayed on a screen. This feature helps children practice handwriting in a fun, less physically demanding manner, making it ideal for those with carpal tunnel syndrome. The word recognition and image display feature enables kids to write words, with the system recognizing these and displaying corresponding images, enhancing their vocabulary and comprehension skills. A curated selection of video stories offers both educational and entertaining content, fostering a love for reading and learning while providing a screen-time option that is both enjoyable and beneficial. Additionally, children can draw pictures on the platform, which uses AI to predict and identify the images, encouraging creativity and artistic expression while providing instant feedback and helping to develop their drawing skills.. By utilizing computer vision and AI, the platform allows children to interact with digital content through air writing, drawing, and voice commands, bypassing the physical strain of traditional input methods. It provides a personalized learning journey with adjustable text sizes and customizable content tailored to individual interests, aiming to foster creativity, skill development, and cognitive growth in an enjoyable environment.

abstract: The main idea of our project is protecting the laptop from theft or loss by using Raspberry Pi, an Android application, and a web service. Our project not only helps you to protect your laptop but in the worst case (if the laptop has been stolen), you can track it and easily find the laptop's location. In general, you can open the camera for taking photos, but what is important is to control the use of important data by encrypting it until the laptop is recovered or tracked, not only in the case of theft.
description: The Laptop Security Management System is an integrated solution designed to safeguard laptops against theft. It combines hardware (Raspberry Pi) with software (Android app and web service) to provide real-time tracking, remote camera access for surveillance, and data encryption capabilities to protect sensitive information if the device is compromised.
problem_statement: Theft is a persistent criminal behavior, and traditional methods of prevention are often insufficient or lack modern technological integration. Users need a reliable, cost-effective, and easy-to-use system to protect their hardware and sensitive data from unauthorized access or theft.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an innovative embedded system that integrates a Raspberry Pi with a mobile application and web service. This system allows users to monitor their laptop's status, track its physical location, capture images of unauthorized users via a camera, and remotely encrypt sensitive data to prevent unauthorized access.

project_title: Learnaira (Interactive E-learning platform powered by AI)
student_names: Yahia Mohammed Mansour Hassan Hamza, Mohammed Sabry Mahmoud Shehabeldin, Hadi Rabee Kamel Alam Heikal, Eslam Hany Elsayed Zoghla, Taha Ebrahim Taha Ebrahim, Gamal Adel Gamal Khalifa, Soliman Mahmoud Soliman Elsayed, Fatma Ebrahim Kamel Ebrahim, Marwa Sayed Farghaly Sayed Ahmed
abstract: Our project encompasses an advanced electronic learning platform meticulously designed to elevate the educational experience. Within this innovative ecosystem, a seamless registration system and an intuitive enrollment process give students access to a rich range of courses, all expertly led by certified teachers. Each course listing is akin to a treasure trove of knowledge, brimming with comprehensive instructor profiles, course lengths, and invaluable peer reviews. This educational haven focuses on interactive learning and fosters a dynamic and collaborative environment through its group chat function. It also facilitates course evaluations and provides a platform for constructive feedback. It's important to highlight that the project integrates advanced artificial intelligence models, including question generation and answering, thus enhancing the depth and quality of the learning experience. These artificial intelligence models also contribute to creating a safe and respectful online educational space through an AI model designed to prevent the use of inappropriate language. Furthermore, our project offers a unique dimension where educators play a pivotal role in enriching the learning journey. They supplement their courses with educational videos, enhancing comprehension of the content. Additionally, all essential PDF materials are thoughtfully provided for comprehensive study throughout the course's duration. The innovation continues with the integration of a chatbot, designed to assist and guide users through any ambiguities or complexities within the course materials. This interactive element extends to AI-powered Text-to-Speech (TTS) technology, which converts text into speech, raising the overall quality and accessibility of educational content with greater accuracy. Complementing TTS, our Speech Recognition model opens up new avenues of engagement for individuals who may struggle with writing.
description: Learnaira is an interactive, AI-powered e-learning platform designed to democratize education by making it accessible, engaging, and personalized. The platform features a comprehensive suite of tools including video instruction, AI-based support, text-to-speech, and speech recognition to cater to diverse learning styles and accessibility needs. It streamlines the educational process for both instructors and students by automating administrative tasks like exam generation and grading, while fostering a collaborative environment through group discussions and real-time feedback.
problem_statement: Traditional e-learning environments often lack sufficient interactivity, leading to lower student engagement and retention. Additionally, instructors face significant burdens in manually creating and grading exams, which can be time-consuming and prone to human bias or error. Furthermore, existing platforms often lack accessibility features for users with disabilities or those who prefer alternative communication methods.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a web-based, AI-driven e-learning platform that automates exam creation and grading using deep learning models (transformers) to interpret semantic meaning. It incorporates accessibility features like speech-to-text and text-to-speech, provides an AI chatbot for student support, and utilizes a secure, role-based architecture to ensure a safe and collaborative learning environment.

project_title: Location-Based Recommendation Services for public customers and vendors
student_names: Abdalrahman Mohammed Aboelatta, Mostafa Mohammed Reda, Mohammed Abdelrahim Salim, Abdellatif Mohammed Behairy, Mohammed Helmi Tallat, Aya Mohammed Elshahat
abstract: This project proposes a location-based recommendation system designed to bridge the gap between commercial vendors and public customers. By leveraging mobile technology and location awareness, the system enables vendors to send targeted, real-time promotional offers to customers in their vicinity. This approach enhances the selling process for businesses while providing customers with convenient access to relevant offers, thereby reducing the time and effort spent searching for products and services.
description: The project is a mobile-based information system that facilitates location-aware advertising. It connects vendors (shops, restaurants, cinemas) with customers by sending notifications about offers based on the user's current geographic location. The system includes a central server to manage data, user authentication, and the delivery of location-specific content to mobile devices.
problem_statement: Commercial vendors struggle with inefficient marketing and low customer reach, while customers face difficulty and time wastage in finding relevant products, offers, and services in their immediate area.
proposed_solution: A mobile application that utilizes location-based services (LBS) to provide personalized, proximity-based notifications and recommendations, allowing vendors to reach customers effectively and helping customers discover local deals easily.

student_names: Fady Fayz Mousa Salama, Khalid Omar Abdulkhaleq, Ibrahim Mohamed Abderasoul, Youssef Hossam Mohamed, Mahmoud Abdelfattah Abdelhamied, Youssef Samy Mohamed, Mahmoud Ehab Mohamed, Youssef Ahmed Ali, Ahmed Gamal Abdelhamied
abstract: Lost Trace is a cutting-edge platform designed to aid in locating missing persons by utilizing advanced technologies and a community-centric approach. The platform comprises both a web application and a mobile application, allowing users to report missing cases, search for missing individuals, view ongoing investigations, and collaborate with related organizations. It leverages TensorFlow for face recognition, Puppeteer for automated data scraping, and Socket.io for real-time communication. The system is built on a robust stack including Node.js, Express, React, React Native, and PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM, ensuring a secure, scalable, and efficient ecosystem for reuniting missing persons with their families.
description: Lost Trace is a comprehensive, AI-powered platform designed to modernize the search for missing persons. It moves beyond traditional, manual, and uncoordinated search methods by providing a centralized, intelligent, and collaborative ecosystem. The platform integrates facial recognition to match missing persons with data scraped from online sources, provides real-time alerts to stakeholders, and facilitates community engagement to improve the success rate of investigations while maintaining data privacy and security.
problem_statement: The current process for finding missing persons is largely manual, slow, and uncoordinated, relying on scattered efforts like social media posts, printed flyers, and police reports. There is a lack of centralized digital systems, limited use of intelligent tools like facial recognition, and no efficient way to alert families or coordinate community efforts, leading to delays and increased emotional distress for affected families.
proposed_solution: Lost Trace provides a unified, AI-powered platform that automates the search process. It uses TensorFlow for accurate facial recognition matching, Puppeteer for automated data collection from social media, and Socket.io for real-time notifications. The system offers a cross-platform experience (Web and Mobile) with structured case management via a PostgreSQL database, enabling families, communities, and organizations to collaborate effectively in real-time.

abstract: This project presents the development of a mobile-controlled door locking system utilizing a kit of hardware and a solenoid. The primary objective is to enhance home security and convenience by enabling remote locking and unlocking of doors via a custom-built flutter application. The system integrates hardware components such as a solenoid lock mechanism controlled by a Raspberry Pi, interfaced through a relay module, and powered by a standard 5V adapter. The mobile application, developed using flutter in Android Studio, establishes Wi-Fi communication with the kit, allowing users to send lock and unlock commands. The system successfully demonstrates the feasibility of integrating IoT technologies with everyday security applications, offering a scalable and adaptable solution for various residential and commercial environments.
description: The Magic Eye System is an intelligent surveillance and access control solution that combines computer vision with physical security hardware. It uses advanced machine learning models to perform real-time object detection and facial recognition, allowing the system to identify individuals and automatically manage door access. The system is managed through a user-friendly mobile application that provides remote control, event logging, and real-time status updates.
problem_statement: Traditional surveillance camera systems have limited intelligence, often capturing data without the ability to analyze it in real-time. They lack the capability to differentiate between normal and abnormal events or recognize specific individuals, leading to delayed responses to security incidents and missed opportunities for proactive security measures.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a smart camera system that integrates AI, computer vision, and IoT hardware. By utilizing models like YOLO and Face Net, the system can perform real-time facial recognition and object tracking. This intelligence is coupled with a solenoid-based door lock, allowing the system to automatically grant or deny access based on recognized identities and user-defined permissions.

project_title: Malware Detection in Files and URL Phishing Using ML
student_names: Alaa Ali Hassan Mohamed Salama, Asmaa Alaa Abdelmohsen Morsy, Ahmed Ashraf Gaber Mohamed, Kerols Gamel Samy Balamon, Mohamed Ibrahim Mohamed Saleh, Islam Ahmed Maher Mohamed, Mohamed Emad Mohamed Abedin
abstract: The explosive growth of malware variants poses a major threat to information security. Traditional anti-virus systems based on signatures fail to classify unknown malware into their corresponding families and to detect new kinds of malware in files. Therefore, we propose a machine learning based malware analysis in different types of files. student_names: Mohamed Atef Mohamed fooda, Yasmeen Mostafa Mohamed, Alaa Ahmed Mohamed Farahat, Doha Mohamed Abdo, Nahed Yassen Mohamed Nasser, Mona Mohamed Shaaban
abstract: This project focuses on the application of straightforward yet effective regression algorithms in conjunction with random forest, decision tree, KNN and SVM for the analysis of medical data, specifically targeting some diseases (Anemia, Liver and Diabetes). The simplicity of the algorithms ensures a user-friendly and interpretable approach, making it accessible for medical practitioners with varying levels of technical expertise. Using some algorithms, when a patient uploads their personal data, their location and the analysis they want to know the result of, these algorithms analyze the patient's data and provide them with the analysis result, the appropriate specialist for their case, and their location. Through the integration of these technologies, we seek to create a versatile tool that empowers healthcare professionals in making informed decisions based on reliable and easily interpretable insights. The project's innovative approach lies in its commitment to simplicity, accessibility, and the utilization of cutting-edge technologies for medical analysis.
description: In recent years, the intersection of healthcare and technology has given rise to innovative solutions aimed at enhancing patient care and streamlining medical processes. One such advancement is the development of medical analysis systems that leverage machine learning to predict various health conditions. This project presents a comprehensive medical analysis system, accessible via both an application and a website, which predicts the results for diabetes, anemia, and liver functions. By utilizing machine learning algorithms such as K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) and Random Forest, the system not only forecasts potential health issues but also recommends relevant medical specialists and nearby doctors. Additionally, it features a robust dashboard for administrators, and provides users with functionalities such as setting alarms for medication and appointments, ensuring a holistic approach to managing their health.
problem_statement: The traditional methods of diagnosing and managing chronic conditions like diabetes, anemia, and liver dysfunctions are often time-consuming and dependent on direct medical consultation. Patients frequently face delays in receiving critical health information, which can lead to deteriorations in their conditions. Moreover, the lack of immediate access to specialized medical professionals and the difficulty in managing medication schedules and appointments exacerbate the challenges faced by patients. The primary problems this project aims to address include:, Delayed Diagnosis and Prediction: The need for timely and accurate prediction of diabetes, anemia, and liver functions to initiate early intervention., Accessibility to Specialized Care: Difficulty in identifying and accessing the right medical specialists and nearby healthcare providers.
proposed_solution: The proposed medical analysis system offers a multifaceted solution to the aforementioned problems through its innovative features:, Predictive Analytics Using Machine Learning: - Diabetes Prediction: Utilizing patient data and employing algorithms such as KNN and Random Forest to predict the likelihood of diabetes. - Anemia Detection: Analyzing relevant health parameters to forecast anemia, enabling timely medical attention. - Liver Function Analysis: Assessing liver health indicators to predict potential liver dysfunctions, aiding in early diagnosis and treatment., Specialist Recommendation and Locator: - The system recommends specialized doctors based on the predicted health conditions. - It provides a geolocation service to identify and locate the nearest available medical professionals, ensuring that patients receive prompt and appropriate care., User and Admin Dashboards: - Admin Dashboard: Allows administrators to manage user data, monitor system performance, and oversee predictive analytics processes. - User Dashboard: Offers patients a personalized interface to view their health predictions, manage their medical information, and set up alerts., Alarm System for Medications: - Users can set alarms for their medication schedules ensuring adherence to prescribed treatments.
objectives:
1. Enhance user experience and usability.
2. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
3. Improve patient monitoring and healthcare management.
4. Generate accurate analytical insights and visualizations.
5. Improve prediction accuracy using machine learning models.
6. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
7. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.

project_title: Medical Records with Brain Tumor Detection Models
student_names: Haidy Hassan Elsayed Hassan, Ibthal Mohamed Abdelghany, Omnia Khaled Said, Eman Salah Moustafa Mohamad, Mayar Ashraf Fathy Abd Elhalim, Moaz Ashraf Abdelghany Hussein
abstract: This project presents an integrated digital health record system designed to modernize medical documentation and improve patient care. The system facilitates the transition from paper-based records to a secure, automated digital platform. Beyond administrative management, the project incorporates advanced deep learning models to analyze medical X-rays for the detection and classification of brain tumors, assisting in early diagnosis and reducing the risk of misdiagnosis.
description: The project is a comprehensive medical informatics solution that combines a digital health record management system with AI-driven diagnostic tools. It allows clinics to manage patient appointments, store medical histories, and digitize prescriptions. Additionally, it features a specialized module for the neurology department that utilizes deep learning to analyze brain scans, helping to identify and classify potential tumors.
problem_statement: Current medical record systems suffer from limited storage, security risks, inefficient information sharing, and the potential for human error. Furthermore, manual diagnosis of brain tumors is prone to misdiagnosis due to the complexity of symptoms and the reliance on subjective interpretation of medical scans.
proposed_solution: A centralized, secure digital platform that automates appointment scheduling, digitizes patient medical records, and provides an AI-powered diagnostic tool. The system allows doctors to upload X-rays for automated tumor detection and provides patients with access to their medical history and test results.

4. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
5. Support future scalability and feature expansion.

7. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
8. Improve workflow and management efficiency.

abstract: This project presents an information system designed for companies that rely on the sale and distribution of products through a team of delegates. The system facilitates communication in medical sales operations, making them more flexible, efficient, and secure. It includes a web-based platform for management and customers, and an Android application for delegates to manage orders, track deliveries, and report on customer interactions.
description: The Medical Rep system is a comprehensive solution for managing medical sales operations. It replaces traditional paper-based records and manual processes with an integrated digital platform. The system connects managers, customers, and field delegates through a centralized database, allowing for real-time updates on product availability, order status, and sales performance.
problem_statement: Traditional methods of medical sales rely on paper records and manual invoices, leading to difficulties in data storage, transport, and tracking. Companies struggle with managing delegate locations, maintaining consistent pricing, tracking sales targets, and monitoring inventory in real-time.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated system consisting of a web application for managers and customers, and an Android mobile application for field delegates. The system uses a centralized database connected via web services to ensure that all stakeholders have access to accurate, real-time information regarding orders, product pricing, and delegate performance.
