project_title: Medical tests and Intelligent Diagnosis system
student_names: Heba Reda Mohamed Omran, Shahd Mohamed Sobieh Mohamed, Sarah AbdElhamed Abdelghani Hamza, Mohamed Akram Sayed Ali, Mohamed Abdullah Elsayed Essa
abstract: The Integrated Healthcare Management System with AI-Driven Diagnostics and Patient Support signifies a groundbreaking evolution in healthcare delivery by amalgamating advanced technologies and seamlessly integrating laboratory and radiology services. This transformative system is aligned with the broader context of the digitalization of laboratories, where the shift from paper-based, analog recording to digital infrastructure fosters efficiency, collaboration, and transparency. The digitalization of laboratories encompasses the adoption of automated systems, robotics, and artificial intelligence. Within this context, the Integrated Healthcare Management System emerges as a comprehensive solution, prioritizing accessibility and accuracy. Users navigate a user-friendly interface to manage accounts and explore laboratory sites, streamlining the search for nearby, cost-effective, and high-quality testing facilities. Through the system's intuitive interface, users gain access to a detailed catalog of tests and radiological services, complete with information on requirements and transparent cost breakdowns. Artificial intelligence analyzes test results meticulously, identifying health indicators and generating comprehensive reports. An interactive chatbot engages users in meaningful dialogues, offering diagnostic recommendations and suggesting specialized medical professionals based on AI-driven analyses. Moreover, the system facilitates the seamless upload of X-ray images, subjecting them to advanced AI analysis for the generation of clear and concise reports. Paramount to the system is the emphasis on privacy and data security, ensuring the protection of sensitive healthcare information through robust measures.
description: The project is an Integrated Healthcare Management System designed to digitize and streamline laboratory and radiology services. It provides a centralized platform for users to manage their medical data, book appointments, select testing facilities, and receive AI-driven diagnostic insights. The system includes features for X-ray image analysis, a patient-support chatbot, and secure data management to ensure compliance with healthcare privacy regulations.
problem_statement: The current manual and disjointed processes within the laboratory and radiology sectors lead to inefficiencies, potential delays, errors, and a lack of integration. Users face difficulties in finding suitable testing sites, understanding test requirements, and interpreting results, while sensitive medical data remains vulnerable to security risks.
proposed_solution: A comprehensive, AI-powered digital platform that integrates laboratory and radiology services. The solution includes a centralized user account system, a searchable catalog of medical services, AI models for test result analysis and X-ray interpretation, and an interactive chatbot for patient guidance, all secured with robust data protection measures.

3. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
4. Implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms.
5. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
6. Generate accurate analytical insights and visualizations.
7. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.

project_title: Mobile Based System for Traffic Monitoring and Guidance
student_names: Omar Elsayed, Youssef Ashraf
abstract: The theme of the system/application is the usage of a combination of Mobile and Traffic Guidance Technologies to organize the world's information and to make it universally accessible and useful to a wider and better extent. We tried as information systems specialists to define, analyze, generate and implement an application with high degree of quality and simplicity. The proposed system is a mobile application that allowS online guidance and routing of user based on his current location, User's current location together with his destination is collected dynamically and completely independent of internet service. The system maintains road status to avoid crowded roads and provides user fully functional and active map that allows him to search fora particular place like some mall, or some spot for tourist interest by simply writing its name. System then automaticaly extracis destination's coordinates and processes user query. The results represents mainly the shortest route to destination taking into consideration the over crowdedness of the road. System as well shows real-time location-based alternatives that can be suitable to user search and current location.
description: No one can ignore the fact that traffic problem is not a newly born issue here in Egypt, but it is known for nearly thirty years ago, in the early eighties of the last century with the beginning of the rule of President Mubarak, who called at the time also to form a higher committee in 1982 to study the problem of traffic in the capital and overcome before they escalate, as is the case now, One of the main recommendations of this Committee is not to approve the construction of any major governmental or non- governnmental organizations in the city center. The traffic problem in Egypt has caused us a lot of trouble on a personal level and community level, we find difficult always because of the problems of overcrowding and the difficulty of transportation and the large number of fatal accidents, this problem is large and deep and has dimensions of economic, societal, environmental and psychological that had to be to us as part of the IT world that we are trying to start in finding solutions to this problem for our beloved country Egypt
problem_statement: The absence of a dedicated mobile-based system for traffic monitoring and guidance reduces the efficiency of managing traffic flow and providing real-time navigation assistance. Traditional manual approaches are often slow, inefficient, and unable to provide accurate real-time traffic information, making it difficult to track traffic conditions, manage congestion, and guide drivers effectively.

We tried as information systems specialists to define, analyze, generate and implement an application with high degree of quality and simplicity.

student_names: Ahmed Farag Mustafa, Ahmed Nabil Gamal, Mohammed Ibrahim Sayed, Mustafa Mohammed abd El-Rahman, Ahmed abd el-ghafar
abstract: The main goal of our project is to make an android application and a web server. The aim of the project is to help users to find interesting places around his current location to help him easily know about places around him. Not only our project help users finding places around, but help owners of any business place's owner to advertise about his place. With the use of our application the owner of a certain place can add information and location of his place so as the normal user can easily find this place.
description: This project is a location-based mobile navigation and discovery system that integrates Augmented Reality (AR) to enhance user experience. It consists of an Android mobile application for end-users to discover nearby points of interest and a web server for business owners to manage and advertise their locations. The system leverages AR technology to overlay digital information onto the physical environment, providing an interactive way for users to explore their surroundings.
problem_statement: Users often struggle to discover interesting places or businesses in their immediate vicinity, and business owners lack an efficient, interactive platform to advertise their physical locations to nearby potential customers.
proposed_solution: A dual-component system featuring an Android application that uses GPS and AR to display nearby places, and a web-based management portal where business owners can register their locations, upload details, and manage their advertisements.
objectives:
1. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
2. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
3. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
4. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
5. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
6. Improve system performance and reliability.
7. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
8. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.

student_names: Sammar Kamal Saber Hamed, Apdallah Yosri Ahmed Fahmy, Heba Mohammed Abdelfattah, Khaled Mohammed Hassan, Wafaa Mohammed Abdelfattah
abstract: The mobile voice actions project (Speak2Do) is an android application enables mobile users to do many tasks on their phones via voice, especially handicaps and blind people in effective way. In this version, the application provides many features that a user frequently does and the minimum android platform supported is The new versions will contain more specific features to focus help to blind people like OCR, Special spooking keyboard and custom user interface also will be provided for all android platform. The current main categories a speaker can order are custom views of call logs, send, show and read messages, send emails, call contacts, view contact details, create and delete calendar events, set alarms, ask about time and date, change mobile modes, Wi-Fi and Bluetooth settings, web queries, launch various apps... Speak2Do requires internet connection, since it uses Google speech API to get most related hypotheses of what user said. Mobile Voice Actions can work in acceptable level of noise. The returned hypotheses are affected by pronunciation of speaker and how he says words and phrases.
description: Speak2Do is an Android-based mobile application designed to facilitate hands-free interaction with smartphones through voice commands. By leveraging the Google Speech API, the application allows users to perform a wide range of system tasks, such as managing communications, calendar events, and device settings, with a specific focus on improving accessibility for visually impaired and handicapped users.
problem_statement: Many mobile users, particularly those with visual impairments or physical disabilities, face significant challenges in navigating complex smartphone interfaces and performing routine tasks efficiently. Traditional touch-based interfaces can be inaccessible or cumbersome for these users, creating a need for a more intuitive, voice-driven interaction model.
proposed_solution: The project provides a comprehensive voice-controlled interface that interprets user speech to execute common mobile operations. By integrating with the Google Speech API, the application converts spoken commands into actionable tasks, effectively bridging the gap between user intent and device functionality for individuals who require assistive technology.
objectives:
1. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
2. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.
3. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
4. Enhance user experience and usability.
5. Improve system performance and reliability.
6. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
7. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
8. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.

project_title: Mock Interview: WEB-based Virtual interview for job seeker's
student_names: Sameh Elisha Abdelaty Awad, Khaled Mohamed Abdelwahab, AbdelRahman Kamal Meslhi, AbdelRahman Ragae Mahrous, Heba Ashraf Shapan
abstract: A key factor in career success is the ability to perform well in job interviews. However, it can be challenging to obtain feedback on one's performance, particularly in a practice setting. This project presents an AI-powered mock interview platform that provides personalized feedback to users on their interview skills. The platform utilizes a range of AI models to analyze user performance, including face detection, facial emotion analysis, voice emotion analysis, similarity of answers, and grammatical error correction. The platform provides a seamless and personalized experience, allowing users to practice and improve their interview skills in a user-friendly environment.
description: The project is a web-based virtual interview platform designed to help job seekers practice and improve their interview performance. It simulates real-world interview scenarios and provides comprehensive feedback on verbal and non-verbal communication, including facial expressions, voice tone, grammar, and the content of answers.
problem_statement: Job seekers often face fear of rejection due to a lack of experience and understanding of the interview process. Furthermore, there is a significant lack of constructive feedback provided to candidates after interviews, leaving them unable to identify their weaknesses or improve their performance for future opportunities.
proposed_solution: The project provides a virtual interview environment that uses AI to analyze the candidate's performance in real-time. It evaluates facial expressions, voice emotions, grammatical accuracy, and the semantic similarity of answers compared to ideal responses, offering actionable insights to help users refine their interview skills.
objectives:
1. Generate accurate analytical insights and visualizations.
2. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
3. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.
4. Provide efficient data analysis and reporting features.
5. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
6. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
7. Improve system performance and reliability.

project_title: mOCRa: Mobile Optical Character Recognition Application
student_names: Dina Mohamed Hassan, Hanya Mohamed Abd_Allah, Heba Reda Anter, Hoda arag Abdl-Aleim, Toka Ateif Sayed
abstract: In the last years, mobile phones have evolved to devices with high resolution cameras and Internet connection. In this context, the idea of applying OCR techniques to the pictures taken with these devices rises. As result of this idea, we have built mOCRa, the application presented in this work.
description: mOCRa is a mobile application designed to capture images of text using a smartphone camera, process the image to extract text, and provide translation services. The system bridges mobile devices with server-side processing using MATLAB for character recognition and web services for communication, ultimately allowing users to digitize and translate handwritten or printed text.
problem_statement: Users face difficulties in manually entering data into mobile devices due to small keyboard sizes and the inability to easily transfer information from physical sources like posters or personal cards to digital formats. Additionally, there is a need for OCR tools to assist low-vision individuals in daily tasks like reading receipts or traffic signs.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a mobile application that captures high-resolution images of text, sends them to a server for processing via MATLAB-based OCR algorithms, and returns the recognized text to the mobile device. The system also integrates with the Google Translate API to provide language translation for the extracted text.
objectives:
1. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
2. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
3. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
4. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
5. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.

project_title: Neonatal Intensive Care Unit Management System
student_names: Ali Mostafa Ali Youssef, Amr Taha Hassan Mohamed, Abdallah Saad Abdallah Abu Saree, Alaa Ismail Yassin Mohamed, Karim Mohamed Gaber Mohamed, Ahmed Mohamed Ahmed Afifi
abstract: A neonatal intensive care unit (NICU), also known as an intensive nursery (ICN), is an intensive care unit specializing in the care of ill or premature newborn infants. The neonatal mortality rate is still dangerously high, especially in the poorest countries. While some children born in developed countries have the best chance of survival, those in less developed areas face serious risks due to the lack of specialized care. This project aims to bridge this gap by providing a digital management system for NICUs to improve tracking, monitoring, and medical intervention for newborns.
description: The Neonatal Intensive Care Unit Management System is a comprehensive platform designed to digitize the operations of a NICU. It features distinct interfaces for administrators (doctors, nurses, accountants) and parents. Nurses can register infants and update medical data, doctors can monitor patient conditions, and accountants manage billing. Parents are provided with a portal to monitor their child's condition, view updates, and handle financial transactions related to the care provided.
problem_statement: The current NICU environment suffers from reliance on paper-based records, difficulty in tracking patient data, lack of visibility into available resources (beds/devices), and limited communication between medical staff and parents, all of which contribute to suboptimal care and increased risks for premature infants.
proposed_solution: A centralized, digital management system that automates record-keeping, provides real-time monitoring of infant health data, tracks equipment and bed availability, and offers a secure portal for parents to stay informed about their child's progress and treatment costs.
objectives:
1. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
2. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
3. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
4. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
5. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
6. Optimize resource allocation and task management.
7. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.

student_names: Ahmed Magdy Ahmed Hassan Awad, Aly Alaa El-Din Aly Helal, Jaidaa Hosny Adly Ibrahim, Logine Hosny Adly Ibrahim
abstract: The following documents the creation of a Network-based Intrusion Detection & (NIDS) system built on a python infrastructure on Windows, whereby network security enthusiasts as well as security practitioners can monitor a small-to-medium sized network and view alerts generated based on a wealth of databases. The databases will contain well-known malicious-activity digital signatures, IP addresses, DNSs, email addresses and other information extracted from continuously-updated. The administrators of this utility will have the ability to smoothly choose signature databases as well as real-time feeds with which to filter traffic, generate alerts to mitigate risk to the network. These rules and configurations will be customized through the interface. We intend to further provide this system with a Machine Learning integration that can help detect anomalies from expected normal traffic, mitigating the weakness of depending solely on signature-based detection, which is far from foolproof.
description: A GUI-based network security utility designed for Windows that monitors network traffic, analyzes packets, and generates alerts based on customizable signature databases and threat intelligence feeds to mitigate network risks.
problem_statement: The increasing sophistication of cyber threats, internet malware, and DDoS attacks poses a constant risk to network integrity, leading to potential financial loss, loss of trust, and data compromise for individuals and organizations.
proposed_solution: A user-friendly, Python-based Network Intrusion Detection System (NIDS) that provides real-time traffic monitoring, customizable rule management, and automated alert generation to help security practitioners identify and respond to malicious activity.
objectives:
1. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
2. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
3. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
4. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
5. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.

full_content: Network-Based Intrusion Detection System (NIDS). The databases will contain well-known malicious-activity digital signatures, IP addresses, DNSs, email addresses and other information extracted from continuously-updated. The administrators of this utility will have the ability to smoothly choose signature databases as well as real-time feeds with which to filter traffic, generate alerts to mitigate risk to the network. student_names: Alaa Walid Mohamed Alshitany, Eman Tarek Taha Ali, Basma Talaat Mahmoud Mohamed, Abdelrahman Ahmed Abdelhady, Yara Ahmed Mohamed Swisa
abstract: Cancer is a leading cause of death, and predicting the efficacy of cancer drugs is challenging due to patient heterogeneity. This project integrates GDSC and CCLE databases to analyze genomic, transcriptomic, and epigenomic data using deep learning models (CNN and GCN) to predict drug effectiveness. Additionally, an Android application is developed to streamline oncology center services, including appointment booking and digital patient record management, to assist doctors in clinical decision-making.
description: The project is a comprehensive medical informatics system designed for oncology centers. It combines a predictive AI engine that evaluates drug sensitivity for cancer patients based on multi-omics data with a management platform that digitizes hospital workflows, including patient scheduling, service selection, and electronic health records.
problem_statement: Oncology centers face significant challenges including inefficient appointment scheduling, reliance on manual paper-based patient records, and the difficulty for junior doctors to accurately predict the effectiveness of specific cancer drugs for individual patients.
proposed_solution: The solution consists of two parts: a deep learning-based predictive model (using CNN and GCN) to determine drug efficacy based on patient profiles, and an Android application that digitizes administrative tasks, enables online appointment booking, and provides doctors with centralized access to patient records.

abstract: In view of the prosperity of electronic commerce and people's need for electronic buying and selling sites, this project introduces an online auction application. The system facilitates the sale of products at the best possible price by allowing users to access auctions from anywhere at any time. It incorporates AI methods for product recommendations based on user behavior and feedback. The platform also addresses unemployment by allowing users to register as freelance delivery agents, and ensures security through digital contracts between buyers, sellers, and suppliers.

It provides a secure environment for users to buy and sell products, features an AI-driven recommendation engine to personalize the shopping experience, and includes a unique freelance delivery system to support logistics and job creation.

abstract: Elections are the official process for choosing a person to hold an official position, and their success depends on citizen participation. This project aims to solve obstacles in traditional paper-based voting, such as overcrowding at polling stations, the risk of virus transmission (e.g., COVID-19), and potential electoral fraud. By transitioning to an electronic system via the Internet, the project facilitates access to candidate information, reduces the time and effort required for citizens to vote, and ensures a more secure and efficient electoral process.
description: The Online Election project is a web-based platform designed to digitize the voting process for student and senate elections. It provides a centralized portal where users can view candidate profiles, including their curriculum vitae and electoral symbols, and cast their votes securely. The system incorporates user verification via mobile codes and provides real-time election results, aiming to modernize the voting experience while maintaining transparency and accessibility.
problem_statement: Traditional paper-based elections suffer from several issues: overcrowding at polling stations, difficulty in locating voting centers, increased risk of spreading viruses, susceptibility to electoral fraud, significant time consumption, and a lack of accessible information regarding candidates.
proposed_solution: A secure, web-based electronic voting system that allows users to vote remotely from any internet-connected device. The system includes features for candidate information display, user identity verification via mobile SMS codes, secure data collection, and automated result calculation to ensure accuracy and efficiency.
objectives:
1. Enhance user experience and usability.
2. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
3. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
4. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
5. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.

abstract: Mobile application that aims to serve the community and facilitate life matters. When a person searches for a technician in a specific profession, He may find it difficult to reach the right and qualified technicians. So, our flutter app facilitates the following tasks: 1- Searching for technicians in various fields. 2- Viewing the technician's Portfolio that contains previous work. 3- in-app chat between the customer and the technician to reach an agreement. 4- Order the technicians from the app and when the work is done the customer must provide feedback about the work. 5- this feedback is processed by AI model and turned into a rate for the technician. 6- the app makes technicians find work easily and urges them to do their best in their work. thus, we won't face problems finding the proper people to do a specific job and we will spare time and effort.

student_names: Israa Ahmed Abdu, Enas Ghayad Abdelkhalek, Menna Allah Wafik Mousa, Hoda Mohamed Ghallab, Hoda Hesham Hamed
abstract: The word “vote” means to choose from a list, to elect or to determine. Our project discusses the various security threats for an online internet voting system and describes the most common threat in the communication medium. This online voting system seeks to address these issues by providing a secure, transparent, and accessible platform for citizens to cast their votes remotely. By leveraging digital technology and robust verification protocols, the system aims to increase voter participation, reduce costs, and minimize human error associated with traditional paper-based polling.
description: The Online Voting System is a web-based platform designed to modernize the democratic process in Egypt. It allows eligible citizens over the age of 18 to cast their votes securely from any location, eliminating the need for physical presence at polling stations. The system integrates with the Civil Registry of Egypt database to ensure voter authenticity and maintains high security standards to prevent fraud and ensure the integrity of the election results.
problem_statement: Traditional manual election processes are plagued by issues such as time-consuming hand counts, potential for voter error, lack of transparency, high costs, and physical congestion at polling locations. Furthermore, paper-based systems are susceptible to manipulation and logistical delays in declaring results.
proposed_solution: An automated, secure online voting platform that authenticates voters using their National ID (SSN) and multi-factor verification (security questions and SMS codes). The system manages the entire election lifecycle—pre-voting registration, secure voting, and automated post-voting reporting—to ensure accuracy, confidentiality, and verifiability.
objectives:
1. Enhance user experience and usability.
2. Improve system performance and reliability.
3. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
4. Enhance system security and protect sensitive user data.
5. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.

abstract: This project presents an opinion mining and sentiment analysis system designed to assist consumers and businesses in navigating the complexities of online shopping. By leveraging the Best Buy API to aggregate product data, the platform enables users to share and review experiences, thereby facilitating informed purchasing decisions and providing businesses with valuable insights into consumer sentiment. The system is built using a robust web architecture, incorporating the CodeIgniter PHP framework and responsive front-end technologies to ensure a seamless user experience.

abstract: The Personal Life Management System (LMS) is a comprehensive mobile application designed to assist users in organizing various aspects of their daily lives. It integrates features for religious guidance, appointment scheduling, health and diet management, emergency preparedness, and career development. By digitizing these daily tasks, the system aims to reduce reliance on inefficient paper-based methods and improve overall personal productivity.
description: LMS is a multi-functional application that serves as a personal assistant. It provides users with tools to manage their religious practices (reading Qur'an), health (diet systems), professional life (job searching and recruitment), and daily schedule (appointments and reminders). The system is designed to be a centralized hub for managing personal, social, and practical life activities.
problem_statement: Individuals struggle to manage diverse aspects of their lives, such as remembering appointments, maintaining healthy diets, finding suitable employment, and accessing emergency information. Traditional paper-based methods are prone to loss, damage, and inefficiency, leading to wasted time and lack of organization.
proposed_solution: The development of a centralized mobile application (LMS) that automates and digitizes personal management tasks. The solution provides a digital interface for scheduling, health tracking, job matching, and quick access to religious texts and emergency protocols, replacing manual, paper-based processes.

abstract: The Personal Profiling & Assistance project is a digital health platform designed to provide initial mental health assessments and support. By leveraging artificial intelligence, the system evaluates user responses to identify potential indicators of anxiety, depression, and personality traits. The platform also serves as a bridge between users and professional care by providing a search feature for nearby psychiatrists and clinics, aiming to reduce the barriers to accessing mental health services.
description: This project is a comprehensive mental health support system that combines personality profiling with AI-driven diagnostic tools. It addresses the growing need for accessible mental health resources by offering self-assessment tools, initial diagnostic reports, and a directory of professional medical services. The platform is designed to provide guidance, reduce the stigma associated with seeking help, and offer immediate support for individuals experiencing psychological distress.
problem_statement: Individuals face significant challenges in accessing mental health support, including the high cost of services, geographical barriers, the stigma surrounding mental health, and the difficulty of obtaining an initial diagnosis without immediate professional consultation. Furthermore, the rise in mental health issues like anxiety and depression, coupled with a decline in face-to-face interaction, necessitates a digital solution for self-assessment and guidance.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an AI-powered platform that offers interactive personality tests and mental health evaluations. The system analyzes user inputs to provide an initial assessment of mental well-being, including indicators for anxiety and depression, and generates personalized guidance tips. Additionally, it includes a location-based search feature to help users find nearby psychiatrists and clinics for further professional assistance.

abstract: In an era where technology seamlessly integrates with the realms of exploration and adventure, our project, "Pharaohs Land Guide, " emerges as a beacon of innovation in the domain of tourism. Rooted in the ancient wonders of Egypt, this smart tourism application harnesses the power of artificial intelligence (AI) to offer a transformative travel experience. Through a seamless blend of cutting-edge AI algorithms and comprehensive data analysis, "Pharaohs Land Guide" enables users to embark on an immersive journey through the rich tapestry of Egypt's cultural heritage. From the majestic pyramids of Giza to the serene banks of the Nile, users are guided to explore iconic landmarks, hidden gems, and off-the-beaten-path destinations. Key features of our application include image recognition technology, allowing users to discover historical sites by simply capturing a photo. Additionally, advanced voice search capabilities empower users to navigate through the application hands-free, enhancing accessibility and convenience. Moreover, "Pharaohs Land Guide" incorporates a sophisticated recommendation system that curates personalized travel itineraries based on user preferences, ensuring a tailored and unforgettable experience. With integrated transportation services, currency conversion tools, and interactive maps, users can seamlessly plan and navigate their Egyptian odyssey. Furthermore, the application fosters community engagement through features like user reviews and sharing experiences, enabling travelers to connect and share insights with fellow adventurers. In essence, "Pharaohs Land Guide" redefines the paradigm of modern tourism, offering a fusion of ancient wonders and cutting-edge technology to unravel the mysteries of Egypt's timeless legacy.
description: Welcome to Pharaohs Land Guide, a revolutionary project designed to transform the landscape of tourism applications and redefine the way travelers experience the wonders of Egypt. As we embark on this journey, our goal is to create a cutting-edge mobile application that seamlessly blends innovation, personalization, and cultural immersion to offer users an unparalleled exploration of Egypt's treasures.
problem_statement: In the realm of contemporary tourism applications, the existing solutions exhibit limitations in providing a truly personalized, culturally immersive, and technologically advanced exploration experience for users visiting Egypt. Current platforms lack the ability to dynamically adapt to individual preferences, offer indepth cultural narratives, and leverage cutting-edge technologies to enhance the overall journey. Specific Problems: 1- Generic Information Retrieval: Existing tourism apps often deliver generic information about landmarks and sites, lacking the ability to provide personalized details based on user preferences. 2- Recommendations: Recommendations in current solutions are static, relying on general popularity rather than real-time factors and individual preferences. 3- Cultural Disconnect: Users encounter a cultural disconnect as available apps provide basic factual information without immersing them in the rich historical and cultural context of Egypt. 4- Fragmented User Experience: Users are forced to switch between multiple platforms for information retrieval, recommendations, and travel assistance, resulting in a fragmented and disjointed user experience. Scope of the Problem: The identified problems within existing tourism applications emphasize the need for a solution that goes beyond conventional offerings. Pharaohs Land Guide aims to address these challenges by introducing a platform that prioritizes personalization, cultural immersion, and technological innovation, redefining the standards of tourism applications for users exploring Egypt.
proposed_solution: Pharaohs Land Guide introduces a groundbreaking approach to personalized exploration, tailoring the user experience to individual preferences, interests, and travel styles. Our app redefines recommendations with a dynamic system that considers real-time factors such as weather, events, and user behavior, ensuring up-to-date and relevant suggestions. Pharaohs Land Guide stands out by delivering a deeper cultural connection. Through engaging narratives and historical storytelling, users will gain a profound understanding of the cultural significance behind each landmark and site. Our application offers a seamless and unified user experience by integrating information retrieval, recommendations, travel assistance, and cultural insights within a single platform, eliminating the need for users to switch between multiple apps. Pharaohs Land Guide introduces voice search capabilities, enabling users to interact with the app using natural language, making it more intuitive and user-friendly. At the forefront of travel technology innovation, Pharaohs Land Guide leverages state-of-the-art tools like advanced recommendation algorithms to deliver a unique and technologically advanced travel experience. In summary, Pharaohs Land Guide goes beyond the limitations of current solutions, offering a revolutionary approach to tourism that prioritizes personalization, cultural immersion, and cutting-edge technology. Our app is poised to set a new standard in the industry, providing users with a transformative and enriching exploration of Egypt.

student_names: Ahmed Hamdy Saied Mohamed, Menna Ahmed Mohamed Fouad, Mohamed Gamal Zenhom Khalil, Marwa Mohamed Samy Mohamed, Mohamed Tarek Mohamed Hussein, Eslam Khairy Hamed Mohamed, Baher Mohamed Zakaria Elgobashi, Nourhan Ayman elsayed Ahmed
abstract: Plant diseases are among the most significant challenges in agriculture, leading to substantial reductions in crop yield and quality. These diseases are caused by biological, environmental, and chemical factors, making early and accurate detection crucial for effective disease management. Traditionally, plant disease diagnosis relies on manual visual inspection by farmers or agricultural experts, which is time-consuming, requires experience, and is prone to human errors. To address these challenges, we propose an automated deep learning-based system for the diagnosis of the most common plant diseases. The system provides precise identification of the disease based on leaf images and suggests appropriate treatments to mitigate its effects. Our system is designed as both a smartphone application and a web platform, making it easily accessible to farmers and agricultural researchers. The system utilizes image processing and deep learning techniques to classify plant diseases with high accuracy. Plant images were collected using smartphone cameras and drones, ensuring a diverse dataset that enhances model robustness. Prior to training, various preprocessing techniques, including data augmentation, were applied to improve model performance. The proposed system consists of two deep learning models, each trained on a different subset of plant disease images. The first model achieved 94% training accuracy and 92% test accuracy, while the second model demonstrated 96% training accuracy and 95% test accuracy. The models were developed using pre-trained models architectures, which are known for their efficiency and high performance in image classification tasks. By leveraging machine learning and computer vision, this system offers an efficient and scalable approach to early disease detection, reducing the reliance on expert evaluations and enabling farmers to take proactive measures to protect their crops. As the dataset grows and model performance improves, the system has the potential to become a vital tool for modern precision agriculture, helping to increase crop productivity, reduce losses, and ensure food security on a global scale.
description: AI Integration: Machine learning models are utilized for plant identification, disease detection, and toxic plant classification, delivering precise and actionable insights. IoT Integration: IoT sensors for humidity and temperature enhance real-time monitoring and data collection, empowering users to make informed decisions.
problem_statement: Plant care is an essential yet challenging task that requires knowledge, consistency, and time. Despite the growing popularity of indoor and outdoor gardening, many individuals struggle to provide the appropriate care for their plants. This often leads to poor plant health, reduced aesthetic appeal, and, in severe cases, plant death. The key challenges faced by plant owners can be summarized as follows: 1- Plant Identification: • Difficulty in accurately identifying plant species. • Without accurate identification, understanding specific care needs such as soil type, light exposure, watering frequency, and temperature requirements becomes difficult. 2- Disease Recognition: • Inability to detect and diagnose plant diseases at an early stage. • Misdiagnosing or failing to diagnose diseases in time can lead to ineffective treatments or irreversible damage. 3- Lack of Reliable Information: • Limited access to reliable, real-time information about plant care practices. • Reliance on general advice that may not suit specific plant requirements. 4- Improper Placement: • Challenges in determining the best environmental conditions for plants. • Placing plants in areas with unsuitable light intensity or humidity. 5- Watering Issues: • Overwatering or underwatering due to inconsistent care routines. 6- Time Constraints: • Busy lifestyles leading to irregular care schedules. • Forgetting essential tasks like watering or checking plant health. 7- Environmental Monitoring: • Absence of tools to assess environmental conditions like light and humidity. • Difficulty maintaining optimal growth conditions for plants. 8- Communication Barriers: • Many users find it difficult to communicate with fellow plant enthusiasts to share information, tips, and experiences. This lack of communication can lead to isolation and missed opportunities for learning and support.
proposed_solution: To address these challenges, the proposed system offers a comprehensive platform for plant care, incorporating the following features:, Plant Identification: Users can take photos of their plants, and the system will identify them, providing names and relevant details to ensure proper care.

abstract: Portal OCR is an iPhone app platform that utilizes optical character recognition to transform image-based characters into editable digital text. The application allows users to capture text via a mobile camera or gallery, edit the recognized text, save it as a PDF, email it, or upload it to Dropbox. Additionally, it features translation capabilities, text-to-speech conversion, and a communication engine for users to discuss and share information.
description: Portal OCR is a mobile application designed for the iOS platform that bridges the gap between physical documents and digital content. It enables users to digitize printed materials instantly using their phone's camera, eliminating the need for traditional scanners. Beyond simple OCR, the app integrates translation services, text-to-speech functionality, and a social messaging component to facilitate collaboration and information exchange among users.
problem_statement: Traditional OCR processes require expensive scanners and specialized hardware, making it difficult for users to digitize documents on the go. Furthermore, manual retyping of printed documents is time-consuming and prone to errors.
proposed_solution: A mobile application for iOS that leverages the device's built-in camera to perform real-time OCR. The solution includes features for text editing, PDF generation, cloud storage integration (Dropbox), multi-language translation, and text-to-speech conversion to enhance accessibility and productivity.

abstract: The amount of data in our lives is growing exponentially, making data analytics a crucial part of organizational operations. As big data, AI, and machine learning evolve, there is a growing need for sophisticated web scraping tools. This project addresses the need for price comparison platforms, which are valuable not only for individual consumers seeking the best deals but also for businesses monitoring market trends and competitor pricing on a daily basis.
description: A web-based platform designed to aggregate product pricing data from various e-commerce websites. The system utilizes automated web scraping techniques to collect, process, and display product information, allowing users to compare prices, features, and deals across multiple retailers in one centralized location.
problem_statement: Consumers often struggle to find the best deals because they have to manually visit multiple e-commerce stores to compare prices, features, and shipping costs, which is time-consuming and inefficient.
proposed_solution: A centralized price comparison website that uses Python-based web scrapers to automatically collect product data from different e-commerce platforms and present them to the user in a unified interface for easy comparison.

student_names: Ahmed Abd-Elghany Dabour, Ahmed Iraki Mohamed, Esraa Ragab Abd-Elhameed, Hend Sabry Hassan, Manar Mohamed Ahmed, Mervat Karam El-Sayed, Samar Samy Mohamed
abstract: Many of the projects are not completed due to poor planning. In many organizations most of projects exceeded time, or money limits while others lost their objectives. Many studies are made to look for all the complexities and difficulties that face teamwork and cause that failure in delivery of many projects. One of the main reasons that the studies found was that individuals in organization are not fully prepared to adapt to an increasingly digital work environment, either online or offline. Another reason was that most of time is wasted in casual meetings rather than using this time in productivity. In a real organization, each member may work in more than one project at the same time what makes it difficult that all employees are aware of all challenges that face their organization. Accordingly, our solution is that we developed a project management system named "Project Manager". Project Manager platform enables manager to create projects, tasks, assign them to team members and upload attachments. Easy communication among teamwork is guaranteed through project chat that allows all project members to do digital meeting. There is also ability to comment on tasks to easily communicate and solve any misunderstanding between one task members. We hope that our platform will be turning point in project management for saving time and cost and help teams work in more productive environment and deliver more projects.
description: Project Manager is a web-based platform designed to streamline organizational workflows by centralizing project tracking, task assignment, and team communication. It aims to replace inefficient traditional meeting structures with digital collaboration tools, allowing team members to manage multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining transparency and accountability.
problem_statement: Organizations frequently fail to complete projects on time or within budget due to poor planning, inefficient communication, excessive time spent in unproductive meetings, and a lack of preparedness for digital work environments.
proposed_solution: The development of a centralized 'Project Manager' web platform that enables managers to create projects, assign tasks, share files, and facilitate real-time team communication through integrated chat and task-specific commenting features.
objectives:
1. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
2. Improve system performance and reliability.
3. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.
4. Enable real-time monitoring and tracking capabilities.
5. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.

student_names: Mahmoud Emad El-Sayed, Marwan Abdel Hamid Mohamed Al Mehy, Mustafa Yasser Mustafa, Nora Abu Al Yazid, Mina Nabil Georgy Thabet, Muhammed Gamal Mousa Nasr, Ibrahim Rageh Ibrahim
abstract: A smart helmet has been developed that is able to detect hazardous events in dangerous workplaces (mines, building sites, etc.) to protect and secure workers. The project focuses on the mining industry, utilizing gas sensors (MQ2 & MQ5) to detect toxic and flammable gases like CO, CO2, CH4, and H2S. The system integrates hardware sensors and a camera with an AI model to monitor environmental conditions and worker health, providing real-time data to a mobile application for immediate safety intervention.
description: The project involves creating an intelligent mining helmet equipped with a wireless sensor network and camera. It monitors the mine environment for hazardous gases, structural instability (cracks), and fire risks, while simultaneously tracking the health status of the miners. Data is processed via an AI model and transmitted to a centralized system, allowing supervisors to monitor conditions via a Flutter-based mobile application and take preventative actions to save lives and reduce economic loss.
problem_statement: Mining is one of the most dangerous industries, characterized by high rates of injury and death. Current safety helmets only provide physical protection against bumps and lack the technology to monitor environmental hazards (toxic gases, fire, structural collapse) or the health status of miners in real-time, leaving workers vulnerable in noisy and hazardous environments.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is a smart helmet integrated with IoT sensors and a camera. The system continuously monitors the mine environment for gas leaks, temperature, humidity, and structural cracks. It uses a Raspberry Pi to collect data and images, which are sent to Firebase. An AI model analyzes this data to detect potential dangers, and the results are displayed on a Flutter mobile application for supervisors to monitor and respond to emergencies.
objectives:
1. Enhance healthcare efficiency and accessibility.
2. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
3. Improve system performance and reliability.
4. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
5. Improve mobile application usability and performance.

student_names: Moataz Ahmed Hassan Mostafa, Mohamed Mamdouh Goda Ali, Amgad Saadallah Asaad Faheem, Mona Mohammady Saber Mohamed, Israa Elsayed Rezq Ouda, Aya Yahya Abdelsame Elsaid
abstract: Query is a free website that offers a wide range of questions and answers on many topics: programming, medical, literary, etc. The site serves as a platform for users to ask and answer questions about each other, to vote on questions and answers, by joining and actively participating, by accepting (up) or rejecting (down) and editing questions and answers in a manner like a wiki or reddit. This is a traditional question and answer site. Users are given new privileges such as the ability to vote and comment. All User Generated Content is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-Share Alike License. Each user has his own page, and you can follow his own content in response to questions. You can also follow the most frequently asked questions and the most commented questions. The new questions are reviewed through artificial intelligence and matched with the questions on the site so that the questions are not repeated, and the user reaches his goal quickly.
description: Query is a collaborative knowledge-sharing platform designed to facilitate information exchange across various domains. It functions as a community-driven Q&A site where users can post inquiries, provide answers, and curate content through voting and editing mechanisms. The platform integrates AI to analyze incoming questions, preventing redundancy by matching them with existing content to ensure users find relevant information efficiently.
problem_statement: Students, professors, and general users often face difficulties in finding specific, high-quality answers to their questions online. Existing search methods can be inefficient, and users struggle to find reliable information or solutions to complex problems due to fragmented or repetitive content.
proposed_solution: The project proposes 'Query', a centralized, community-driven Q&A web platform. It utilizes a structured voting and editing system to maintain content quality and incorporates an AI-based matching engine to filter and categorize new questions, ensuring that users are directed to existing solutions or relevant discussions, thereby reducing redundancy and improving search accuracy.
objectives:
1. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
2. Enhance user experience and usability.
3. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.
4. Support future scalability and feature expansion.
5. Improve system performance and reliability.
6. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
7. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
8. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.

student_names: Mohamed Ayman Said Elshazly, Mohamed Abdallah Abdulghani Osman, Mohamed Mosad Fraouk zaki, Rahma Hussein Ghoneim, Sara Atef Fawzy, Omneya Ahmed Metwally Hassan
abstract: Ransomware is a type of sophisticated virus that uses encryption to prohibit users from accessing their data unless a ransom is paid to the attacker. The threat presented by ransomware is quite severe, with new varieties and families being discovered on the internet and dark web on a regular basis. Given the nature of the encryption algorithms utilized by ransomware, recovering from an infection is challenging. The rise in ransomware is also accompanied by an increase in the usage of artificial intelligence. Machine learning and deep learning techniques to detecting ransomware are attracting a lot of attention since machine learning and deep learning can identify zero-day threats. So in our project we use different machine learning algorithm to detect the zero day ransomware for the executable file depend on the features of the header of the file.
description: This project provides an open-source ransomware detection system consisting of a desktop application for offline scanning and a web-based platform for online analysis. The system utilizes machine learning models trained on file header features to identify zero-day ransomware threats. The web component integrates with the VirusTotal API and MITRE ATT&CK framework to provide comprehensive threat intelligence and file analysis history.
problem_statement: Ransomware attacks are becoming increasingly sophisticated and frequent, often bypassing traditional signature-based detection methods. These attacks deny users access to critical data, and current security solutions often struggle to identify new, zero-day ransomware variants effectively.
proposed_solution: The team developed a machine learning-based detection system that analyzes the header features of executable files to identify potential ransomware. By training models on specific file characteristics, the system can detect zero-day threats that lack known signatures. The solution is offered as an open-source tool, allowing for community contribution and transparency.
objectives:
1. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
2. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
3. Improve prediction accuracy using machine learning models.
4. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
5. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
6. Improve accessibility across different devices and platforms.

student_names: Ashraf Saad Shewail, Eslam Mamdouh Abd Elmoteleb, Eslam Zakaria Gad-Allah, Ahmed Hamdy Yassein, Mohamed Abd Elfattah Abd Elgwwad, Abd Elmonaem Ezzat Abd Elmonaem
abstract: With the introduction of smart phones and mobile devices, the rate of technology usage has become widespread. It is very likely to see anyone using mobile device on the street, in the bus, at work, at school or even at home no matter if there is a fully functional computer nearby. Particularly, the usage of smart phones is not just limited to basic communication; they are being used as a technological gadget in our daily lives for years. We can easily reach such applications on different fields e.g. image processing, audio tuning, video editing, voice recognition. With the help of these smart applications we are able to interact with our environment much faster, and consequently make life easier, relatively for sure. Apart from mobile phone industry, sharing and staying connected to our environment has become very popular. A person who has a mobile phone with latest technology desires to communicate with friends, share feelings instantly, and of course meet new people who understand him well. In this context, technology came to the point where needs of modern human overlaps today's technology. This study aims to provide a basic application to users who has got those needs in terms of sharing and communicating, for maintaining easy and costless solution. This study currently offers prototype application to this problem using WIFI Direct technology, and intends to be pioneer of its field in consequence of existing small numbers of related applications in the market. As a consequence of this study a basic application is developed where user can discover peers, transfer images and audio data. Connection is established.
description: RapidShare is a local social media application designed for organizations, faculties, companies, and individual users. It facilitates peer-to-peer communication and file sharing without relying on the internet, utilizing Wi-Fi Direct technology to create an ad-hoc network between devices. The application supports voice, text, and drawing-based communication, as well as high-speed file transfers, making it a cost-effective and secure solution for local environments.
problem_statement: Smart phones require 3G or network access points, which are not always available or affordable. Furthermore, connecting to public access points can be insecure, and internet-based communication is often costly or unavailable in specific locations like factories, tunnels, or museums.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an Android-based application that uses Wi-Fi Direct technology to establish an ad-hoc network between smart phones. This allows users to communicate and share data directly with each other without needing an internet connection or external network infrastructure.
objectives:
1. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
2. Improve system performance and reliability.
3. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
4. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
5. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
6. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
7. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
8. Improve mobile application usability and performance.

student_names: Ali Ahmed Anwar, Samah El-Sayed, Alia Atef Tawfik, Ahmed Mohamed Hamed
abstract: This project introduces a new generation of the ration system by replacing traditional physical ration cards with a mobile application. The system utilizes QR codes generated from national ID images to verify customer identity and manage ration services. It is divided into two main sections: one for customers to obtain commodities and manage points, and another for sellers to register goods and monitor transactions, effectively reducing fraud and manual paperwork.
description: The Ration Services Application is a digital platform designed to modernize the Egyptian ration system. It replaces physical smart cards with a secure mobile interface. The system allows families to manage their ration accounts, view consumption, and add or remove family members. For providers, it offers a management dashboard to track inventory, process sales via QR code scanning, and automatically calculate point deductions, ensuring a transparent and efficient supply chain.
problem_statement: The traditional ration system suffers from issues such as long waiting times, manual paperwork, potential for fraud, difficulty in managing family member data, and the inconvenience of lost physical smart cards.
proposed_solution: A mobile-based application that replaces physical cards with QR codes linked to national IDs. The solution provides a digital interface for both consumers and sellers to manage transactions, track points, and update family data in real-time, thereby eliminating manual errors and reducing crowding at distribution points.

1. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
2. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
3. Improve workflow and management efficiency.
4. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
5. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
6. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
7. Improve system performance and reliability.

project_title: Reading Text For Blind People Using Mobile App
student_names: Mohammed Ali Abdelmaujoud, Asmaa Saeed Saleh., Asmaa Magdy Elsayad., Mohammed Ebrahim Fatoh Elsaid., Asmaa Reda Adross Khater., May Elsayed Hassan Ali
abstract: Reading text is part of everyone's life. reading is important for gaining knowledge and entertainment, Reading on just reading books, but reading everything around you like bills - menus in the restaurant, knowing the money numbers and time, etc. Etc. The World Health Organization (WHO) estimates 253 million people live with vision impairment: 36 million are blind and 217 million have moderate to severe vision impairment. Unfortunately, everything is not printed in Braille or audio format for the blind (or visually impaired). Braille includes problems such as large book size and slow reading in this context; the present work focuses the development of a text to speech for help the blind to read. Reading Text for Blind People is mobile application that allows a blind user to "read" text (a sheet of paper, a book, etc.). To achieve that, a set of frameworks of Optical Character Recognition (OCR) and Text to Speech (TTS) are integrated, which enables the user, using a smartphone, to take a picture and hear the text that exists in the picture.
description: Reading is a human right, but at the currently not all people can access books or other reading materials as they can buy devices that help to read because it is expensive so we thought about our project (Text Reading For blind people) which allow vision impairment and blindness to hear the voice without moves his/her finger across the page or your smart device.
problem_statement: Reading text is part of everyone's life, reading is important for gaining knowledge and entertainment. The World Health Organization WHOestimates 253 million people live with vision impairment: 36 million are blind and 217 million have moderate to severe vision impairment. It's estimated that 1:3 people with disability between the ages of 18-64 live in poverty 81% of all people who are blind or have moderate to severe vision impairment are aged 50 years and above. Unfortunately, not everything is printed in Braille or audio format for the blind (or visually impaired). Braille text includes problems such as large book size and slow reading, there are devices to help the blind to read like a ring (finger reader) but it is expensive.
proposed_solution: To solve this problem, we work on developing a mobile application to helps the blind people will be able to read any text easily in anywhere. In application, the blind can interact with application by commands voice, he/she can order application to take a photo or open file (pdf, word, etc.) and then apply the OCR technology to get the text and text convert to voice via TTS technology which the blind can hear this voice.
objectives:
1. Improve patient monitoring and healthcare management.
2. Provide accurate and reliable functionality.
3. Create a mobile-friendly and accessible application.
4. Enhance user experience and usability.
5. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
6. Improve decision-making using artificial intelligence techniques.
7. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.

project_title: Real-Time Accident Detection Through Surveillance Cameras
student_names: Mohamed Zaghloul Abd Elmonem, Mohamed Eltoukhy Abd Elhaleam, Mahmoud Adel Elhamied, Mahmoud Maher Azmy Fadl
abstract: Over 35 million people die in road traffic crashes each year. This project presents a system based on computer vision techniques that detects road accidents and reports them in nearly real-time. The system uses a client-server architecture with an interactive GUI to monitor accidents and notify authorities. The first version achieved 92% accuracy in crash detection at 30 fps using Python.
description: The project is a comprehensive accident detection system that utilizes deep learning models to analyze video feeds from surveillance cameras. It provides real-time alerts, video storage for future analysis, and a user-friendly desktop interface for administrators to manage and control the system, aiming to reduce response times for emergency services.
problem_statement: Road accidents are a global issue causing millions of injuries and deaths annually. Traditional IOT-based sensor systems are costly, complex to manage, and difficult to deploy in remote areas, while existing AI attempts have suffered from insufficient accuracy.
proposed_solution: A deep learning-based computer vision system that processes video streams to detect accidents in real-time. The solution uses the YOLO algorithm to identify crashes and provides an automated notification system to alert authorities, offering a more cost-effective and scalable alternative to sensor-based hardware.
objectives:
1. Implement modern technologies and best practices.
2. Develop a scalable and maintainable solution.
3. Generate accurate analytical insights and visualizations.
4. Reduce operational complexity and improve efficiency.
5. Provide efficient data analysis and reporting features.

abstract: Jobify system helps students or graduates to search for a job and apply for a job that suits their requirements. In addition to that, companies offer job opportunities that they need by entering the company's specialization and the characteristics of the required job. This is done by: - Create an account for the company (the employer) on the system, and the field of work of the company and its needs for jobs are determined, and the existence of the company is confirmed on the ground. Create an account for the employee (who is looking for a job) on the system, and his field of work is determined, and his CV is created if it does not exist. For example, when the company offers that it is looking for employees for a specific job, the company enters the characteristics of the job and the system displays the available employees in this specialty to the company, while the system also displays the job at the same time to the employees who are looking for a job in the same specialty as the offered job. In this system, we have saved a lot of effort and time from company (the employer) and employee (who is looking for a job) especially in light of the current circumstances and the spread of covid-19, which gives the system great importance in our societies. The system was built using many programming languages coding the design and create its database: - Using front-end methodologies: HTML5, CSS3, SASS, Bootstrap4, JavaScript, jQuery, ReactJS, Adobe xd. Using back-end methodologies: PHP7, MySQL.
description: Work is the backbone of the economy of any country and is the main source of income for members of society. At the present time, society is facing high unemployment rates despite the availability of job opportunities and the availability of job seekers. The reason for this is the difficulty of communication between employers and job seekers. Therefore, we created a system to increase communication between employers and job seekers. Through the specialization that the employee enters, the companies that advertise vacancies in the same specialty will appear to him.
problem_statement: Recruitment is the process of attracting screening and selecting qualified people for a Job. A typical recruitment system consists of a database of jobseekers on one side and employers using the database to fill the vacancies on the other. Recruitment agencies are always seeking to increase the number of Job seekers using their databases.
proposed_solution: According to the recent events of Corona and others, which led to the creation of job opportunities and the difficulty of finding them, so we created this system to help people find suitable job opportunities. Most people who are looking for suitable jobs in other sites cannot know the salary for the appropriate job for them, but on the contrary, this system through which each company, while announcing the job, puts all its information and in addition to the salary before sending the CV to the company. We made the search process easy by allowing the employee to find a job opportunity in the nearest area to him. We will develop the system by adding many features, including: We will add a feature that the system sends an alert to the employee's email. These alerts contain jobs from the same specialty that the employee recorded in his data. We will use a protection system for the system through which the system can verify the identity of the company that has posted the job. We will make a chat so that the applicant can communicate with the company. We will add the ability for each person registered in the account to be able to follow up on other people who have registered on the system.

project_title: Remember Me: Early diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease and a patient follow-up system
student_names: Nora Ali Ali Mohammed, Salma Ahmed Marouf Abd-Elhameed, Azza Nasser Elsheshtawy Bahloul, Raheel Mohammed Mohammed, Engy Ebrahim Salah-Eldeen, Abd-Elwahab Mohammed Abdo
abstract: According to the WHO, around 50 million people suffer from dementia, and nearly 10 million new cases of AD are reported every year. Alzheimer's disease (AD) is the most common type of dementia, a progressive disease beginning with mild memory loss. The major problem is that it cannot be recognized except by the appearance of its symptoms, and once the symptoms appear, the disease cannot be stopped. This project aims to early diagnose the disease based on patient MRI images and create a complete system to help patients in all stages of the disease and support their families and health care providers. The project consists of 4 parts: a web application for patient follow-up, a mobile application to activate the patient's memory, an AI model for diagnosis through MRI, and a desktop application for memory testing and disease diagnosis.
description: Remember Me is an integrated medical informatics system designed to assist in the early diagnosis and management of Alzheimer's disease. The system utilizes AI-driven analysis of MRI scans to detect early signs of cognitive impairment and provides a multi-platform ecosystem (web, mobile, and desktop) to support patients and caregivers. It includes features for memory training, patient monitoring, and providing educational resources to families and healthcare providers.
problem_statement: Alzheimer's disease is a leading cause of death with no known cure, and it is difficult to diagnose in its early stages. There is a lack of public awareness, insufficient research, and a lack of comprehensive software systems that provide both diagnostic capabilities and daily support for patients and their caregivers.
proposed_solution: The project proposes an integrated system that combines an AI model for early diagnosis using MRI scans with a multi-platform software suite. This suite includes a web application for information and follow-up, a mobile application for memory activation through puzzles and tests, and a desktop application for continuous memory monitoring and diagnosis.
objectives:
1. Generate accurate analytical insights and visualizations.
2. Improve patient monitoring and healthcare management.
3. Develop a responsive and user-friendly web application.
4. Improve mobile application usability and performance.
5. Implement intelligent AI-based functionalities.
6. Optimize resource allocation and task management.
7. Implement modern technologies and best practices.

abstract: Eve is known as mirror of the human body. In this project, we especially interested in retina of the eye by focusing on one of its diseases which is Diabetic Retinopathy. Retina is the layer of tissue found at the very back of the eye. When light enters your eye and hits the retina, the retina will process that light information and send signals to the brain through your optic nerve enabling you to see. Without the retina, your brain won't receive any signals about what you're seeing so we consider a healthy retina as a critical health issue for a good vision. Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a threatening retinal disease characterized by the presence of different types of lesions in the affected area, it occurs in people suffering from diabetes for a long period of time and exhibiting mild to severe symptoms. We can describe retinal lesions as Tumors appears in many different shapes on the eye. Detecting DR is a time-consuming and manual process involves right classification of lesions into their appropriate classes that can be an error-prone process, also limited number of eye care practitioners who are trained in interpreting retinal images and evaluate fundus photographs constitute a barrier to DR detection. To address these challenges, this project focuses on developing an automated DR detection system. The automated DR detection methods will speed up the detection and decision-making process and assist doctors diagnose and manage DR detection process. This project presents

project_title: Road Surface Quality Detection Using Accelerometer Data
student_names: Mahmoud Ahmed Hosni Mousa, Mahmoud El-Sayed Soliman Ali, Mohamed Yehia Mohamed Mohamed, Mohamed Mashhour Sayed Ahmed, Mohamed Mohamed Mohamed El-kholy
abstract: In today's days, due to increase in number of vehicles the probability of accidents is also increasing. The user should be aware of the road circumstances for safety purpose. Several methods require installing dedicated hardware in vehicle which are expensive. So, we have designed a Smart-phone based method which uses a Accelerometer and GPS sensors to analyze the road conditions. The designed system is called as Bumps Detection System (BDS) which uses Accelerometer for pothole detection and GPS for plotting the location of potholes on Google Map. Drivers will be informed in advance about count of potholes on road. we have assumed some threshold values on z-axis (Experimentally Derived) while designing the system. To justify these threshold values, we have used a machine learning approach.
description: This project presents a mobile-based application that utilizes smartphone sensors, specifically the accelerometer and GPS, to monitor and analyze road surface quality. By measuring vertical vibrations, the system identifies bumps and potholes, logs their geographic coordinates, and provides drivers with real-time or pre-trip information about road conditions to improve safety and navigation.
problem_statement: Egypt faces high rates of road traffic accidents, with poor road conditions, including numerous bumps and potholes, being a significant contributing factor. Existing solutions for monitoring road quality often require expensive, dedicated hardware that is not accessible to the average driver.
proposed_solution: The project proposes a smartphone-based application (BDS) that leverages built-in accelerometer and GPS sensors to detect road irregularities. The system collects vibration data, processes it using experimentally derived thresholds, and employs machine learning algorithms (K-means clustering and Random Forest) to classify road conditions and map them via the Google Maps API.
objectives:
1. Enhance user experience and usability.
2. Train and optimize machine learning algorithms.
3. Improve overall productivity and workflow optimization.
4. Improve system performance and reliability.
5. Improve mobile application usability and performance.

description: The project, titled 'Discopter', is a safety information system that utilizes a quad-copter to address challenges in emergency medical response, traffic management, and environmental exploration. By integrating a mobile application with IoT-enabled hardware, the system allows for remote control of the drone to deliver medical aid, monitor traffic conditions, and provide safety surveillance for scientists in hazardous environments.
problem_statement: The project addresses three main issues: the inability of ambulances to reach patients quickly due to traffic congestion, the lack of real-time data for police to manage traffic obstacles, and the safety risks faced by scientists and explorers in dangerous natural environments.
proposed_solution: The proposed solution is an IoT-based quad-copter system controlled via an Android application. The system uses a Pixhawk flight controller and Raspberry Pi to enable remote navigation, medical aid delivery, traffic monitoring, and environmental observation, providing real-time data to a web-based dashboard.

project_title: Science Lab using VR and AR (ScienceVerse)
student_names: Mahmoud Hamdy, Habiba Hassan
abstract: Many educational institutions face significant challenges in providing safe, modern, and fully equipped chemistry laboratories due to high operational costs, maintece requirements, space limitations, and safety concerns. These barriers often hinder students' opportunities to perform practical experiments, which are essential for understanding scientific concepts deeply and developing critical thin king skills. Moreover, schools in remote or low-resource areas are often the most affected, creating inequality in access to quality science education. To address these limitations, our graduation project introduces ScienceVerse, a virtual chemistry lab that leverages Augmented Reality (AR) and Virtual Reality (VR) technologies to simulate real- world laboratory experiences in an immersive, interactive, and safe digital environment. The system enables students to browse and select experiments, review the required tools and step-by-step procedures, and perform them using AR on mobile devices or through full immersion using VR headsets. It also allows students to rate experiments and track their performance. The platform provides both free and premium experiments, making it suitable for wide educational use while maintaining flexibility in access and features. ScienceVerse is developed using Unity 3D for creating realistic AR/VR environments, Flutter for building a cross-platform mobile application, and .NET Core with SsQL Server for backend services and secure data management. Additionally, students often struggle to understand complex chemical reactions and procedures due to insufficient guidance during practical sessions. These issues result in a learning gap and reduced engagement with the subject matter. 2 | Page
